name: Powered By People
subject: Will you help us prepare for 2025?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
$16.
That’s the amount of our average contribution this month so far.
Unlike other organizations that only operate for a few months in the election year, we operate year-round because we know that the future of Texas is worth fighting for. This work is made possible by thousands of $16 donations.
**We’re committed to building long-lasting connections to improve voter registration** and voter turnout in the years to come. For example, in 2021 during the winter storms, we made over 985,000 phone calls to senior citizens.
As we gear up for 2025, we’re working to reach our end-of-year fundraising goal so we start off the year prepared for Greg Abbott, Ted Cruz, and Donald Trump.
[**Our work is only possible because of every $5, $10 or even $20 donation. If you are in a position to do so, will you contribute $3 right now ahead of our end-of-year fundraising deadline?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20241227.Od72P4&refcode=ema20241227-239932&t=1&akid=239932%2E444211%2EA3f3c0)

name: Team Kean
subject: Don’t Miss It: Tom Kean, Jr. Swearing-In
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kean for Congress Inc _Copyright © 2024 Kean for Congress_ **Our mailing address is:**
body:
Be a part of this historical moment| | | Friend, Don’t miss this historic moment! On January 3rd, the 119th Congress will be sworn in, and Tom Kean, Jr. will take the oath for his **second term** as New Jersey’s Congressman. You’ll be able to tune in LIVE on January 3rd as Tom Kean, Jr. is sworn in for his second term as New Jersey’s Congressman! 📺 Save the link to join us live for the ceremony: [**https://live.house.gov/**](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=99ddec3cf077492e989602ffd3f82284&_e=taZtXYDOSn2Djkq3pJ20U14BXOMW_3mXGq6LJdTJaIHJ4nI7y9j1Yw5V7FBvR6R42LPyTuh2-qdXbEHnUit9YzUKaGJqbbs175ancQQY05OcngvTCjTyFPm3egV8IziJP6ugHjIRtYZTKzJzYO6k0tzVkhFXkwApCAbYi-jYk386qMY4ZqOVLWkdQcpPMPh5dA0DCxgsetlzh6DuOInzCw%3D%3D) 📺 The swearing in ceremony kicks off the next chapter of service for NJ-07. Congressman Tom Kean, Jr. and his team are ready to continue fighting for our district, and the D.C. office will officially reopen on January 3rd to assist you with any questions or concerns you may have. Please reach us anytime at [**info@tomkean.com**](mailto:info@tomkean.com). We hope you will tune in to celebrate with us and kick off the new year together!

Cheers to 2025, Team Kean
---

clean_body: Be a part of this historical moment| | | Friend, Don’t miss this historic moment! On January 3rd, the 119th Congress will be sworn in, and Tom Kean, Jr. will take the oath for his second term as New Jersey’s Congressman. You’ll be able to tune in LIVE on January 3rd as Tom Kean, Jr. is sworn in for his second term as New Jersey’s Congressman! 📺 Save the link to join us live for the ceremony: 📺 The swearing in ceremony kicks off the next chapter of service for NJ-07. Congressman Tom Kean, Jr. and his team are ready to continue fighting for our district, and the D.C. office will officially reopen on January 3rd to assist you with any questions or concerns you may have. Please reach us anytime at mailto:info@tomkean.com. We hope you will tune in to celebrate with us and kick off the new year together! name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: Desperately needed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voters desperately need a " private right to action " to protect their rights. All that phrase means is that we, the people, can bring forward a lawsuit ourselves when we see wrongdoing in our elections.
This 8th Circuit decision strips us of that -- in a world where most legal action around voting rights comes from groups like ours and our partners, not from the U.S. Department of Justice(DOJ). And we're about to face four years of DOJ's Civil Rights division facing attacks from a hostile presidential administration.
There's so much at risk, Team. RUSH $25 or more right now so we have the resources we need to fight rulings like this one and protect our right to vote across the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=122724_3&amount=25]
AP: Federal appeals court deals a blow to Voting Rights Act, ruling that private plaintiffs can’t sue [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=122724_3&amount=25]
Folks,
There are many consequences of this past election, but this ruling by the federal 8th Circuit stands out like a sore thumb. It's one of the most dangerous anti-voter rulings we’ve seen in years .
If you missed the details, the impact is pretty simple to understand: In the eight states impacted by the ruling, voters and voting rights organizations can no longer sue to overturn unjust laws under the Voting Rights Act. According to the 8th Circuit, only the Department of Justice (DoJ) has the legal standing to sue states over voting laws.
Whether the nomination for former Congressman Matt Gaetz goes through for Attorney General or we get stuck with another anti-voting MAGA acolyte, do any of us really think that the DOJ is going to protect voting rights over the next four years?
Team, we have to fight this ruling and make sure voters and advocacy groups have the right to defend voting rights in court. Please pitch in $25 or whatever you can to make every vote count, either at the ballot box or in court >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=122724_3&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=122724_3&amount=15]
GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=122724_3&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=122724_3&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=122724_3&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=122724_3&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=122724_3&amount=35]
This is all about the legal term "private right of action". The 8th Circuit says it doesn't exist. That means the pro-voting lawsuits we've seen in states like Wisconsin, Georgia, Florida, and others nationwide wouldn't be possible anymore if the Supreme Court backs up this ruling.
We won’t sugarcoat this: This could be a crushing blow to many voting rights organizations across the country, ourselves included. If this ruling is not overturned by a higher court, it could unravel all of the great work pro-voting organizations are doing across the country — and allow dozens of unjust, unconstitutional voter restrictions to stand.
Attacks like this on what remains of the Voting Rights Act are going to get worse over the next few years. As voter suppression laws become increasingly targeted and oppressive , our work to combat them must become smarter, stronger, and more accessible to everyone.
We can't do this alone. Help defend our right to vote with $25 or however much you can today and make every voice heard in our elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=122724_3&amount=25]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122724_3&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122724_3&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122724_3&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122724_3&amount=25]

subject: Re: Jack Smith’s BOMBSHELL Report!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Finally, we’re holding Trump accountable!
| **🚨 BREAKING 🚨** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85667?t=6&akid=18327%2E878179%2EdYjtLh) Folks, Special Counsel Jack Smith just announced he will be resigning before Donald Trump takes office — but first, he’s expected to release a MASSIVE report on his findings of Trump's crimes.

**Trump and MAGA Republicans are already attacking him relentlessly, so we’re sending Jack Smith a MASSIVE letter thanking him for all his amazing work!**

[**You’ve been PERSONALLY selected to sign, friend, so please don’t let us down: Add your name to thank Jack Smith now! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85667?t=7&akid=18327%2E878179%2EdYjtLh) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85667?t=8&akid=18327%2E878179%2EdYjtLh)
---
To: Special Counsel Jack Smith
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear Special Counsel Jack Smith,**

**_Thank you for all your hard work defending our democracy!_**

After Trump tried to OVERTURN President Biden’s victory and incited the deadly January 6th insurrection, we feared he would NEVER be held accountable.

Thanks to you, we were proven wrong. **_Now, before Trump becomes President again, we’re on the edge of our seats waiting for your report!_**

I know it isn’t easy fighting off Trump and the GOP’s escalating threats to take you down, so please know that Democrats across the country stand with you.

[**I can’t thank you enough for all of your work to hold Donald Trump accountable for his treasonous crimes! So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to keep electing incredible Democrats who will save our democracy from MAGA extremists like Donald Trump. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85667?t=9&akid=18327%2E878179%2EdYjtLh) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85667?t=10&akid=18327%2E878179%2EdYjtLh)
---
__X A grateful Democrat__
_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18327%2E878179%2EdYjtLh). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18327%2E878179%2EdYjtLh).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18327%2E878179%2EdYjtLh) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=18327%2E878179%2EdYjtLh). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=18327%2E878179%2EdYjtLh)

| | We wanted to remind you about something awesome: **Oregon’s Political Tax Credit.** Here’s the deal:
* Donate up to $50 (or $100 as a couple) to the Oregon GOP.
* You’ll get it back dollar-for-dollar when you file your state taxes.

Then, when you file, just check the box to show you made a political contribution, and you’ll be all set! **By contributing, you’re helping the Oregon Republican Party fight for the issues that matter most to you - like secure elections, lower taxes, safer communities, and fighting against out-of-control government overreach.**

clean_body: Help us fight for Oregon and get your money back. | | | | | | Friend. | | We wanted to remind you about something awesome: Oregon’s Political Tax Credit. Here’s the deal: Donate up to $50 (or $100 as a couple) to the Oregon GOP. You’ll get it back dollar-for-dollar when you file your state taxes. Then, when you file, just check the box to show you made a political contribution, and you’ll be all set! By contributing, you’re helping the Oregon Republican Party fight for the issues that matter most to you - like secure elections, lower taxes, safer communities, and fighting against out-of-control government overreach. | | | | | Your voice and support are critical to ensuring Oregon has strong conservative leadership that reflects your values. It’s an easy way to make a big impact without spending an extra dime.But there’s a deadline – you have to donate by December 31st to claim the credit. Put your hard-earned money to work fighting for your conservative values. Take advantage of this tax credit today! Thanks for all you do to stand with us, Oregon GOP | | | | | Welcome to Oregon's frontlines! Thank you for being part of our mission to help save Oregon. Our goal is to improve Oregon’s way of life by helping elect common-sense Republican leaders who will fight for YOU. | | | | | | | | The Democrats have had control of Oregon for far too long, it’s time for a change - but we can’t do it without you. Help us make a better tomorrow here in Oregon for you and your family by getting involved below: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Make sure you’re following us on socials to stay up to date on all things Oregon GOP!** ⬇ CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK ⬇Oregon Republican PartyPO Box 1586Lake Oswego, OR 97035 | | | | |

name: Neil Parrott
subject: Do you know what patriotic song was written on Christmas Day?
body:
We wish you a Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year! I hope you and your family are enjoying the time together during this special season where we can | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us2.campaign-archive.com/?e=5a45ee1154&u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=50cae09141)
---
| |
---
| | Peter!, we wish you a Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year!

I hope you have been able to relax a little bit and that you and your family are enjoying time together during this special season.

As I think about Christmas and the New Year, I wanted to write to you tonight about a song that was written on Christmas as a traveler made his way back across the Atlantic Ocean from a European vacation.

The Year? 1896. The traveler? John Philip Sousa. The song? "Stars and Stripes Forever," which became America's National March 91 years later while Ronald Reagan was President in 1987.

Sousa indicated that, "The notes for 'Stars and Stripes Forever' were born out of homesickness and fond memories of his time as the Marine Band's leader." You can listen to and see a great version of the song by going [here.](https://mdpetitions.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=3e6e52f13b&e=5a45ee1154)

We often hear the song as an instrumental, but did you know there are words to the song? In the U.S. Army version linked below, at the very end they sing:
_**Hurrah for the flag of the free!
May it wave as our standard forever,
The gem of the land and the sea,
The banner of the right.
Let tyrants remember the day
When our fathers with mighty endeavor
Proclaimed as they marched to the fray
That by their might and by their right
It waves forever.**_

I don't know about you, but I feel that many of our freedoms have been abridged recently.

I am looking forward to President Trump's Inauguration where we can once again work effectively toward freedom from crime, freedom from over-taxation, freedom from over-regulation, and a return to energy freedom.

My God Bless you and your family during this Christmas Season.
Sincerely from my family to yours,
Neil
---
| [Watch the Army Field Band Play "Stars and Stripes Forever"](https://mdpetitions.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=09a3a29d23&e=5a45ee1154 "Watch the Army Field Band Play "Stars and Stripes Forever"")

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z48ri1kug1aqpe4psqq5b3lf6c2vuvuihbm54o7o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpjm6ob4cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2lksb7jasi7jskqi931qmbp8jpif8mae81dmovg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpjm6ob4cdh2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z88ps6qsen99ekg5p5b292iq07hablbi4qvja4k8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpjm6ob4cdh2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zogtnc407ssuiosujrvik7fjpk2ei6kr4lnch8a8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpjm6ob4cdh2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z19h64lhsd04im3c0r8uavvmqobuidq71dk345l8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpjm6ob4cdh2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zabvevob3a13f31tbceh86s2hs998mvj1g9rlc98_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpjm6ob4cdh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---

body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from Real Ameican Reporting is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zr4k1s0ip2uilm03oc9sfvle3stg8p5vfqc8scgg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpjm1oj2clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z63fjpbktgo78lu297t7ip0kq483jnsaapvn6h98_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpjm1oj2clh2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zf0cekf8b8f777opopv2tjjefgm1eop31st58ia0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpjm1oj2clh2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z3g94rib79hukqkad35rgmn6ev8nla24e2uu97vo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpjm1oj2clh2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zl9hqlrmt9m9qb2tijv32tqa8ue8s6hbaacpar20_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpjm1oj2clh2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zgatgeon836miqt6c0eljabtdlla79jmgnmmn3q8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpjm1oj2clh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---

name: *** OFFICIAL HOUSE GOP COMMUNICATION ***
subject: We’re asking you to read this message through to the very end
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
There will be THREE make-or-break Special Elections.

| |
---
| | | We're asking you to read this message to the very end.

There will be THREE make-or-break Special Elections to fill Mike Waltz, Elise Stefanik, and Matt Gatez's seats in Congress. This could be a major problem and here's why:

Losing these Special Elections could completely dismantle our fragile House Majority.

We all know the power-hungry Democrats will stop at nothing to flip these key seats, take back control of the House, and ELIMINATE President Trump's Republican Trifecta for good.

_It 's all or nothing right now. We have to fight with everything we've got._

_**[Which is why we desperately need your help to continue our fight to defend our Conservative House Majority into the new year by making one last contribution in 2024.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvjib1si4l4q6iope3001mkcjmop1lc7nen883r8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpge0o31cth2bs "Which is why we desperately need your help to continue our fight to defend our Conservative House Majority into the new year by making one last contribution in 2024.")**_
| | [DONATE ONE LAST TIME BEFORE 12/31](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zba6p3a7m40pocg6vrllcjcagepoptn15mb1ubc8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpge0o31cth2bs "DONATE ONE LAST TIME BEFORE 12/31")
---

Look -

We saw dozens of races in the General Election come down to the wire, some being decided by one or two percentage points. And with the Democrats focusing all their attention on just these three races - we need a MIRACLE to keep these seats.

That's why your contribution is necessary to helping us strengthen our warchest to take on the Democrats in the new year. **_[So we're asking you to help out ONE LAST TIME and make one last donation before the New Year to help Republicans sweep these three Special Elections:](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1fl10mibrcl84dhvp11epvdtf78htp1ko8hnfe0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpge0o31cth2bs "So we’re asking you one last time to help us refuel our campaign funds to prepare for the three Special Elections by making one final donation in 2024.")_**
| [DONATE ONE LAST TIME BEFORE 12/31](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl1pmr521o5v2bp7dj48496gcit3rsf7g46eujrg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpge0o31cth2bs "DONATE ONE LAST TIME BEFORE 12/31")
---

Let's finish 2024 strong!

- House GOP

| |

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zah6552otdqdkfj1fv64el0m0pdptlrm5g64aqf0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpge0o31cth2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.

body:
We need the cold hard truth

|

| | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjpj7gmpke7auj8igdnd7a8j1kl8d002bjoram68_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpge0o31cth2bs)

2024 is almost over, and we want the cold hard truth from the supporters who fueled our success.

As a loyal member of the America First movement, your input is crucial in shaping the Republican Party's direction and advancing our agenda.

We can't let the liberal media and coastal elites undermine our progress. Your feedback will inform our top priorities in Congress and guide our 2025 agenda.

Take 30 seconds to **[complete this survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv3ko7cptsh16s652rttcbigdmjb9c5j6oa36gp8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpge0o31cth2bs "complete this survey")** and deliver the input we need to move forward in 2025.

subject: C.S. Lewis Profound Insights
body:

Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on Fox News because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, “” has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark Chronicles of Narnia series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching “,” we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. name: James =?UTF-8?Q?O=E2=80=99Keefe?=
subject: VITAL: Join me to Expose the Deep State
body:
The Deep State will be working harder than ever this time around, and OMG is taking an offensive stance to root them out and expose them . . . and we've already started.

| [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zh38m3aag1hakd36ro7cl31bu2kdb9hit4s085eg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpge8o72chh2bs)
[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z57opmffpsk07ddmauv2rp3fbi6qeskjna6upfk0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpge8o72chh2bs)
Dear Friend,

In the last week, O'Keefe Media Group has exposed two high-level Biden insiders who were eager to express their contempt for President Trump as we count down the days until the inauguration.

We have MANY more subjects on the hook and investigations that are advancing, but **[it will take your support to keep going](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zs5782g08q95k65gvlivqbk5srs2q246180m5r1g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpge8o72chh2bs).**

I predict that the next four years of the Trump Administration will be an ongoing game of cloak and dagger as Deep State operatives - embedded federal employees - work to undermine his policies just as they did during his first term.

**The Deep State will be working harder than ever this time around, and OMG is taking an offensive stance to root them out and expose them . . . and we've already started.**

While we work to identify and expose the bad actors who will remain in government, **DROVES of whistleblowers will come forward** with the desire to right the wrongs they witnessed during the four years of the Biden Administration.

This is a dual-track process, and **[I need you to join me by donating now so that we can move fast, strike hard, and keep that pace going until Deep State actors are driven out of our federal government.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zta0cn667llv4bo3kblk2r9mvorqg45h6fb92p18_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpge8o72chh2bs)**

While I rarely do interviews, the other day, I appeared on Benny Johnson's show to

send this very clear message to both the "good guys" and the "bad guys" in our government:

**For those good people** who are inside the federal government, who have witnessed corruption and are brave enough to step forward as a whistleblower, I want them to know these things:

* I'll tell your full story.

* I'll legally protect you.

* The heads of these agencies WILL SEE YOUR STORY so that change can occur.

* And to those bad actors in government:

* OMG's cameras are EVERYWHERE.

* You ARE going to meet with one of my undercover journalists.

* I will expose you.

My team at OMG is already working at breakneck speed seven days a week, and to be candid, this month has been rough financially. We're already behind, and I need your help to catch up, pay the stack of bills on my desk, and meet the next payroll.

Any help you can provide will help get me caught up and get OMG off to a strong start in 2025.

**[So please, help us accomplish this critical mission.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z6j0dt1c45dqs7nolrgl5sj7chsvf1ennc9lgte8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpge8o72chh2bs)**

Starting now, we're already entering an endless game of "whack-a-mole" as employees within our federal government conspire against Trump. As long as President Trump controls the White House, there will be bad actors within government - the people we refer to as the "Deep State" who are trying to undermine his policies, take down his people, or worse.

We have to be unrelenting in our work, which will require you and me to work together to make that happen: **[You keep OMG going with your support, and I'll work like hell to get the job done.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zo41tgm5rpfhc32154vplprf0mbbfioeqf75hb00_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpge8o72chh2bs)**

**[Are you in?](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z4t7sceh5prlgppfih2aosgc6n7fp5d9o7jotui0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpge8o72chh2bs)**

Thank you for your time and support, and please stay tuned for more.

In Truth,

James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. December is always a tough month for organizations that rely on the public for support. **[Help us get caught up and keep building our team to take on the Deep State actors who are working to take down the Trump Presidency.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z8vt5pgi99traho8rjj5lqcvjcvs95vgo19erl8g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpge8o72chh2bs)**

---

body:

Anti-Trump judge, Juan Merchan, just upheld all 34 felony convictions against President Trump.

And he defied the US Supreme Court to do it!

So you have to ask yourself, what's next?

It's up to you and me to protect President Trump from this banana republic judge.

And what's more, he has an illegal conflict of interest in this case.

**It 's no secret his daughter, a Democrat fundraiser, has raised millions of dollars for her clients using her father's show trial of President Trump - a clear violation of New York state law!**

Your help is urgently needed to fund the rapid investigation and convene a panel to serve on the Citizen Grand Jury.

Larry Klayman

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Access "C.S.Lewis on Christianity"
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9atufnnu2sd2tve8n121dci4scakbsu5nv0h800_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpge4pr2cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zfb3e7p8g102n45qhphqdj7rh0dahicd9em48be0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpge4pr2cth2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zn2a6gmkknes12opf98pu9hpco2n7up3ktusjnro_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpge4pr2cth2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6je36ufds2uf4vd6qtua6272802nfj2en00jgi0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpge4pr2cth2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zejmjbueqmnpbti4rgrhqn7q7jrb4ss075e6k9ko_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpge4pr2cth2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zg0s52fg3e3kquget49gd87uhn4f7c7b8p2idi7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpge4pr2cth2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---

Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: *** OFFICIAL HOUSE GOP COMMUNICATION ***
subject: We’re asking you to read this message through to the very end
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
There will be THREE make-or-break Special Elections.

| |
---
| | | We're asking you to read this message to the very end.

There will be THREE make-or-break Special Elections to fill Mike Waltz, Elise Stefanik, and Matt Gatez's seats in Congress. This could be a major problem and here's why:

Losing these Special Elections could completely dismantle our fragile House Majority.

We all know the power-hungry Democrats will stop at nothing to flip these key seats, take back control of the House, and ELIMINATE President Trump's Republican Trifecta for good.

_It 's all or nothing right now. We have to fight with everything we've got._

_**[Which is why we desperately need your help to continue our fight to defend our Conservative House Majority into the new year by making one last contribution in 2024.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcjo67cqh4udrfk8t9gfot86l702bmqif79e1vho_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpgecor6c5h2bs "Which is why we desperately need your help to continue our fight to defend our Conservative House Majority into the new year by making one last contribution in 2024.")**_
| | [DONATE ONE LAST TIME BEFORE 12/31](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi1eq2g2pmt0k8p8qjm7cp5436l9lcf50lc0qc60_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpgecor6c5h2bs "DONATE ONE LAST TIME BEFORE 12/31")
---

Look -

We saw dozens of races in the General Election come down to the wire, some being decided by one or two percentage points. And with the Democrats focusing all their attention on just these three races - we need a MIRACLE to keep these seats.

That's why your contribution is necessary to helping us strengthen our warchest to take on the Democrats in the new year. **_[So we're asking you to help out ONE LAST TIME and make one last donation before the New Year to help Republicans sweep these three Special Elections:](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztrjdmmp058p0bgv7p1plt1gnhc7cvcv24845d30_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpgecor6c5h2bs "So we’re asking you one last time to help us refuel our campaign funds to prepare for the three Special Elections by making one final donation in 2024.")_**
| [DONATE ONE LAST TIME BEFORE 12/31](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj2rsk1rbb5km5ocpdjn9n7n7cl43mhsaglq4cb0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpgecor6c5h2bs "DONATE ONE LAST TIME BEFORE 12/31")
---

Let's finish 2024 strong!

- House GOP

| |

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5gpnhhapd141giua5q5ckin8u5uau6sagdkgg6o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpgecor6c5h2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.

name: David Horowitz
subject: Communism begins where atheism begins
body:
Remember what happened if you wanted to attend church in 2020?

| | |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot, Remember what happened if you wanted to attend church in 2020? Our own government would treat you as a criminal.
But these same Leftists bureaucrats worked hard to make sure liquor stores and weed dispensaries remained open as “essential” businesses. And if you wanted to riot in the streets causing millions of dollars in damages to private property – they’d give you the keys to the city I’ll never forget what they did—because if given the chance, they’d do it all over again. They claimed it was about “safety.” But their own actions clearly demonstrated that was a lie. It was about control. It was always about control. And it was about silencing faith. The truth is the Left’s agenda is insidious. For over 50 years, Leftists and communists have infiltrated our institutions—turning them into tools to further their agenda, particularly their decades-long war on Christian America. No matter what you believe or how you worship, this fight is yours, too. The radical Left knows that Christianity isn’t just a religion in America—it’s the foundation of the freedoms, rights, and liberties that define our nation. That’s why they’re determined to tear it out by the roots. **[**I explain all of this in my book _Dark Agenda: The War to Destroy Christian America._**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaflu4ga16fb2gbs0o649qfdis84s13lepv4vlb0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpgecor2cdh2bs)** You might be surprised to learn that I’m not a Christian. I never have been. This isn’t about personal beliefs. It’s about good versus evil. Right versus wrong. It’s about protecting America from those who are hell-bent on destroying her. And no one knows the Left better than I do. I once marched alongside the Black Panthers and edited one of the leading Marxist magazines. But when my so-called comrades murdered my friend, I saw them for who they really were. I cast my first vote for Ronald Reagan and never looked back. That’s why I know this for certain: The Left’s attack on Christianity is no accident. It’s a deliberate effort to replace God with government, to strip America of its religious foundation so they can dismantle our Constitution and destroy everything that makes our country great. This war isn’t over, and I need you on my side. **[That’s why I’m asking you to make a tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to the David Horowitz Freedom Center today.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3uvjs21u39ll0h6u8a533sm3h9eff580tettang_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpgecor2cdh2bs)** With your help, we’ve been able to expose the radical Left’s plans through thousands of articles, pamphlets, books, and reports. Together, we’ve changed hearts, minds, and even outcomes. But the Left knows how effective we are, which is why they’re coming after us. MasterCard and Discover have targeted us. The IRS has tried to bleed us dry with an ongoing five-year investigation. But we refuse to back down. Because no one understands the Left like the Freedom Center does. That’s why your support is so critical. **[When you make a donation of $35 or more today, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of _Dark Agenda: The War to Destroy Christian America_ as a thank you for standing with us.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkq6pd384df4kn8do8tvh59tgiaepeu5musse2ag_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpgecor2cdh2bs)** Karl Marx once said, “Communism begins where atheism begins.” The Left knows this. That’s why their war on Christianity is at the center of their plan to fundamentally transform America. Without Christianity, we have no Constitution. No freedom. No future. Will you help me sound the alarm?
---
[ **Donate Now**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs5kf9atoq46218ftpk0tr74dva16f9eqoleos1o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpgecor2cdh2bs)
---
Thank you for your patriotism and generosity. For Freedom,
---
| |
---
**David Horowitz**
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhsqfgicr2fjf73i192oasegj80h365fktmjir3o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpgecor2cdh2bs)

name: James =?UTF-8?Q?O=E2=80=99Keefe?=
subject: VITAL: Join me to Expose the Deep State
body:
The Deep State will be working harder than ever this time around, and OMG is taking an offensive stance to root them out and expose them . . . and we've already started.

| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z3ertrmmks3a2kck64uklltpk8ok0t9hqdb7v56o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpgeaob2cjh2bs)
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zef8525iog31nd9eq2bvktllp8uiq2gvpddp8v8o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpgeaob2cjh2bs)
Dear Friend,

In the last week, O'Keefe Media Group has exposed two high-level Biden insiders who were eager to express their contempt for President Trump as we count down the days until the inauguration.

We have MANY more subjects on the hook and investigations that are advancing, but **[it will take your support to keep going](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zdimlhucbo9dj7h526id449qlaq6nnlp5p1tamj8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpgeaob2cjh2bs).**

I predict that the next four years of the Trump Administration will be an ongoing game of cloak and dagger as Deep State operatives - embedded federal employees - work to undermine his policies just as they did during his first term.

**The Deep State will be working harder than ever this time around, and OMG is taking an offensive stance to root them out and expose them . . . and we've already started.**

While we work to identify and expose the bad actors who will remain in government, **DROVES of whistleblowers will come forward** with the desire to right the wrongs they witnessed during the four years of the Biden Administration.

This is a dual-track process, and **[I need you to join me by donating now so that we can move fast, strike hard, and keep that pace going until Deep State actors are driven out of our federal government.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zp3ls6nudrlho6i8q4ug5f76s65d7ks45aumleco_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpgeaob2cjh2bs)**

While I rarely do interviews, the other day, I appeared on Benny Johnson's show to

send this very clear message to both the "good guys" and the "bad guys" in our government:

**For those good people** who are inside the federal government, who have witnessed corruption and are brave enough to step forward as a whistleblower, I want them to know these things:

* I'll tell your full story.

* I'll legally protect you.

* The heads of these agencies WILL SEE YOUR STORY so that change can occur.

* And to those bad actors in government:

* OMG's cameras are EVERYWHERE.

* You ARE going to meet with one of my undercover journalists.

* I will expose you.

My team at OMG is already working at breakneck speed seven days a week, and to be candid, this month has been rough financially. We're already behind, and I need your help to catch up, pay the stack of bills on my desk, and meet the next payroll.

Any help you can provide will help get me caught up and get OMG off to a strong start in 2025.

**[So please, help us accomplish this critical mission.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z44vapkpq3dhk1puros4df1h4snp8shkefk7b0h0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpgeaob2cjh2bs)**

Starting now, we're already entering an endless game of "whack-a-mole" as employees within our federal government conspire against Trump. As long as President Trump controls the White House, there will be bad actors within government - the people we refer to as the "Deep State" who are trying to undermine his policies, take down his people, or worse.

We have to be unrelenting in our work, which will require you and me to work together to make that happen: **[You keep OMG going with your support, and I'll work like hell to get the job done.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zabrprdiq15nqje3qr14hekh7flc7ghlamer2mro_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpgeaob2cjh2bs)**

**[Are you in?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z14j5huujirrm2md9djsip8olsmq2rqihtc3m2h8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpgeaob2cjh2bs)**

Thank you for your time and support, and please stay tuned for more.

In Truth,

James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. December is always a tough month for organizations that rely on the public for support. **[Help us get caught up and keep building our team to take on the Deep State actors who are working to take down the Trump Presidency.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zdq7c5a6plpor3purdg8ttepb49gfs3gp9hmeijg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpgeaob2cjh2bs)**

The Deep State will be working harder than ever this time around, and OMG is taking an offensive stance to root them out and expose them . . . and we've already started. While we work to identify and expose the bad actors who will remain in government, DROVES of whistleblowers will come forward with the desire to right the wrongs they witnessed during the four years of the Biden Administration. This is a dual-track process, and While I rarely do interviews, the other day, I appeared on Benny Johnson's show to send this very clear message to both the "good guys" and the "bad guys" in our government: For those good people who are inside the federal government, who have witnessed corruption and are brave enough to step forward as a whistleblower, I want them to know these things: I'll tell your full story. I'll legally protect you. The heads of these agencies WILL SEE YOUR STORY so that change can occur. And to those bad actors in government: OMG's cameras are EVERYWHERE. You ARE going to meet with one of my undercover journalists. I will expose you. My team at OMG is already working at breakneck speed seven days a week, and to be candid, this month has been rough financially. We're already behind, and I need your help to catch up, pay the stack of bills on my desk, and meet the next payroll. Any help you can provide will help get me caught up and get OMG off to a strong start in 2025. Starting now, we're already entering an endless game of "whack-a-mole" as employees within our federal government conspire against Trump. As long as President Trump controls the White House, there will be bad actors within government - the people we refer to as the "Deep State" who are trying to undermine his policies, take down his people, or worse. We have to be unrelenting in our work, which will require you and me to work together to make that happen: Thank you for your time and support, and please stay tuned for more. In Truth, James O'Keefe Founder and CEO O'Keefe Media Group P.S. December is always a tough month for organizations that rely on the public for support. ** First Look News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: David Horowitz
subject: Communism begins where atheism begins
body:
Remember what happened if you wanted to attend church in 2020?

| | |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot, Remember what happened if you wanted to attend church in 2020? Our own government would treat you as a criminal.
But these same Leftists bureaucrats worked hard to make sure liquor stores and weed dispensaries remained open as “essential” businesses. And if you wanted to riot in the streets causing millions of dollars in damages to private property – they’d give you the keys to the city I’ll never forget what they did—because if given the chance, they’d do it all over again. They claimed it was about “safety.” But their own actions clearly demonstrated that was a lie. It was about control. It was always about control. And it was about silencing faith. The truth is the Left’s agenda is insidious. For over 50 years, Leftists and communists have infiltrated our institutions—turning them into tools to further their agenda, particularly their decades-long war on Christian America. No matter what you believe or how you worship, this fight is yours, too. The radical Left knows that Christianity isn’t just a religion in America—it’s the foundation of the freedoms, rights, and liberties that define our nation. That’s why they’re determined to tear it out by the roots. **[**I explain all of this in my book _Dark Agenda: The War to Destroy Christian America._**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zln352jvo5grpfpu6d4v3ip65k1pjbc7la7agdn0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpge6pj4c5h2bs)** You might be surprised to learn that I’m not a Christian. I never have been. This isn’t about personal beliefs. It’s about good versus evil. Right versus wrong. It’s about protecting America from those who are hell-bent on destroying her. And no one knows the Left better than I do. I once marched alongside the Black Panthers and edited one of the leading Marxist magazines. But when my so-called comrades murdered my friend, I saw them for who they really were. I cast my first vote for Ronald Reagan and never looked back. That’s why I know this for certain: The Left’s attack on Christianity is no accident. It’s a deliberate effort to replace God with government, to strip America of its religious foundation so they can dismantle our Constitution and destroy everything that makes our country great. This war isn’t over, and I need you on my side. **[That’s why I’m asking you to make a tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to the David Horowitz Freedom Center today.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5pqsi4kvopifva93kom67ocos2onfhkufqq8hq8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpge6pj4c5h2bs)** With your help, we’ve been able to expose the radical Left’s plans through thousands of articles, pamphlets, books, and reports. Together, we’ve changed hearts, minds, and even outcomes. But the Left knows how effective we are, which is why they’re coming after us. MasterCard and Discover have targeted us. The IRS has tried to bleed us dry with an ongoing five-year investigation. But we refuse to back down. Because no one understands the Left like the Freedom Center does. That’s why your support is so critical. **[When you make a donation of $35 or more today, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of _Dark Agenda: The War to Destroy Christian America_ as a thank you for standing with us.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2r2mbqpvnb7akuo98e443kbjtol8b7nrt332ogo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpge6pj4c5h2bs)** Karl Marx once said, “Communism begins where atheism begins.” The Left knows this. That’s why their war on Christianity is at the center of their plan to fundamentally transform America. Without Christianity, we have no Constitution. No freedom. No future. Will you help me sound the alarm?
---
[ **Donate Now**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8b0hfmmltrosk1nh9b74bld38fcf6gq9s5g0s08_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpge6pj4c5h2bs)

Thank you for your patriotism and generosity. For Freedom,

**David Horowitz**

TheFederalistWire.com

Fellow American, did you already forget about Elon's critical warning?

Before election day, Elon Musk explained the Left's entire plan

1. Joe Biden (and now Kamala Harris) imported "asylum seekers"

non-citizen voting. "If even 1 in 20 illegals become citizens per
year, something that the Democrats are expediting as fast as
humanly possible, that would be about 2 million new legal voters
in 4 years." -Elon Musk

2. With just tens of thousands of votes often determining
victory in swing states, these new imported voters would tip the
scales and completely eliminate swing states altogether!

3. Democrats would have complete and total control, marking the
end of Democracy as we know it!

Fellow American, thanks to you and the dedicated patriots in our
movement, we avoided the end of our elections as we know it!
Democracy prevailed, and the CHEATING was stopped. Republicans
have won back our country. That's the good news…

Now for the bad news: the fight to secure our elections is NOT

This comes after Kamala Harris only won in states that did not
require voter ID!

We must ensure voter FRAUD is stopped at every level! We must
ensure we continue to have the opportunity to cast a meaningful

But the radical left will fight tooth and nail to prevent this
from happening! It's up to us to continue the push to DEMAND

We've been told you are someone we can trust to heed Elon
Musk's words. Thank you for standing up in support of election
integrity.

As one of our TOP patriot donors on file, we are asking for
your support today during this final stretch.

You see, your dollar today, during the final stretch of the

That's because while most Americans have shifted their focus

between!

Will you rush support right now when we need you the most to
maximize your impact during this crucial stretch before the End

PRESERVE ELECTION INTEGRITY IN 2025 AND BEYOND!

Sincerely,

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Intel
subject: Did you read this in the news?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsJk6VSWLN
Did you read in the news how several leading colleges and
universities reacted to last month's election?
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osJk6VSWLN

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Dear
Friend,

Did you
read in the news how several leading colleges and universities
reacted to last month's election?

Some of
these so-called elite institutions canceled classes and gave
students coloring books, hot cocoa, and counseling so they could
cope with the election results.

Could
there be better proof that too many of America's schools fail to
prepare their students to be responsible citizens of the world's
greatest and longest-lasting constitutional republic?

Yet, we
should not really be surprised by this. After all, the forces of
the anti-American Left have been focused on seizing control of
our educational institutions since the late 1960s.

Too many
young Americans are taught that our nation's founding principles
were developed to promote white supremacy, that natural rights
and private property are codewords for fascism, and that justice
requires the destruction of capitalism.

To
normal, hard-working Americans, this sounds insane. That's
because it is insane.

Our
American way of life is under relentless attack on campuses
across the country. This problem won't be fixed quickly or
easily-although I believe we have the opportunity to score
significant victories in the coming year.

I am
hopeful for our future, and one of the main reasons I am hopeful
is the sense of civic responsibility and generosity of people
like YOU.

With your
support, Hillsdale College plans to redouble its efforts in 2025
to revive and preserve liberty through education.

Given the
urgency of engaging the Left on the battleground of education,
will you consider a tax-deductible gift today to help Hillsdale
College expand its educational outreach efforts on behalf of
liberty?

You will
help us to expand the production of our free online courses,
increase the readership of Imprimis, and launch increasing
numbers of Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools
nationwide.

Stepping
up the battle to retake American education from the anti-American
Left is an essential part of restoring and preserving the
American way of life. It will take a mighty effort-but in the
words of Hillsdale's motto, "Strength Rejoices in the Challenge."

Your
generous support of our educational outreach programs will help
us to reach and teach additional millions of our fellow citizens.

As you
know, Hillsdale refuses to accept one penny of government
funding-not even indirectly in the form of federal or state
student grants and loans.

This
allows Hillsdale to remain genuinely independent and focused on
its mission, free of burdensome and corrupting federal
regulations.

But it
also means that all our work-including our educational outreach
efforts on behalf of liberty-is entirely dependent on the support
of citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education
to liberty.

2025 will
be a critical year, and the Left will pull out all the stops to
keep its stranglehold on our government and on our schools.

It will
take significant resources to promote our online courses-such as
our recent course on "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism"-while
also expanding Hillsdale's other educational outreach efforts.

Many of
our most faithful supporters give gifts of $25 or $50, while
others give gifts of $100, $500, or even more. What's most
important is that you give what you can.

Please
help today by making your best tax-deductible, year-end gift
using the secure, convenient link below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/64126658:sJk6VSWLN:m:3:2532013465:01CE4222D4F64269847E366734DCEDC5:r

Thank you
for your partnership in our educational efforts to preserve
liberty and the American way of life.

Warm
regards,

Larry P.
Arnn

President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing
Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: 4Patriots
subject: Oh no! We're embarrassed...
body:
When you stock up today with this exclusive deal, you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs.

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrsi2trc8tp24j5gltnqk55n3lo9feeqmf4908o8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpgeeoj0c3h2bs), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu33jmsgceisqk2ui1oiluvd0f1hvd338a104ing_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpgeeoj0c3h2bs) [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhi7uc7viqhgvq2e2ln3979l9fo35pdo6jlq6jn8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpgeeoj0c3h2bs) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze2kfeq8nv720q7eu5scl47irgalu40csrrqi4po_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpgeeoj0c3h2bs) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." name: *** OFFICIAL HOUSE GOP COMMUNICATION ***
subject: We’re asking you to read this message through to the very end
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
There will be THREE make-or-break Special Elections.

| |
---
| | | We're asking you to read this message to the very end.

There will be THREE make-or-break Special Elections to fill Mike Waltz, Elise Stefanik, and Matt Gatez's seats in Congress. This could be a major problem and here's why:

Losing these Special Elections could completely dismantle our fragile House Majority.

We all know the power-hungry Democrats will stop at nothing to flip these key seats, take back control of the House, and ELIMINATE President Trump's Republican Trifecta for good.

_It 's all or nothing right now. We have to fight with everything we've got._

_**[Which is why we desperately need your help to continue our fight to defend our Conservative House Majority into the new year by making one last contribution in 2024.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2a4k6puc9v4ggqcmd6bgh2e1jkqb10mrjm30juo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpgeeoj4c5h2bs "Which is why we desperately need your help to continue our fight to defend our Conservative House Majority into the new year by making one last contribution in 2024.")**_
| | [DONATE ONE LAST TIME BEFORE 12/31](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zduaddk6om7ldc2rmlm8qf27u6il7tn6qt1cu4ug_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpgeeoj4c5h2bs "DONATE ONE LAST TIME BEFORE 12/31")
---

Look -

We saw dozens of races in the General Election come down to the wire, some being decided by one or two percentage points. And with the Democrats focusing all their attention on just these three races - we need a MIRACLE to keep these seats.

That's why your contribution is necessary to helping us strengthen our warchest to take on the Democrats in the new year. **_[So we're asking you to help out ONE LAST TIME and make one last donation before the New Year to help Republicans sweep these three Special Elections:](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zamulog1ea5fk7nc45r8tl0jln19ate7j75qkgcg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpgeeoj4c5h2bs "So we’re asking you one last time to help us refuel our campaign funds to prepare for the three Special Elections by making one final donation in 2024.")_**
| [DONATE ONE LAST TIME BEFORE 12/31](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvabesgu3c2nl1teta8o9nj5ib9udgfkgir5kf08_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpgeeoj4c5h2bs "DONATE ONE LAST TIME BEFORE 12/31")
---

Let's finish 2024 strong!

- House GOP

| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7l8rpe0e7l545ks4bus8pd6m7i2bnl75i197h2o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpgeeoj4c5h2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zni7pv3tc3eobqo3uk1amn3vin2g9gimnuev0n6g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpgeeoj4c5h2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.

name: David Horowitz
subject: Communism begins where atheism begins
body:
Remember what happened if you wanted to attend church in 2020?

| | |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot, Remember what happened if you wanted to attend church in 2020? Our own government would treat you as a criminal.
But these same Leftists bureaucrats worked hard to make sure liquor stores and weed dispensaries remained open as “essential” businesses. And if you wanted to riot in the streets causing millions of dollars in damages to private property – they’d give you the keys to the city I’ll never forget what they did—because if given the chance, they’d do it all over again. They claimed it was about “safety.” But their own actions clearly demonstrated that was a lie. It was about control. It was always about control. And it was about silencing faith. The truth is the Left’s agenda is insidious. For over 50 years, Leftists and communists have infiltrated our institutions—turning them into tools to further their agenda, particularly their decades-long war on Christian America. No matter what you believe or how you worship, this fight is yours, too. The radical Left knows that Christianity isn’t just a religion in America—it’s the foundation of the freedoms, rights, and liberties that define our nation. That’s why they’re determined to tear it out by the roots. **[**I explain all of this in my book _Dark Agenda: The War to Destroy Christian America._**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zpqchpjhi5m1ubgiuehhprtthu1i2rlrffuju7sg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpge1p32cjh2bs)** You might be surprised to learn that I’m not a Christian. I never have been. This isn’t about personal beliefs. It’s about good versus evil. Right versus wrong. It’s about protecting America from those who are hell-bent on destroying her. And no one knows the Left better than I do. I once marched alongside the Black Panthers and edited one of the leading Marxist magazines. But when my so-called comrades murdered my friend, I saw them for who they really were. I cast my first vote for Ronald Reagan and never looked back. That’s why I know this for certain: The Left’s attack on Christianity is no accident. It’s a deliberate effort to replace God with government, to strip America of its religious foundation so they can dismantle our Constitution and destroy everything that makes our country great. This war isn’t over, and I need you on my side. **[That’s why I’m asking you to make a tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to the David Horowitz Freedom Center today.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z5oi7ugf0hj7ol2jeltsmvpqpqppqku5rlrh5il8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpge1p32cjh2bs)** With your help, we’ve been able to expose the radical Left’s plans through thousands of articles, pamphlets, books, and reports. Together, we’ve changed hearts, minds, and even outcomes. But the Left knows how effective we are, which is why they’re coming after us. MasterCard and Discover have targeted us. The IRS has tried to bleed us dry with an ongoing five-year investigation. But we refuse to back down. Because no one understands the Left like the Freedom Center does. That’s why your support is so critical. **[When you make a donation of $35 or more today, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of _Dark Agenda: The War to Destroy Christian America_ as a thank you for standing with us.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zrnfurpb6mnq8mlbibosuvta7ctvtmbph4dj17c0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpge1p32cjh2bs)** Karl Marx once said, “Communism begins where atheism begins.” The Left knows this. That’s why their war on Christianity is at the center of their plan to fundamentally transform America. Without Christianity, we have no Constitution. No freedom. No future. Will you help me sound the alarm?
---
[ **Donate Now**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z2pd968es0q4gct6lc7apse7qv4u0lpgdm2v7250_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpge1p32cjh2bs)
---
Thank you for your patriotism and generosity. For Freedom,
---
| |
---
**David Horowitz**

clean_body: Remember what happened if you wanted to attend church in 2020? | | | | | | | Dear Fellow Patriot, Remember what happened if you wanted to attend church in 2020? Our own government would treat you as a criminal. But these same Leftists bureaucrats worked hard to make sure liquor stores and weed dispensaries remained open as “essential” businesses. And if you wanted to riot in the streets causing millions of dollars in damages to private property – they’d give you the keys to the city I’ll never forget what they did—because if given the chance, they’d do it all over again. They claimed it was about “safety.” But their own actions clearly demonstrated that was a lie. It was about control. It was always about control. And it was about silencing faith. The truth is the Left’s agenda is insidious. For over 50 years, Leftists and communists have infiltrated our institutions—turning them into tools to further their agenda, particularly their decades-long war on Christian America. No matter what you believe or how you worship, this fight is yours, too. The radical Left knows that Christianity isn’t just a religion in America—it’s the foundation of the freedoms, rights, and liberties that define our nation. That’s why they’re determined to tear it out by the roots. You might be surprised to learn that I’m not a Christian. I never have been. This isn’t about personal beliefs. It’s about good versus evil. Right versus wrong. It’s about protecting America from those who are hell-bent on destroying her. And no one knows the Left better than I do. I once marched alongside the Black Panthers and edited one of the leading Marxist magazines. But when my so-called comrades murdered my friend, I saw them for who they really were. I cast my first vote for Ronald Reagan and never looked back. That’s why I know this for certain: The Left’s attack on Christianity is no accident. It’s a deliberate effort to replace God with government, to strip America of its religious foundation so they can dismantle our Constitution and destroy everything that makes our country great. This war isn’t over, and I need you on my side. With your help, we’ve been able to expose the radical Left’s plans through thousands of articles, pamphlets, books, and reports. Together, we’ve changed hearts, minds, and even outcomes. But the Left knows how effective we are, which is why they’re coming after us. MasterCard and Discover have targeted us. The IRS has tried to bleed us dry with an ongoing five-year investigation. But we refuse to back down. Because no one understands the Left like the Freedom Center does. That’s why your support is so critical. Karl Marx once said, “Communism begins where atheism begins.” The Left knows this. That’s why their war on Christianity is at the center of their plan to fundamentally transform America. Without Christianity, we have no Constitution. No freedom. No future. Will you help me sound the alarm? Thank you for your patriotism and generosity. name: Majority Leader Steve Scalise
subject: I tried to do everything in my power to avoid this…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Brace yourself because 2025 will be a WHOLE new ballgame!

| |
---
| | | I tried to do everything in my power to avoid this...

This is the last message I wanted to send you today but our backs are up against the wall. We're about to fall 10-15% SHORT of our final fundraising goal of the year!

**[So if you're able, I'm humbly asking you to contribute ten or twenty bucks before our final deadline of 2024.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkp80nf8sildvn9nopr8771h62ji2p8tcejfr3bo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpge9p72cjh2bs "So if you’re able, I’m humbly asking you to contribute ten or twenty bucks before our final deadline of 2024.") After that, our numbers go public - and the Radical Democrats are chomping at the bit for any sign of weakness so they can swoop in and DESTROY our House Majority.**

To put it plainly, if we come up even 1% short of our goal, they'll claim House Republicans are doomed, twist the narrative, and try to kneecap our Majority before we even get off the ground.

If we don't catch up now, I'm afraid it'll only get worse... _So if you thought 2024 was bad when they tried to:_

- Imprison President Trump
- Censor Conservative voices
- Weaponize the government against Americans
- Allow non-citizens to vote in our elections
- Pack the Supreme Court

**... Brace yourself because 2025 will be a whole new ballgame!**

This fight won't be easy - it never is. House Democrats have already plotted their plan to take back the Speaker's gavel AND we're going toe-to-toe with Liberal dark money groups that have ALREADY mobilized to flip key battleground districts.

**_[But what you do right now can have a direct and immediate impact on the future of our country- just a few bucks make a world of a difference.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgna4tho2hbcppldcifdun4ikcabatl6c3gvagsg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpge9p72cjh2bs "But what you do right now can have a direct and immediate impact on the future of our country – just a few bucks makes a world of a difference.")_ **And if you don't have anything to spare right now, know you are still a valued member of this team.

I couldn't be more grateful or more honored to fight alongside you.

Thank you for everything you do.

For America,

Steve Scalise

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2h70rei4rb5ik22e1jgp76ru0fclj03p99hv8ao_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpge9p72cjh2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlbd6qccsqi41kjk7pgqhpdrgda4h1dijnp6hs38_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cpge9p72cjh2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.
