name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Last Blue Letter of 2024 - Sat, Dec. 28
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9b04bbde-061c-4ab8-bc96-15f1ad4cf340/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
| | | | | **_Blue Letter - 12/28/24_** It’s been a while since I last wrote one of these. And well... a lot’s happened since, but better late than never – especially before 2025. It has been a heartbreaking time for many of us, as our country again chose to elect a Pro-Putin, convicted-felon President of the United States. I’m concerned for my loved ones, friends, neighbors–all Americans who may be targeted by a second Trump administration. I’m angry that we’re going through this again when we knew who this man was, witnessed his deranged ramblings for years.. It’s clear that this year’s results were a reflection of people dissatisfied with the state of our country. Assaulted by disinformation from Moscow to Musk. It’s a time of reflecting as Democrats, about who we are and what we stand for. It’s time for us to regroup – to look to previous generations who engaged in these battles and won – and dig our heels in for 2025 and beyond. Because the fight is nowhere near done. We have special elections coming up for the House and Senate, as well as local and state races throughout the country. We may have lost this time – and I won’t mince words, to a ghoul–but the fight for democracy and our fundamental freedoms is far from over. From the First Battle of Bull Run to Japanese Internment during World War II, America has been here before. Every time we’ve eventually defeated evil. So to my friends reading this: take time to celebrate the holidays with loved ones, decompress and reset. When the calendar turns over, we get up, dust ourselves off and live up to the heroes who preceded us and continued the cause of liberty. Thank you for a great 2024, Blue Amp Action Crew! Now Let’s Keep The Excitement Going in 2025! 🎉 All my best, Cliff 👍 [**Please Subscribe To Our Youtube**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T24d98911-411f-45cf-bdb5-d6f4e76f169b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**!!...** Keep up w/ our community, benefit from our messaging on Democratic ideals/GOP assaults on freedom and support our activism!! 👍 **[F](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf86077d9-b848-4bb0-9d95-6e5720c6ded2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)****[ollow on Bluesky](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1c1eadbe-24fa-47ab-92f6-8f258ccde0c5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)!!... We must keep fighting on this platform so we don't allow Republican disinformation to win!!**
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies -- including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights -- including voting rights! -- are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal polls and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|

PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208

As a loyal member of the America First movement, your input is crucial in shaping the Republican Party's direction and advancing our agenda.

We can't let the liberal media and coastal elites undermine our progress. Your feedback will inform our top priorities in Congress and guide our 2025 agenda.

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: 2025 is a critical year
body:
Our nation is at a crossroads.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a64d66672a004ec6bde3c97c786ceca6&_e=0fLdmfJpsgfNmOIwXBM9XIvee3JaCwaE90d2tYazc-wwxH1KMYgZ4ZgNt8ujlLuiMMsZcIHLIXpQ1ltMTwrpXx90LGmPxEDKla2_Tul8l6BRnCZtsHrnFWt88xUfldb4I31jDha10GWFgz8jCSO2VC8cpNp5zDrZVR0hnR3p80YVqEz0xh9j4Yq__v6DELnGx8sxGA2WcqPEeinLngZ2WprWzcvqC2ufM0elPzqMnUfoTbJG4zfm_cS6WQL3xbvWr8CV2HC0nuSOSeluHIXo76aoNrB6epXa3LWbDy4k_Qv23XPaGuZRnBklwIDF7QKUzMv3FJtwfbg4L37gTPhyKjY-CPBGP2kU980C1W0JAVWFhmGYbSr0P3PlhLFOB2qv)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Our nation is at a crossroads. Patriotic Americans have an opportunity in 2025 to take fundamental steps in the direction of reviving and preserving liberty and free government.

It is imperative to make the most of this opportunity in order to pass on the blessings of the American way of life to future generations.

As you may know, Hillsdale College is the only educational institution in the country that is in a strong position to reach and teach millions of Americans about America's founding principles and its great heritage of liberty. And we are expanding our efforts to do just that.

To press forward with our educational mission on behalf of liberty during a critical time for America, we have set an ambitious goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education** in 2025.

[Will you partner with us in defending the cause of liberty and free government nationwide through education with your year-end support and make a generous gift to Hillsdale College today?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a64d66672a004ec6bde3c97c786ceca6&_e=0fLdmfJpsgfNmOIwXBM9XIvee3JaCwaE90d2tYazc-wwxH1KMYgZ4ZgNt8ujlLuiMMsZcIHLIXpQ1ltMTwrpXx90LGmPxEDKla2_Tul8l6BRnCZtsHrnFWt88xUfldb4I31jDha10GWFgz8jCSO2VC8cpNp5zDrZVR0hnR3p80YVqEz0xh9j4Yq__v6DELnGx8sxGA2WcqPEeinLngZ2WprWzcvqC2ufM0elPzqMnUeRl7N0wCKN4c8VQMrHWK6tnRtKqn50iCaQCURCO4IQav_bBuGxwdIvXuuqSDOjBH5FHgqyQkwRcRMIdET6MftOy_arB3voFRrqPGNAUlE8UcQJ7BLeNG7fnZvHAZRQcMLgVzJF2U9AX7cqjbyUcJWO)

What all of us do today will have significant consequences for the survival of the American way of life. We have the opportunity to make 2025 a year that future American patriots will look back on with gratitude.

Make no mistake. Powerful forces who seek to undermine our way of life--not only socialist politicians but also the legacy media, the entertainment industry, and Big Tech--will be working tirelessly to undermine liberty and free government, including in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.

Indeed, successfully engaging the Left on the battleground of American education is of fundamental importance if we are to revive and preserve liberty for future generations.

But success will require the faithful and generous support of patriotic Americans like you--citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty in a free republic. [That's why we're asking for your year-end support to continue and expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a64d66672a004ec6bde3c97c786ceca6&_e=0fLdmfJpsgfNmOIwXBM9XIvee3JaCwaE90d2tYazc-wwxH1KMYgZ4ZgNt8ujlLuiMMsZcIHLIXpQ1ltMTwrpXx90LGmPxEDKla2_Tul8l6BRnCZtsHrnFWt88xUfldb4I31jDha10GWFgz8jCSO2VC8cpNp5zDrZVR0hnR3p80YVqEz0xh9j4Yq__v6DELnGx8sxGA2WcqPEeinLngZ2WprWzcvqC2ufM0elPzqMnUc8ITJMq3JRIfl7Hde0ffS2KbSNQ_b8JTNIe1TXh9kH3A2FsYkk74Ss4_PzOaqIAo7pyL0tB7V3iNaN0pg-Bf59NKpijZCD51exEox_S-VklU7UDlE96z2c7YxaYSmx3ccSTZLYLMnmcwu7fb6D9JUM)

**We must do all that we possibly can.**

With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's educational mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this critical time for our nation.

You will help us to ...

* **Reach an additional 600,000 American households and businesses with _Imprimis_ , our monthly digest of liberty.** With your support, we plan to increase the circulation of _Imprimis_ to more than 7 million households and businesses in 2025.
* **Teach citizens nationwide, especially younger Americans, through our FREE online courses.** Your donation will help us to create new online courses and add 900,000 new students in 2025.
* **Restore excellence to American K-12 education.** Your faithful generosity will help us to launch and guide increasing numbers of classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Reading and watching the news reminds us every day that our work is far from finished. America remains deeply divided. The gains we've made on behalf of liberty in recent years are fragile.

**With your help, we will succeed --because we must succeed for our country!**

Hillsdale College **conducts its educational outreach efforts** --as it does all its work--while refusing to accept **one penny** of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

To meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we will need thousands of gifts between **$25** and **$100**. Most of our supporters' contributions are in this range.

We will also need a significant number of **$500** to **$1,000** donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated.

Since we have less than a month remaining to fund this project for 2025, we urgently need your help.

**You can safely and securely renew your support using this link:[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a64d66672a004ec6bde3c97c786ceca6&_e=0fLdmfJpsgfNmOIwXBM9XIvee3JaCwaE90d2tYazc-wwxH1KMYgZ4ZgNt8ujlLuiMMsZcIHLIXpQ1ltMTwrpXx90LGmPxEDKla2_Tul8l6BRnCZtsHrnFWt88xUfldb4I31jDha10GWFgz8jCSO2VC8cpNp5zDrZVR0hnR3p80YVqEz0xh9j4Yq__v6DELnGx8sxGA2WcqPEeinLngZ2WprWzcvqC2ufM0elPzqMnUfwicg3r2zKnxmAh107HEYVjBCDr4gKmONbedEoa6M77nzvPQcl7u2_0tBOBvaoBG6C-30nlK-d2W-xPVR7TwGJjDcIBjvBISrB3Wt3SmmVD4AUjgmNeDKRZrJrl4sB9ljrgkaEaGz4ZOsn8F9_dG7z)**

It is not an exaggeration to say that the future of American liberty and the American way of life depends on the efforts of patriotic Americans over the next few years.

That's why I hope you'll make your most generous year-end gift to Hillsdale College before the **December 31** deadline.

Every dollar you give will get us closer to our **$6,000,000** online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.

Please partner with Hillsdale College to make 2025 a significant turning point in the revival and preservation of the American way of life.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Defend the Constitution
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=a64d66672a004ec6bde3c97c786ceca6&_t=pW5h58Hr-_QF69cgmQCOkjTPBrwX-hQnXPO3Cdzkn-HS0x8_FOwgWUt4FjwDVGTOqOXdKAdS93lY6iH47bEobPlJoBQ7Ffru3XMcM9YYvhVrU35o6VPoQUZn9NDqYgsoElIAZCAXABBmkMCiPGq27uw2Cqstazre6HceWutMqPA%3D)

subject: (1) Unread Email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Orden for Congress
body:
Derrick Van Orden took time out of his day to write you a note.

| |
---
| | | Friend,

Derrick Van Orden took time out of his day to write you a note. Would you be so kind as to take a few minutes to hear him out? Thanks!

name: Blake Gendebien
subject: Why I’m running for Elise Stefanik’s seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td6ddad7a-df49-4c17-9a7e-4b780affd498/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T19da2684-1074-44b5-92eb-25d63153adaf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Hi Peter, I’m Blake Gendebien. I’m a husband, father, dairy farmer, and business owner who was born and raised in the North Country. [I’m excited to announce that I’m running for Congress here in New York’s 21st District. Will you split $10 between my campaign and Blue Amp Action today to help us kickstart our campaign and flip this seat in the special election?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf14e7d2e-60e2-42b0-900e-8bf2bb6d618a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CHIP IN →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T52677fe8-88f5-4ef6-ba2b-c37d7fe3806b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | After serving in the Peace Corps, my parents moved to the North Country and started a dairy farm. I grew up working on the farm, earned a degree in agriculture, and later worked for a farm equipment manufacturer. For the past 22 years, with my family, I have owned and operated Twin Mill Farms, which currently has over 1,000 acres of land, 500 cows, and 12 employees. Now, I’ve decided to run for Congress because the North Country is a national treasure and has been overlooked for far too long. It’s time for us to get the representation we deserve in Washington. My experience as a farm owner, serving as Vice Chair on the Agri-Mark Board of Directors, and co-founding the Jules of Life Foundation – a nonprofit that assists patients and families battling cancer – has given me deep roots in our community. But this campaign isn’t about me; it’s about all of us. It’s about all of the farmers, business owners, workers, families, teachers, coaches, and community members here in the North Country. I’m not running for Congress as a stepping stone to political power. I’m running because this is an opportunity to fight for the North Country, and I understand the challenges that folks here are facing. [Will you split $10 between me and Blue Amp Action today to join us?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tabf2d421-5338-4f78-b457-f8279c1eeb5e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | [SUPPORT OUR CAMPAIGN →](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc8d7bc54-e4c4-47e8-b767-a825e802985f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thank you, Blake
---
| | |

| | |
---

PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208

| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/loc_em_fr_20241228_gendebienintro_b1_f1_s1_c1_90op_n-t1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf38b1b5d-23ea-47ce-94ef-7c1ef074e31f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC

name: Hillsdale College via Full Mag News
subject: A new birth of freedom
body:
Our nation is at a crossroads.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7264177b5bb340eca070d499db59fb71&_e=Ny5F8hskpNKeDk3q_xNiw7XGRyM-F2Lb84zOCEjFXa7YopwjqlDU0nDkq8gUTdovwK_xrYaeh_MsuQgDvUR7krf6osiMz_oaQJjpniTPpxyBXgsPxjUECEZg7ZQTBt6AWr53ifKStppP1SxL6iGcVZ_5USx5YQBKg9qgD_pNwI6XX8ITXiWxVKpl6tfixiVaGV-nFjeR4a9CPz2-sE5tO0tPbfrDU_vszng4oCJVgGqjW3H0kuHGsurD8Xux8RR1Uya2RQSNlLQ8dDJK0ltrWr_AOPB1sD0_Gz6w_q7L5iJwjJKS685kfOy4NbEf-HorO56z3qwPiSPV_A1aFenvyUwT8MlLWjW7n-2fi54i8g5ZticdryuWDpep8w4_p7-U)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Our nation is at a crossroads. Patriotic Americans have an opportunity in 2025 to take fundamental steps in the direction of reviving and preserving liberty and free government.

It is imperative to make the most of this opportunity in order to pass on the blessings of the American way of life to future generations.

As you may know, Hillsdale College is the only educational institution in the country that is in a strong position to reach and teach millions of Americans about America's founding principles and its great heritage of liberty. And we are expanding our efforts to do just that.

To press forward with our educational mission on behalf of liberty during a critical time for America, we have set an ambitious goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education** in 2025.

[Will you partner with us in defending the cause of liberty and free government nationwide through education with your year-end support and make a generous gift to Hillsdale College today?](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7264177b5bb340eca070d499db59fb71&_e=Ny5F8hskpNKeDk3q_xNiw7XGRyM-F2Lb84zOCEjFXa7YopwjqlDU0nDkq8gUTdovwK_xrYaeh_MsuQgDvUR7krf6osiMz_oaQJjpniTPpxyBXgsPxjUECEZg7ZQTBt6AWr53ifKStppP1SxL6iGcVZ_5USx5YQBKg9qgD_pNwI6XX8ITXiWxVKpl6tfixiVaGV-nFjeR4a9CPz2-sE5tO0tPbfrDU_vszng4oCJVgGrG4Y64FLbMukSZqsi74SzvGiUn_5V50YsF7ICZsxY6TJ9uxwRbsclv8EWQbAKtJaf7ceu2e9qhbpy7EzmW0kTH30D83p9d3aIxFSfpxQAh2OH2ctRncdtHlLQWjXXjv6YuDOiBM1VYdxyM-TY3Re4r)

What all of us do today will have significant consequences for the survival of the American way of life. We have the opportunity to make 2025 a year that future American patriots will look back on with gratitude.

Make no mistake. Powerful forces who seek to undermine our way of life--not only socialist politicians but also the legacy media, the entertainment industry, and Big Tech--will be working tirelessly to undermine liberty and free government, including in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.

Indeed, successfully engaging the Left on the battleground of American education is of fundamental importance if we are to revive and preserve liberty for future generations.

But success will require the faithful and generous support of patriotic Americans like you--citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty in a free republic. [That's why we're asking for your year-end support to continue and expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7264177b5bb340eca070d499db59fb71&_e=Ny5F8hskpNKeDk3q_xNiw7XGRyM-F2Lb84zOCEjFXa7YopwjqlDU0nDkq8gUTdovwK_xrYaeh_MsuQgDvUR7krf6osiMz_oaQJjpniTPpxyBXgsPxjUECEZg7ZQTBt6AWr53ifKStppP1SxL6iGcVZ_5USx5YQBKg9qgD_pNwI6XX8ITXiWxVKpl6tfixiVaGV-nFjeR4a9CPz2-sE5tO0tPbfrDU_vszng4oCJVgGry8rmY2_zSK95Ev2S4vcPbsv4k6P59SIRoQrU6-CwUdDr1MIttSaExCO0UskUy6G77rPKlV08hoROYz2qv6Rr5pp2WN_waJ6v4YFWBQ7mYTuzMJ6doyG7gD-UQQJzXbnfu2D9btKlXUdhuKElky7bu)

**We must do all that we possibly can.**

With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's educational mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this critical time for our nation.

You will help us to ...

* **Reach an additional 600,000 American households and businesses with _Imprimis_ , our monthly digest of liberty.** With your support, we plan to increase the circulation of _Imprimis_ to more than 7 million households and businesses in 2025.
* **Teach citizens nationwide, especially younger Americans, through our FREE online courses.** Your donation will help us to create new online courses and add 900,000 new students in 2025.
* **Restore excellence to American K-12 education.** Your faithful generosity will help us to launch and guide increasing numbers of classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Reading and watching the news reminds us every day that our work is far from finished. America remains deeply divided. The gains we've made on behalf of liberty in recent years are fragile.

**With your help, we will succeed --because we must succeed for our country!**

Hillsdale College **conducts its educational outreach efforts** --as it does all its work--while refusing to accept **one penny** of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

To meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we will need thousands of gifts between **$25** and **$100**. Most of our supporters' contributions are in this range.

We will also need a significant number of **$500** to **$1,000** donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated.

Since we have less than a month remaining to fund this project for 2025, we urgently need your help.

**You can safely and securely renew your support using this link:[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7264177b5bb340eca070d499db59fb71&_e=Ny5F8hskpNKeDk3q_xNiw7XGRyM-F2Lb84zOCEjFXa7YopwjqlDU0nDkq8gUTdovwK_xrYaeh_MsuQgDvUR7krf6osiMz_oaQJjpniTPpxyBXgsPxjUECEZg7ZQTBt6AWr53ifKStppP1SxL6iGcVZ_5USx5YQBKg9qgD_pNwI6XX8ITXiWxVKpl6tfixiVaGV-nFjeR4a9CPz2-sE5tO0tPbfrDU_vszng4oCJVgGqjELIupHLaku39aFKQzHbtOial4UCilbxWfEFOKa7_8AwxrZFmaQxrdLa0cdq4cEVqS0X_me8FCrhsx80q1ZgAVYS-fncAO4NuvQ87U1dVil1RqzFC3aiXrkAzx6TLumIih3sTuRFFumr-yLJrGyGS)**

It is not an exaggeration to say that the future of American liberty and the American way of life depends on the efforts of patriotic Americans over the next few years.

That's why I hope you'll make your most generous year-end gift to Hillsdale College before the **December 31** deadline.

Every dollar you give will get us closer to our **$6,000,000** online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.

Please partner with Hillsdale College to make 2025 a significant turning point in the revival and preservation of the American way of life.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: 4Patriots
subject: Oh no! We're embarrassed...
body:
When you stock up today with this exclusive deal, you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs.

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=56637c5f35ea43bf9caafa8168f3afab&_e=zWdTfsxjTqBnGlT6cNQOkTvKzswf8IjUNGDKHzDb1K0T41jZz-636BnoJ4ji2apxgH6NlYUk6s5cosBCj0Khu3ITPAEfjrW2eCf-_IeU4HBKrpDkfU0FFdwEtnssLfdSY0nv6xTCCrhSsMGZ00iTULjyQ-7EKcxzOKl7-Q0f3uNRud2_5GhAu48ABrsSs_PQOAjjUhEi-2vYptDKwFWdfvHnVB4PB3YXNbXSdKcJlnKYMflD9OJDOofaRkMf5GdtwETaJZFxPOnE6E9xtp8Kqy237HbASqWb44ZQWgtN0QQHSQQBhWSopn3D1pw7vOeb8xZoeDGbZYOTaG6gG43EahCrSmkZNYnKl_fNQSmvAI0JaDf9dP9wS_efK8__kaO8), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=56637c5f35ea43bf9caafa8168f3afab&_e=zWdTfsxjTqBnGlT6cNQOkTvKzswf8IjUNGDKHzDb1K0T41jZz-636BnoJ4ji2apxgH6NlYUk6s5cosBCj0Khu3ITPAEfjrW2eCf-_IeU4HBKrpDkfU0FFdwEtnssLfdSY0nv6xTCCrhSsMGZ00iTULjyQ-7EKcxzOKl7-Q0f3uNRud2_5GhAu48ABrsSs_PQOAjjUhEi-2vYptDKwFWdfvHnVB4PB3YXNbXSdKcJlnLN-Gcaczs3QZwUH3Q9rTlXEKFZ54fFUxFlIjMxw0FrcDjLiV67nX2bTDbnhTWt_SAJOU1oG0D0W5Xb4q18eL8kwBAZ6GBd5N0wolmw0mtVZQvAW5Vt9q371RVyqFJKiy3lqJc-5GoXxEVxlc3TszdO) [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=56637c5f35ea43bf9caafa8168f3afab&_e=zWdTfsxjTqBnGlT6cNQOkTvKzswf8IjUNGDKHzDb1K0T41jZz-636BnoJ4ji2apxgH6NlYUk6s5cosBCj0Khu3ITPAEfjrW2eCf-_IeU4HBKrpDkfU0FFdwEtnssLfdSY0nv6xTCCrhSsMGZ00iTULjyQ-7EKcxzOKl7-Q0f3uNRud2_5GhAu48ABrsSs_PQOAjjUhEi-2vYptDKwFWdfvHnVB4PB3YXNbXSdKcJlnJFkAw5CZeRZGFEww_EZCpYN_h6QLAhtWcNkrnwAjSzEkufnYJjdAnbAOquevuIzpESDquEqbzOiHf2Vr76GxkrPsC0NtZ6NLRMf4dSalBqod9mwSe-HxsrnaQ1_aunEdGH_o5IUAtgtTQFb9JRMb1U) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=56637c5f35ea43bf9caafa8168f3afab&_e=zWdTfsxjTqBnGlT6cNQOkTvKzswf8IjUNGDKHzDb1K0T41jZz-636BnoJ4ji2apxgH6NlYUk6s5cosBCj0Khu3ITPAEfjrW2eCf-_IeU4HBKrpDkfU0FFdwEtnssLfdSY0nv6xTCCrhSsMGZ00iTULjyQ-7EKcxzOKl7-Q0f3uNRud2_5GhAu48ABrsSs_PQOAjjUhEi-2vYptDKwFWdfvHnVB4PB3YXNbXSdKcJlnJlPC5OI57z7tXEQVOZpR5roPOrtMq6ILVmEqaje3lSC64ws7u_HbMhmhspsMfody538Qj0Nt4lhXlBwTeJ39HTZM7yn_Bq2K_yzdseUhDaL5tB9qD5R0CdYrD_M4Q5TDfzzcn8Kk6xFgnFmV0dOBuu) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=56637c5f35ea43bf9caafa8168f3afab&_e=zWdTfsxjTqBnGlT6cNQOkTvKzswf8IjUNGDKHzDb1K0T41jZz-636BnoJ4ji2apxgH6NlYUk6s5cosBCj0Khu3ITPAEfjrW2eCf-_IeU4HBKrpDkfU0FFdwEtnssLfdSY0nv6xTCCrhSsMGZ00iTULjyQ-7EKcxzOKl7-Q0f3uNRud2_5GhAu48ABrsSs_PQOAjjUhEi-2vYptDKwFWdfvHnVB4PB3YXNbXSdKcJlnJ4eVc_vpDvxtXMnotDxofge019Nuoit0yoKXbVbtoMwW_dudRfbMs7MesRGsfyaU0sIBN3p4eXaXYR1v-w_4SE60D0ISFb4RFyI9DYH7HOMbpDez2r9m0UnUSLvaRk6h8Izrc9XkWwxH7YtDBXn9Bw)

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: A new birth of freedom
body:
Our nation is at a crossroads.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acd8060ede1e4f29a03cc964fd2965dd&_e=h-5ylttSLIvP2jmOLJQWTuR7XDYt9q4wdPieKUGxrQ6-yU9iUhlL79yKGsZRVaUS-Q69sZp0pcx87o1_zOKdeeHqYuBJPkbAIvTSkl1Cs2rhouFoyvwjeVFyBM7BIvyNOFu1Nn-hbRGXNoS-hl0CQxny30hJQGiy_VjZZ-yRabm6SjYmvhJidRQBvZo_4bxJQuuYgEoz0bIZ5Ys96J9hw-EBOCJOcc3gpFwIKLSJ2N2KKF_nI4NzX8KiDDoT8EV1rHo7CK3sxhYOMeXNjAt_iFQmx8kvcd3_Go3J9Ldk9tZQ6szp35h9n7MIcJtYzKHsOOA7HioeWZlWkyWkSEfkaCFSOHKEH5RunzTyum4fUGtdqhdNoOT0CMiFG-PiQTBd)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Our nation is at a crossroads. Patriotic Americans have an opportunity in 2025 to take fundamental steps in the direction of reviving and preserving liberty and free government.

It is imperative to make the most of this opportunity in order to pass on the blessings of the American way of life to future generations.

As you may know, Hillsdale College is the only educational institution in the country that is in a strong position to reach and teach millions of Americans about America's founding principles and its great heritage of liberty. And we are expanding our efforts to do just that.

To press forward with our educational mission on behalf of liberty during a critical time for America, we have set an ambitious goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education** in 2025.

[Will you partner with us in defending the cause of liberty and free government nationwide through education with your year-end support and make a generous gift to Hillsdale College today?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acd8060ede1e4f29a03cc964fd2965dd&_e=h-5ylttSLIvP2jmOLJQWTuR7XDYt9q4wdPieKUGxrQ6-yU9iUhlL79yKGsZRVaUS-Q69sZp0pcx87o1_zOKdeeHqYuBJPkbAIvTSkl1Cs2rhouFoyvwjeVFyBM7BIvyNOFu1Nn-hbRGXNoS-hl0CQxny30hJQGiy_VjZZ-yRabm6SjYmvhJidRQBvZo_4bxJQuuYgEoz0bIZ5Ys96J9hw-EBOCJOcc3gpFwIKLSJ2N3w4iDEl0VjsFzcSYX3PXmVF44X5iOLd7DPLrXwaPqAj3c_P1JDbJC59IJ269aCo08_WgUF6XWPu6ODoCrjuSuziW1zHU8c9AFfYcaHiHfHPkjBoE3nmMAGzM4rDU6Vvet605UwHTcjXTi9rLtH6FPv)

What all of us do today will have significant consequences for the survival of the American way of life. We have the opportunity to make 2025 a year that future American patriots will look back on with gratitude.

Make no mistake. Powerful forces who seek to undermine our way of life--not only socialist politicians but also the legacy media, the entertainment industry, and Big Tech--will be working tirelessly to undermine liberty and free government, including in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.

Indeed, successfully engaging the Left on the battleground of American education is of fundamental importance if we are to revive and preserve liberty for future generations.

But success will require the faithful and generous support of patriotic Americans like you--citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty in a free republic. [That's why we're asking for your year-end support to continue and expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acd8060ede1e4f29a03cc964fd2965dd&_e=h-5ylttSLIvP2jmOLJQWTuR7XDYt9q4wdPieKUGxrQ6-yU9iUhlL79yKGsZRVaUS-Q69sZp0pcx87o1_zOKdeeHqYuBJPkbAIvTSkl1Cs2rhouFoyvwjeVFyBM7BIvyNOFu1Nn-hbRGXNoS-hl0CQxny30hJQGiy_VjZZ-yRabm6SjYmvhJidRQBvZo_4bxJQuuYgEoz0bIZ5Ys96J9hw-EBOCJOcc3gpFwIKLSJ2N1rgJQz8sXj75I9ntdnOUkTJZnBnBC2slGNFC2vBH-egtzHbn0MvwtMVnHg0WfTsnOJGPevSd-dpm1k0HpAsNmQ5lXLnOhSrtuMaVVR7bPelci00wJEVPxtNSPBZD0rr7u2cn7OnvZ4-GC4Xdtf-hyw)

**We must do all that we possibly can.**

With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's educational mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this critical time for our nation.

You will help us to ...

* **Reach an additional 600,000 American households and businesses with _Imprimis_ , our monthly digest of liberty.** With your support, we plan to increase the circulation of _Imprimis_ to more than 7 million households and businesses in 2025.
* **Teach citizens nationwide, especially younger Americans, through our FREE online courses.** Your donation will help us to create new online courses and add 900,000 new students in 2025.
* **Restore excellence to American K-12 education.** Your faithful generosity will help us to launch and guide increasing numbers of classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Reading and watching the news reminds us every day that our work is far from finished. America remains deeply divided. The gains we've made on behalf of liberty in recent years are fragile.

**With your help, we will succeed --because we must succeed for our country!**

Hillsdale College **conducts its educational outreach efforts** --as it does all its work--while refusing to accept **one penny** of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

To meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we will need thousands of gifts between **$25** and **$100**. Most of our supporters' contributions are in this range.

We will also need a significant number of **$500** to **$1,000** donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated.

Since we have less than a month remaining to fund this project for 2025, we urgently need your help.

**You can safely and securely renew your support using this link:[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acd8060ede1e4f29a03cc964fd2965dd&_e=h-5ylttSLIvP2jmOLJQWTuR7XDYt9q4wdPieKUGxrQ6-yU9iUhlL79yKGsZRVaUS-Q69sZp0pcx87o1_zOKdeeHqYuBJPkbAIvTSkl1Cs2rhouFoyvwjeVFyBM7BIvyNOFu1Nn-hbRGXNoS-hl0CQxny30hJQGiy_VjZZ-yRabm6SjYmvhJidRQBvZo_4bxJQuuYgEoz0bIZ5Ys96J9hw-EBOCJOcc3gpFwIKLSJ2N1BRsN3BDIY9V6nyJSsKDdlKygF5fNiE64pwCIdhNbIFUcwBC-Nol922CBHREfudrc0XrAIT1If6AUHUsAJRaV66xS8gHbsCJ-u-ENxj-LeGoFrcRe8wtwr-fk-kSmb1IbA0gc25eHgmccKP7pOzfzs)**

It is not an exaggeration to say that the future of American liberty and the American way of life depends on the efforts of patriotic Americans over the next few years.

That's why I hope you'll make your most generous year-end gift to Hillsdale College before the **December 31** deadline.

Every dollar you give will get us closer to our **$6,000,000** online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.

Please partner with Hillsdale College to make 2025 a significant turning point in the revival and preservation of the American way of life.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Conservatives Give
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=acd8060ede1e4f29a03cc964fd2965dd&_t=IBROxslgjKtbrQOhnLKtOuMhs9igtQFou2o_gLycOyPnn6kaVopwTEnaiIfYTiS9TrqWjNxcuWu3nj3vFjAAOxmRqRuiscwgAzlQwtUh4AwXgZB0p9u5OD31NZuvK_0jKh3x_V7DWb4igL7XnFq2yBMOU5Xf2GGIemAMB5vZbQQ%3D)

# Saturday, December 28, 2024
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1895, author and playwright Rose Lewin Franken was born in Gainesville, Texas. The screenplay adaptation of her novel _Claudia_ sold in 1942 for what was then a staggering sum of $187,500. ([More](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0zzGO6yAUQNHVQGcLnsHgguI37vLbKS1iHgEFQwQojnc_mulnA_fqfN22m40p5sd_e6DpH182YCAGDgPozdmYrk1QZ-7MLZyi4WqSk5ZCzjQYjl5op3a9aKGcW3bY4e7dpDQoPXFPo_mJcQDNOcySjUICQzmzRTHhAWciGLrYSx17wI4f23y6yhvruJeDJhN6fzUy_SOwEljP8xx7C7bkFDOOpT4IrMFmdy_lSWDF3GvERmD11eYn5qGWhoMrtfRwDQnPmGk17nXGlGKbFRHscdiYfm_9T_7bwHcAAAD__5kEXf0)) 'Tis the season for end-of-year lists...and [tamales](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kT-PozAUxD-N6UDm-R8pKKKcUt1etdKVkYlfwlOMjbA3hOY--wnI6artRvbMb0b274_LhyVP4f7LDtjm1y1egIMsayihuThLfrnIwrUdd4e6wLY2QolGSaWLvtW6U2Bsp67SOG2arsZGdFxYI_GAYApqV1gN0NQ1aMUrqYCj0vxguLwBaiY5OspxqnKPGV823fwSnzhV1zgUvu1zHhMTRwZnBud5nqu7zZie5D0OmBKG--5lcE45ToSJwXkDlQHnckE7pfIWoyvzZB1liiExOEndcMNAMHH8w8Qx4ysz8eOzx4QMFPBrnMIm-q_02MQ82XFEt-lsB-vXptPo7XVP0O4PNtNzP_lcV-wQWrctFQP9v2m7-fl1fSybOkUKu_tkH2_k2tDZx7t1pty_cc5heO_8l6KQyGFVTK0bZ_KekjZM8vtgyW-Pmb_93WcLfwMAAP__qrmhBg)? ## Tornados, Severe Weather Battering Texas
[Severe weather continues](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2uozAUhJ_GdEb2Mf6hcLENXbbdEjn4ECwZHOEDJG-_2uxtbnHrmfk0-v7cxltIOW2P32FFT6-5jCCg4xI4uDGGlN9j10R_F7GXDXpplVZOd9o0i3ez66e7Uk5Dr6MxYJxV6o7WBmGVNE3y_2ASwEkJRou20yBQG9Fb0c2AhnUCY6Kyt7Qg4SvUOb_LiXs7lbXJfiF6VqZ-MRgYDNd1tWGajgsDLf87DAbcGAwVT9yRfyUMBir7FmLBypdE_IPmuRypprAFHipfj0yJx_Dm37ccT9yI74EoY-WPI898KqESg0FasMq4ZvfxeaWcUzWWdeKxhpQ_j-lHhaeHvwEAAP__UNx1Dg) on the eastern side of Texas through the weekend after tornadoes hit the state Thursday night and into Friday morning. Gov. Greg Abbott [activated emergency response](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00D9vgzAQBfBPYzYj-2LzZ_DQhS1dO6IDH8GqwZF9heTbV4nUsfPT--npfV3HK4YY9tsnbuT4saQRFBipQUI3egzxOZrKu0n5XlfkdHuxl84a21Sra22r5151PdHUTGB62066m9CT0qYzvgruhWmATmtorKqNBUW2UX2rzALUCKPIB0655pWYHliW-EwH5XpOWxXdynwv4vIhYBAwnOdZfz9wf4UChp3OImB41wQMOE2JWeLM4UCmItnTJjOV9JNnKhJXQi_TIgsdlEmehLxSlmGXf0SVnb-fIcZQmlYYddswxPcU_vebw8FvAAAA__-Yv2e5) units on Thursday as the weather threat was taking shape. [Hundreds of flights](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuOKyEQRL8GMizoAYYJCG7izDfdcNRrGg9S21iA_Pj71T60jjY9VSod1dthPWDhcjn9xzPF8ch1BQ1WGVAQ1oSFn6uVKb7rtBhJ0cyTm4KzzsstkjdoAi7aBspzWNB7fzR2sejA2MnLEj_HDEAwBrzTO-tAk_N6mbXNQF5YTamM2nZjo0EP7Jmf9UZtd6xnyXEb49rF9E_AXsD-Tji270zA_kL3_oIv8OvvVUJm7OqnorC0a21DjYY3YpWI8dlVZuybylxrKpeTbDFd74W5dD8Lq09nLPxlM_685xbhIwAA__-AU2a_) were canceled as the weather disrupted holiday travel. The tornados [caused property damage](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LFuwyAUheGnwRsWXMAmA0MXb-na0cJwEyPhEMGtHb99leydj_Qd6f-5zlefcnrcv_2Gjl63MoMAzSVwsHP0KZ-z7qJbRLzIDp0clVHWaDN0q0NtlyWAiip4E4K1ox1AWmXtaGxQY5fcG5MAVkoYjOi1AYFmEJdR6BvgwLTAmKjUnlYkfPl2y2fZsfahbF12K9GzMfXFYGIwHcfRh6U98GjvncG0p4iFwUSlPnws2PiaiH8gTutvbdGffCsVecMdK_IDPa1YOb6eGAgjg6mrLj6PlHNqw8i0uG8-5c8__Rtkd_AXAAD__1BgZD4), but no injuries or widespread damage have been reported thus far.
## Fort Worth Edges Austin in Population
Fort Worth has overtaken Austin as the [fourth-largest city](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAUhJ8Gd1hw-ElcUNzGXW67pUXgECPhEJmTkLz9yum3G2lG80nfz2W5-Fzy_fbfb-joneoCAjSXwOG8RJ_LZ9FDdFcRJzmgkydl1NloY4fVYYoyTkpbE6IJQVn0V2-8gMkqaYIasjvOJMBZSrBGjNqAQGPFdBI6AVqmBcZMdR9pRcK3b6l86gv3MdRtKG4lejSm_jGYGcy99zHVt75jb8eAwXxEBnOqO_Fed1r5w7eGjftno3znVwx1Q57q8-iK32_YiIdMH_7FDbuLj55Lyc2emBa3zefyhdOfNl4OfgMAAP__ts1kGA) in Texas, based on new estimates from the Texas Demographic Center. The estimates indicate that Fort Worth [grew to 989,878](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GOrCAUgOGngQ4DR0AtKG5jN7fd0hwFlAQHI2fH8e03s_3Wf_Il_9djemDK6bn-xz04escygQQtFAjoJ48p35Pm3s3SD4oHp7rWtL3RxvLNtarvEGFGNbd6sX6Odg649BoG1XkceHIfTAH0SoE1stEGZDBWDp3UEYJlWgafqJwNbYHCG2vMd3mFs1nKzrPbiI7K2n8MRgbjdV0NlvxpDEb8rpSewp_lqCKmSJvIeK6hklgS3UIBWBjAqGajPfPT-eNKOadqO6blumP6lTj9uf1y8BMAAP__eTJZpw) residents by January 1, 2024, passing Austin by less than 3,000. Fort Worth [grew by 7.7%](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L1uwyAUxfGnwRsWXPPlgaELW7p2tIi5xKjEWIbYydtXyd75SD8d_X8u08WnnNbbt7-jbc9YJmAgKAcKZgo-5dckumCvLIy8Q8v1IAcjhVTdYjkPYtZReXXVhl3lYOI86GH0AMazILtk3xgHMJyDkqwXEhhKxUbNRARURDAMqZW9bws2fPoa86scuPdzuXfZLq1tlQxfBBwBd55n_3s88D0ScEcKWAi4Fc9KwOUy-0zAfRgCLpa90bPsbaGbrxUr9Y_a0kq3sj2yb6msBByokeoxCKNmTSF6pAINo0YrRhFAMKkYi2Lsdhu2M-WcqtJEsNvdp_x52f7Ndlj4CwAA__-QTmwc) from 2020 to 2024, compared to Austin’s 2.6% growth over the same period. Houston, San Antonio, and Dallas remained in the top three spots.
## Texas Bakeries Make NYT Best List
[Two Texas bakeries](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z71uwyAUxfGnwRvW5fJlDwxdvKVrRwvDdYxKgoVRnLx9leydj_Q7-v9c5otPOd2v3_5Grj3XMiOg4gI5DnP0Kb9m1UW3QBxFR05YqeWglTbd5mIwhmxcxtFqacc4aByCFLigl1oG2SX3xgTiIAQaDb3SCKQNjBbUimSYAoqpldq3jRo9_bHmV3lQ7UO5ddltre0Hk18MJ4bTeZ592Gq5v1eG01pKZDj52lLIxHD6CHyho_HF_1JNdPD7q3EEAKFA9_u2d9XF_Uw5p8NYpuB68yl_7tq__Q-HfwEAAP__7ZJblA) landed on the _New York Times_ list of the best bakeries in the nation for 2024. Houston’s Koffeteria and Austin’s Comadre Panaderia found a spot on the definitive list of 22 bakeries. True to its Texas roots, Koffeteria impressed with its breakfast tacos, while Comadre Panaderia is known for its conchas and cakes. The baking recognition is the latest in Texas’ increased representation in _New York Times_ fine food listings. You can see [more about the bakeries here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z71uwyAUxfGnwRvW5fJlDwxdvKVrRwvDdYxKgoVRnLx9leydj_Q7-v9c5otPOd2v3_5Grj3XMiOg4gI5DnP0Kb9m1UW3QBxFR05YqeWglTbd5mIwhmxcxtFqacc4aByCFLigl1oG2SX3xgTiIAQaDb3SCKQNjBbUimSYAoqpldq3jRo9_bHmV3lQ7UO5ddltre0Hk18MJ4bTeZ592Gq5v1eG01pKZDj52lLIxHD6CHyho_HF_1JNdPD7q3EEAKFA9_u2d9XF_Uw5p8NYpuB68yl_7tq__Q-HfwEAAP__7ZJblA).

Mode can turn your phone from a cost into an income source — and investors are watching the launch of [**the company’s pre-IPO offering.**](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kD-PnDAQRz-N6UD2-A9QuIiEVkqxUbqUyOABLNl4ZWY3u98-IrfX3dW_N0968-c6Xl2IYV9_uYSWnksegYOqBdTQjd6F-BpV5e3EfS8qtKKVWnZaaVNtFlS_dEvbIupJdIL3ywRubrk2aLhAVwV7ygRAJwQYzRulgaM2vG-5WgANUxx9oFwa2pDw6Y4lvvIDSzPnVEW7Ed0OJn8wuDC4hP2BBzUpe0x5ChFP6pzk5U5pPPK9zMjk4FMpuLotJ2RgzimhD_fE5PDbFdqxgKk5fES-idmlmwvrfp6jD7Mj9JhciOPPQRrNP7G8E-7E5MDA0O4SHl9aa3q-S856UFWx_vY3xBgO0zLF11P9P5K-_frDwr8AAAD__2oXguQ) 1 **Mode saw 32,481% revenue growth from 2019 to 2022** , ranking them the #1 overall software company on Deloitte’s most recent fastest-growing companies list. Mode’s flagship product EarnPhone, a budget smartphone, [**has already helped consumers earn & save $325M+**](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kD-PnDAQRz-N6UD2-A9QuIiEVkqxUbqUyOABLNl4ZWY3u98-IrfX3dW_N0968-c6Xl2IYV9_uYSWnksegYOqBdTQjd6F-BpV5e3EfS8qtKKVWnZaaVNtFlS_dEvbIupJdIL3ywRubrk2aLhAVwV7ygRAJwQYzRulgaM2vG-5WgANUxx9oFwa2pDw6Y4lvvIDSzPnVEW7Ed0OJn8wuDC4hP2BBzUpe0x5ChFP6pzk5U5pPPK9zMjk4FMpuLotJ2RgzimhD_fE5PDbFdqxgKk5fES-idmlmwvrfp6jD7Mj9JhciOPPQRrNP7G8E-7E5MDA0O4SHl9aa3q-S856UFWx_vY3xBgO0zLF11P9P5K-_frDwr8AAAD__2oXguQ)**.** **🫴****Mode’s Pre-IPO offering is live at**[**$0.26/share**](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kD-PnDAQRz-N6UD2-A9QuIiEVkqxUbqUyOABLNl4ZWY3u98-IrfX3dW_N0968-c6Xl2IYV9_uYSWnksegYOqBdTQjd6F-BpV5e3EfS8qtKKVWnZaaVNtFlS_dEvbIupJdIL3ywRubrk2aLhAVwV7ygRAJwQYzRulgaM2vG-5WgANUxx9oFwa2pDw6Y4lvvIDSzPnVEW7Ed0OJn8wuDC4hP2BBzUpe0x5ChFP6pzk5U5pPPK9zMjk4FMpuLotJ2RgzimhD_fE5PDbFdqxgKk5fES-idmlmwvrfp6jD7Mj9JhciOPPQRrNP7G8E-7E5MDA0O4SHl9aa3q-S856UFWx_vY3xBgO0zLF11P9P5K-_frDwr8AAAD__2oXguQ), and 20,000+ shareholders already participated in its previous sold-out offering. **We spend over 30 hours a week on smartphones.** Mode monetizes this usage, turning phones into potential income generators. Uber did it to taxis, Airbnb to hotels and now Mode Mobile is doing it to the $1 trillion smartphone industry. The difference this time is that you can [**invest in their pre-IPO offering at just $0.26/share**](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kD-PnDAQRz-N6UD2-A9QuIiEVkqxUbqUyOABLNl4ZWY3u98-IrfX3dW_N0968-c6Xl2IYV9_uYSWnksegYOqBdTQjd6F-BpV5e3EfS8qtKKVWnZaaVNtFlS_dEvbIupJdIL3ywRubrk2aLhAVwV7ygRAJwQYzRulgaM2vG-5WgANUxx9oFwa2pDw6Y4lvvIDSzPnVEW7Ed0OJn8wuDC4hP2BBzUpe0x5ChFP6pzk5U5pPPK9zMjk4FMpuLotJ2RgzimhD_fE5PDbFdqxgKk5fES-idmlmwvrfp6jD7Mj9JhciOPPQRrNP7G8E-7E5MDA0O4SHl9aa3q-S856UFWx_vY3xBgO0zLF11P9P5K-_frDwr8AAAD__2oXguQ). **➤ Harris County:** Former Public Health director Barbie Robinson, fired earlier this year, is now facing three more felony charges, two of which are related to awarding $40 million worth of contracts to previous employers. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: You understand the urgency of the situation
body:
Our nation is at a crossroads.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e62866610d0b435d84c9e80dcf95c601&_e=03PrrlR0uUj_VIUcF2jBmApJAwe4clMwbx_rlVXA5ZpjAUgyPpZC2PCXTJkVhK0LQp91GJ6OxDKyNxbNXKvRyespQ-j_nNza1FuPQYz2CUkGr_JaTkBm_XNIXmnni3rGV6hH5L3J0rczgofZjRYBesMn_mYxsoSU1X87Q6fuUIH-zeexJXi-fOJbMFSdU3zGVGegMVwbb3KKrWuhe5A0C1qA8i7_6usLere_pAfRhnpLdjpl2SoSgQpi2EEcyDfHidhUiSKrLeGX6wz1JuqakFBvj84wXUHT88UUqKRsc-Z6LqtOzXB-t3kVgLIXngl4SdfcAnSnbSJHClTjDZFaMx5rvNh35D7jMwgtCpCxzEtK-18LvocoXt9CpBNfa9kE)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Our nation is at a crossroads. Patriotic Americans have an opportunity in 2025 to take fundamental steps in the direction of reviving and preserving liberty and free government.

It is imperative to make the most of this opportunity in order to pass on the blessings of the American way of life to future generations.

As you may know, Hillsdale College is the only educational institution in the country that is in a strong position to reach and teach millions of Americans about America's founding principles and its great heritage of liberty. And we are expanding our efforts to do just that.

To press forward with our educational mission on behalf of liberty during a critical time for America, we have set an ambitious goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education** in 2025.

[Will you partner with us in defending the cause of liberty and free government nationwide through education with your year-end support and make a generous gift to Hillsdale College today?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e62866610d0b435d84c9e80dcf95c601&_e=03PrrlR0uUj_VIUcF2jBmApJAwe4clMwbx_rlVXA5ZpjAUgyPpZC2PCXTJkVhK0LQp91GJ6OxDKyNxbNXKvRyespQ-j_nNza1FuPQYz2CUkGr_JaTkBm_XNIXmnni3rGV6hH5L3J0rczgofZjRYBesMn_mYxsoSU1X87Q6fuUIH-zeexJXi-fOJbMFSdU3zGVGegMVwbb3KKrWuhe5A0C1qA8i7_6usLere_pAfRhnpr02Xm6yx7iXfOyEQ52VD6oFsDDfHZIukAdh8V6pI2sqWPFv0kbBQOYMf5cKAZpa2_7R7TwU4HC5o1PHR81rgZ6KncXa2MYU0kbDd77VHk7K8NQdiR1WQof0rVFNOhqREAjWs8ZEDdC5nK5oiP6Rel)

What all of us do today will have significant consequences for the survival of the American way of life. We have the opportunity to make 2025 a year that future American patriots will look back on with gratitude.

Make no mistake. Powerful forces who seek to undermine our way of life--not only socialist politicians but also the legacy media, the entertainment industry, and Big Tech--will be working tirelessly to undermine liberty and free government, including in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.

Indeed, successfully engaging the Left on the battleground of American education is of fundamental importance if we are to revive and preserve liberty for future generations.

But success will require the faithful and generous support of patriotic Americans like you--citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty in a free republic. [That's why we're asking for your year-end support to continue and expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e62866610d0b435d84c9e80dcf95c601&_e=03PrrlR0uUj_VIUcF2jBmApJAwe4clMwbx_rlVXA5ZpjAUgyPpZC2PCXTJkVhK0LQp91GJ6OxDKyNxbNXKvRyespQ-j_nNza1FuPQYz2CUkGr_JaTkBm_XNIXmnni3rGV6hH5L3J0rczgofZjRYBesMn_mYxsoSU1X87Q6fuUIH-zeexJXi-fOJbMFSdU3zGVGegMVwbb3KKrWuhe5A0C1qA8i7_6usLere_pAfRhnoMx3GHmvA5Ly_9DwTg7e4y_Hnn6exgNhfipuOlRqRq1rlQch-fJHjBjbayvpg8j5cgqR5oIyusiytBtU5DRa9zwnqzRRKAn6HkIGawSrRjio4_OEcGYg5Iz4KkazqQ8_8k4yiGrXM7mC4MPum9mitg)

**We must do all that we possibly can.**

With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's educational mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this critical time for our nation.

You will help us to ...

* **Reach an additional 600,000 American households and businesses with _Imprimis_ , our monthly digest of liberty.** With your support, we plan to increase the circulation of _Imprimis_ to more than 7 million households and businesses in 2025.
* **Teach citizens nationwide, especially younger Americans, through our FREE online courses.** Your donation will help us to create new online courses and add 900,000 new students in 2025.
* **Restore excellence to American K-12 education.** Your faithful generosity will help us to launch and guide increasing numbers of classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Reading and watching the news reminds us every day that our work is far from finished. America remains deeply divided. The gains we've made on behalf of liberty in recent years are fragile.

**With your help, we will succeed --because we must succeed for our country!**

Hillsdale College **conducts its educational outreach efforts** --as it does all its work--while refusing to accept **one penny** of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

To meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we will need thousands of gifts between **$25** and **$100**. Most of our supporters' contributions are in this range.

We will also need a significant number of **$500** to **$1,000** donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated.

Since we have less than a month remaining to fund this project for 2025, we urgently need your help.

**You can safely and securely renew your support using this link:[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e62866610d0b435d84c9e80dcf95c601&_e=03PrrlR0uUj_VIUcF2jBmApJAwe4clMwbx_rlVXA5ZpjAUgyPpZC2PCXTJkVhK0LQp91GJ6OxDKyNxbNXKvRyespQ-j_nNza1FuPQYz2CUkGr_JaTkBm_XNIXmnni3rGV6hH5L3J0rczgofZjRYBesMn_mYxsoSU1X87Q6fuUIH-zeexJXi-fOJbMFSdU3zGVGegMVwbb3KKrWuhe5A0C1qA8i7_6usLere_pAfRhno0G_UtXjmZEadSE93uUlCP65wy5Oe3QltLE0DpRglnCbMw_--j5EggCa78WEFSo9J8neNEzKH1_U23uegFo6QV2yltu1_PspWDw3f8Aa5KaPNDBairgO9G5Ph9ai4m1ZuQBHGlxnhwXEWntNhBbhRe)**

It is not an exaggeration to say that the future of American liberty and the American way of life depends on the efforts of patriotic Americans over the next few years.

That's why I hope you'll make your most generous year-end gift to Hillsdale College before the **December 31** deadline.

Every dollar you give will get us closer to our **$6,000,000** online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.

Please partner with Hillsdale College to make 2025 a significant turning point in the revival and preservation of the American way of life.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Conservative Liberty Wire
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=e62866610d0b435d84c9e80dcf95c601&_t=ZzDG4R6SwWXAGhCkpVYJQ2Mgo65bsA1zfwzXYqqZQ5Pw9I7c24JwfELigMnzrNse0rGeYT45kR-RSmYPBAS7K8z9cpKasbbrSG4iJ_92jPwB20ItKLzkWQuhKNlfreL2gh8gZYtI1qY30LY09CgCaZyoocgFXWdgOADDoGRACtg%3D)

name: The Flyover
subject: Homelessness Rises, Severe Weather Hits, and New Jersey Sinks
body:
Federal officials reported [an 18% increase in homelessness](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DGP4yAUBOBfY3dYvAc4UFBc4y7XXmmR8LA5YYiAxMq_X2Wbrbb7pJFGo_l3Xa8uppi3v-4g20NZkaNkgAz16l1M71WO3gYiJDGShYtQQqsZ9LhbwNkrDLNxWipuDOeSNIhgQElhgh6j_bQBogYQIPQ0KwBOQUkjvDLcDJKTj73U6X-Jue8U0ru8qE73cozJ7r0_2iD-DLgMuJznOeXbPdPZPvmAy4cDLs_GfrSXgxK1lqk1VmOjxkAzF0Kp3t0Ssb08W8wba3up3W3E6j070EppGKv1jzOmFNt8GSTfDhfT95b-2zcvi18BAAD__0OqZdA) on Friday, citing affordable housing shortages, inflation, stagnant wages, and natural disasters as contributing factors.

| | |

| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GOrCAUANCvgU7DvVwQCorX2M1rtzQoMLKLYhyimb_f7Pb7Ayc5H4_p4XPJ-_O_36JrqU4okDrADs0UfC7viXhwKUaMkkcHg1TSKA2Gr05YOystrUeYvaVBDpgsLWYRKQWtNc_uRwNEAyBBml4rABGTIiuDssIyEjHkVs_-s-a9rTGVd73i2S9148WtrR0vJv8xHBmO93334Zhrue5-j43huJS8fHUgQAIRqg4UkiJU_HThuHMp-aUHRuK5-Vx-zfbX8XL4HQAA__9tu0-T) | |
# Saturday, December 28, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1846, [Iowa](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuhDAQRL_GdEbs2nB24SIN3aVNiQxejo0MRsY6xN9HXJ929DQzej_P4ek58vb69iu5MqcBG9QSUKIZgud4DboKbiZCUhU5eKhWmbYDUy0OSOnOGmgNmtFOytr5Qc0EocNJ6xkrdncbIBoABcrUXQvQ0Nxqq0JrGyt0Q4FLyvVv4q0sNMcrvSnXU1qr6JZS9kOoL4G9wP48z3pLhY60cTr9zQjs93QUgf2dyIWPkvIlP8dloInWkbJEIxe_75ccOZcl-EvedJVd2E-OkY_uIXTzWj3Hz3D5T8Tb4V8AAAD__4-DYI4) became the 29th state when President James K. Polk signed the bill admitting it to the Union. In today's edition, we ask if you have any plans for New Year's Eve. Does your family have any unique traditions for celebrating the new year? Hit reply and let us know! Start the new year with incredible savings on experiences, products, and adventures you'll love--[only on Groupon! ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GOrCAUANCvgU7DvVwQCorX2M1rtzQoMLKLYhyimb_f7Pb7Ayc5H4_p4XPJ-_O_36JrqU4okDrADs0UfC7viXhwKUaMkkcHg1TSKA2Gr05YOystrUeYvaVBDpgsLWYRKQWtNc_uRwNEAyBBml4rABGTIiuDssIyEjHkVs_-s-a9rTGVd73i2S9148WtrR0vJv8xHBmO93334Zhrue5-j43huJS8fHUgQAIRqg4UkiJU_HThuHMp-aUHRuK5-Vx-zfbX8XL4HQAA__9tu0-T)
|
---
## Homelessness Up 18% in 2024
Federal officials reported [an 18% increase in homelessness](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DGP4yAUBOBfY3dYvAc4UFBc4y7XXmmR8LA5YYiAxMq_X2Wbrbb7pJFGo_l3Xa8uppi3v-4g20NZkaNkgAz16l1M71WO3gYiJDGShYtQQqsZ9LhbwNkrDLNxWipuDOeSNIhgQElhgh6j_bQBogYQIPQ0KwBOQUkjvDLcDJKTj73U6X-Jue8U0ru8qE73cozJ7r0_2iD-DLgMuJznOeXbPdPZPvmAy4cDLs_GfrSXgxK1lqk1VmOjxkAzF0Kp3t0Ssb08W8wba3up3W3E6j070EppGKv1jzOmFNt8GSTfDhfT95b-2zcvi18BAAD__0OqZdA) on Friday, citing inflation, stagnant wages, affordable housing shortages, and natural disasters as contributing factors. The Department of Housing and Urban Development collected data earlier this year for its annual report, revealing that [over 771,000 people](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7Fq8zAURp_G3mJ8r2TLGjT88BO6JFvpKBTrKr5Fjoyk2uTtSwodO33Lxzmcj4u9OI78uF_dSqaGZLFHeQI84WS94_i0svUmECGJlgwoMYhpGGFqF0N4u-kgZzfCPM9eqpsOAoUaFEjtPbRsXjRAnAAEiKkbB4CewiC18IPudSN78lxT7j4TP-pCIT7TTrmb09pGs9S6lUb8a_Dc4Pk4jm758t097Q2et0yl_K7NFMkVKnYlz846v3NJmen1eHv_b6_JorQCVZuN3w6OkcuoGtnfV8fxR1f_yt8NfgcAAP__TyhcxA)—approximately 23 out of every 10,000—experienced homelessness. Homelessness among families with children [rose 39% this year](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DFvwyAUBOBfAxsR7wGGDAxd2NK1o-WER6DCITI4Vf595e7dTrrTN9zXZb4spZbH_XNZyY_UZpSoBaBAN8el1PesefSJCElx8mCVUc5M4Hj2V7BJSYk3UldwitDCJLU12k3glE28-EMDRAegQLnTZAAkJaPPKpqzPDMtKZbRttN3K4-RKdV3e9F2urWVV5_HeHamPhgGhmFkyqXWo2MYrnsvD-qdYcjtyHeGwUhjrQaR20qVej8GYu9io1vbosh7ZBj45uPzp9Ra-mSZlvd1KX8qH_898PL4GwAA___czFue), the largest increase on record, while homelessness among veterans decreased by 8% from 2023. Communities in [Dallas, Los Angeles, and Chester County](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuO6yAUAL8Gd1hweBgKitu4y223tFhzHIjARIbE8t-vsv3WI81I83Vbbj7ltN__-4Kub3UBBpJyoGCW4FO-FjkEtyECigEdn4QSRmluhuhABKMnbVZujZ20ZqvaUPqgFAcLygzJfWwcwHAuuDCjVpwz3JS0IijLLJEMQ-r1GB817T3ilq_6xmNcaxmyi70_GxH_CMwE5vM8x8vHWj-UwLzj2QjMvuCRVr_TWAtmbG3H1ujjVZ4YaKiv74w0pHvqjXILk5wkk2PsJQ-HC88z5Zyanohk9-JT_i33v068HfwEAAD__0jfXzY), Pennsylvania, also experienced a significant decrease in their homelessness counts in 2024.
## Severe Weather to Continue this Weekend

At least [three systems are projected](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGO8yAQBOCnwd1GZrEBFxR_4y5_e6WFzBJzAhMBSeS3P3H9dSut5tNovu7b3YYYzsd_m8g0nzcccQKOgHpzNsRrmwZnPBGSGMhwJWahZ8n1cBg9CklKK4XLKJScndZ2IW8l19Jbvg_BdI0jas4FF_omZ85H8vO0CDcv48KmkVxoudy-czjbQT5e-U3ltuc0RHO09qxM_GO4MlzP65lr6y-Ga4cZrhz7rRiurwonfSrDNYUYQz4rZA89AftRQm3JVmjFvilSqZDsBd7uBI6ivSq4F0HLUFsuqSNDMe756VKVik3jI9kQf2u1v2Z6G_wJAAD__z8QaMA) for the Northeast, bringing multiple rounds of rain until the end of the year, with risks of freezing rain and flash flooding. In the West, a slow-moving system is forecasted to settle [over Oregon and California](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuwyAURb8GtiB4D4gZGCpV3tK1o0UAx1TYIENt5e-rZurS9erqHOl83qabSzltjw-3RtvnMgEHeRFwgWEKLuXnJGmwc4wQkUYrrqhwUFoMdLFSBRRGOYN3qSM6iUHftUHjzaz5VdFkf2kCYBACBQ5MKyF4nJU0GJThhkgeQ-plZ18lbX2Jc36WI-7Ml5Vmu_ReG8E3AiOB8TxPdlbPNh8r24pz7FEOAmNIzX-3lsrWCIxL9X8GVpdK8HUh-F7X0Gqguw31TDmnpq9E8sfqUn4Z-38FDgs_AQAA___LCl2z), creating flooding risks in coastal areas and heavy snowfall in the mountains. The added moisture also heightens the potential for rock and mudslides. ## List: Best and Worst Return Policies
A study of various [exchange and return policies](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvhCAYQH8Nbhj5QISBoYvbde1oPPlAGoQL4Nn7903bufvLy8v7uC23NcSQ_Pt6oGkuLzCAoAwoqMWuIb4W0VnjEAF5h4ZNfORqlEx1uxmlwMlpyS2T2kopUN234e4QtvuEfOuC-bExAMUYZ1z1cmRsQDcKze2oB03EgDa0XPrPHFLb0cVXfmLpt3x00eytPSrhbwRmAvN1Xf2WUz0PLAUfubTa5-IJzEdO-CIwF2xnSZUWdGeyleLXtq_JYyUw-zNYpC3TPygkT31wrdJVjQo0KCk0gbkrxj6uEGOociJi8Mca4m9O-2_P08B3AAAA__85R2hF) for this holiday season found that Amazon, Costco, and Target are among the best retailers, while Apple, Best Buy, and Sears rank among the worst. Consumer Reports [collected data](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DGPhCAUBOBfAx1GHsJKQXGN3V57pWHlub4LigF2jf_-4lXXXP0lM5P5uo93T5G256df0dU5jdBCJyQI6MfgKZ5jx4ObEQEVRydvSqteG9nzxQWLVhrr-85Y04KSSlo0Dz8BGG2C5OSuNAnQS6mk6hujpWxx1p1VQdvWsq7FQDXl5jvRVhec45nemJsprTy6pda9MPXBYGAwHMfRHNnHCxkMU9rKa8XMYNBpO9MrFwr4B0TGPeVaxANLFUfKpYolRQr-FBnrK29F7CnSRFhEwElcYxkMPLuwHxQjFXNjXftcPf2W8vrfQ28HPwEAAP__bIFo-g) on top retailers and graded stores on several criteria like return windows, items, fees, and shipping. Flexible return policies helped Amazon, Walmart, and Target receive high ratings, particularly because they do not charge customers for return shipping. In contrast, Best Buy was ranked poorly due to its policy of imposing restocking fees. Consumer Reports provided some tips for returning gifts: keep the receipt, return the item as soon as possible, and if possible, avoid opening the box. [See the complete list of retailers here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvhCAYQH8Nbhj5QISBoYvbde1oPPlAGoQL4Nn7903bufvLy8v7uC23NcSQ_Pt6oGkuLzCAoAwoqMWuIb4W0VnjEAF5h4ZNfORqlEx1uxmlwMlpyS2T2kopUN234e4QtvuEfOuC-bExAMUYZ1z1cmRsQDcKze2oB03EgDa0XPrPHFLb0cVXfmLpt3x00eytPSrhbwRmAvN1Xf2WUz0PLAUfubTa5-IJzEdO-CIwF2xnSZUWdGeyleLXtq_JYyUw-zNYpC3TPygkT31wrdJVjQo0KCk0gbkrxj6uEGOociJi8Mca4m9O-2_P08B3AAAA__85R2hF).

clean_body: Federal officials reported on Friday, citing affordable housing shortages, inflation, stagnant wages, and natural disasters as contributing factors. | | | | | | Saturday, December 28, 2024 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1846, became the 29th state when President James K. Polk signed the bill admitting it to the Union. In today's edition, we ask if you have any plans for New Year's Eve. Does your family have any unique traditions for celebrating the new year? Hit reply and let us know! Start the new year with incredible savings on experiences, products, and adventures you'll love-- | Homelessness Up 18% in 2024 Federal officials reported on Friday, citing inflation, stagnant wages, affordable housing shortages, and natural disasters as contributing factors. The Department of Housing and Urban Development collected data earlier this year for its annual report, revealing that —approximately 23 out of every 10,000—experienced homelessness. Homelessness among families with children , the largest increase on record, while homelessness among veterans decreased by 8% from 2023. Communities in , Pennsylvania, also experienced a significant decrease in their homelessness counts in 2024. Severe Weather to Continue this Weekend Severe weather is in the Northeast, West, and South this weekend, potentially delaying millions during one of the busiest travel periods of the year. At least for the Northeast, bringing multiple rounds of rain until the end of the year, with risks of freezing rain and flash flooding. In the West, a slow-moving system is forecasted to settle , creating flooding risks in coastal areas and heavy snowfall in the mountains. The added moisture also heightens the potential for rock and mudslides. Another round of severe thunderstorms, stretching from , may produce flooding, hail, and tornadoes throughout the weekend, just days after tornadoes struck Texas and Louisiana. List: Best and Worst Return Policies A study of various for this holiday season found that Amazon, Costco, and Target are among the best retailers, while Apple, Best Buy, and Sears rank among the worst. Consumer Reports on top retailers and graded stores on several criteria like return windows, items, fees, and shipping. Flexible return policies helped Amazon, Walmart, and Target receive high ratings, particularly because they do not charge customers for return shipping. In contrast, Best Buy was ranked poorly due to its policy of imposing restocking fees. name: History Facts
subject: Did WWII victory gardens really work?
body:
In the spring of 1942, a new problem was emerging in wartime America: food shortages. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68cbaszmezs2724ugou0ufpsl4re2o9wv7sqsrkip63htt6cz6ux2wuv7u2w5dd5rchfxp2zqwgtte2ixsyl3tmbsdylnnzzlihbeehkal3qeotee446o06m7jtjjlsglbrz0tmq0qpmyq7tl&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp7dp9&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [By 1944, 40% of U.S. produce came from victory gardens.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp7dp9&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [U.S. History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp7dp9&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp7dp9&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| I n the spring of 1942, a new problem was emerging in wartime America: food shortages. Most commercial crops were sent overseas to the troops, and anything left over couldn't be distributed to civilians around the country due to wartime supply chain complications. Food rationing was implemented to remedy the situation, but it did little to curb the hunger pangs of millions of Americans, who turned to a food production plan that had [emerged](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp7dp9&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) decades earlier during World War I. In March 1917, the National War Garden Commission encouraged private citizens to “sow the seeds of victory” and grow produce to feed people at home and abroad. School grounds, vacant lots, and backyards were transformed into bountiful gardens, which became known as “victory gardens.”
---
Victory gardens came back bigger and better than ever during WWII, succeeding thanks to the cooperation of schools, government agencies, businesses, and private civilians. The movement was heavily promoted by the government through propaganda posters and messages, and although victory gardens weren’t mandated, many Americans embraced the idea as a patriotic duty. It didn’t take long for millions of victory gardens to sprout up around the country, producing bushels of carrots, kale, lettuce, beans, cabbage, and other veggies. The gardens came in all shapes and sizes, from tiny window boxes to grow a few tomato plants to large community plots that could feed several families — every bit helped. By 1944, a year before the end of the war, an estimated 20 million victory gardens had produced around [8 million tons](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp7dp9&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) of food for U.S. troops and civilians. Even First Lady Eleanor Roosevelt planted one right on the White House lawn.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp7dp9&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp7dp9&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Sugar was the first food to be rationed in America during WWII.
Food rationing in the U.S. began in May 1942 with sugar. America’s [supply](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp7dp9&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) was depleted by the war, as Japan and Germany attacked major sugar exports. Sugar was followed by coffee in November 1942, and then by a myriad of foods including meats, fats, canned fish, cheese, and canned milk. Soon, tips for “stretching” ration points were printed in newspapers and distributed nationwide. Even restaurants implemented “meatless days,” and black market trading for meat began. Recipes for meat substitutes including nuts, cheeses, and eggs cropped up everywhere. Around this time, boxed dinners such as Kraft’s macaroni and cheese exploded in popularity — parents could feed their entire family for only a few ration points. As the war came to an end in 1945, sugar was the only food product that was still being rationed (at just 4.5 ounces per person per week). Nearly two years later, in June 1947, Americans could finally bake again as sugar restrictions were lifted.

clean_body: In the spring of 1942, a new problem was emerging in wartime America: food shortages. | I n the spring of 1942, a new problem was emerging in wartime America: food shortages. Most commercial crops were sent overseas to the troops, and anything left over couldn't be distributed to civilians around the country due to wartime supply chain complications. Food rationing was implemented to remedy the situation, but it did little to curb the hunger pangs of millions of Americans, who turned to a food production plan that had decades earlier during World War I. In March 1917, the National War Garden Commission encouraged private citizens to “sow the seeds of victory” and grow produce to feed people at home and abroad. School grounds, vacant lots, and backyards were transformed into bountiful gardens, which became known as “victory gardens.” Victory gardens came back bigger and better than ever during WWII, succeeding thanks to the cooperation of schools, government agencies, businesses, and private civilians. The movement was heavily promoted by the government through propaganda posters and messages, and although victory gardens weren’t mandated, many Americans embraced the idea as a patriotic duty. It didn’t take long for millions of victory gardens to sprout up around the country, producing bushels of carrots, kale, lettuce, beans, cabbage, and other veggies. The gardens came in all shapes and sizes, from tiny window boxes to grow a few tomato plants to large community plots that could feed several families — every bit helped. By 1944, a year before the end of the war, an estimated 20 million victory gardens had produced around of food for U.S. troops and civilians. Even First Lady Eleanor Roosevelt planted one right on the White House lawn. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Monthly ration points received for meat, fish, and dairy 64 | | Weight (in pounds) of the world’s heaviest carrot, grown in Minnesota 22.44 | Weight (in pounds) of the world’s heaviest carrot, grown in Minnesota 22.44 | | Estimated percent of U.S. families who had a victory garden during WWII 50% | | Yearly coffee ration (in pounds) per person in 1943 8.5 | Yearly coffee ration (in pounds) per person in 1943 8.5 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- Sugar was the first food to be rationed in America during WWII. Food rationing in the U.S. began in May 1942 with sugar. America’s was depleted by the war, as Japan and Germany attacked major sugar exports. Sugar was followed by coffee in November 1942, and then by a myriad of foods including meats, fats, canned fish, cheese, and canned milk. Soon, tips for “stretching” ration points were printed in newspapers and distributed nationwide. Even restaurants implemented “meatless days,” and black market trading for meat began. Recipes for meat substitutes including nuts, cheeses, and eggs cropped up everywhere. Around this time, boxed dinners such as Kraft’s macaroni and cheese exploded in popularity — parents could feed their entire family for only a few ration points. As the war came to an end in 1945, sugar was the only food product that was still being rationed (at just 4.5 ounces per person per week). Nearly two years later, in June 1947, Americans could finally bake again as sugar restrictions were lifted. The lawlessness and the LAWFARE from the far-Left in New York are about to come to a screeching halt.

President Trump just received a historic SURGE of support in New York in his landslide victory.

After November 2024, no one can deny the tides are changing.

The **_DAY_** **_ONE_** members of our campaign.

| As 2024 winds down**, I want to thank you for the incredible milestones we 've achieved together.** Because of your support, Tea Party Patriots Foundation has educated millions, strengthened election integrity, and built a stronger foundation for freedom. But the work is far from over. **As we look ahead to 2025, your support is vital to continuing the fight to protect our nation 's founding principles. **Together, we can educate Americans about the dangers of Ranked Choice Voting, address government waste, and launch a nationwide educational campaign to prepare for America's 250th birthday in 2026. Your tax-deductible gift before midnight on December 31st will ensure we can continue this critical work in 2025. **Please visit [tpp.me/yearend](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a8a030f2/1edb9794a89f5cc4 "tpp.me/yearend") to make your year-end contribution of any amount you can give.** Let's end 2024 strong and start 2025 with the momentum we need to accomplish our shared goals, and thank you for standing with us to secure the future of freedom. With heartfelt gratitude,
Jenny Beth Martin

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Kash Patel’s Hit List: Guess Who’s On It?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Kash Patel is targeting me and anyone who has boldly stood up to Trump.
| Friend,

It's official. Trump's "Secretary of Retribution" has put me on his hit list. And the reason? For calling out Trump's lies, defending democracy, and refusing to bow to MAGA extremism.

That's right. FBI Director nominee Kash Patel has listed journalists, Capitol police officers, impeachment witnesses, and top Democrats (hi, that's me) as enemies. Their crime? Daring to hold Trump accountable.

You know me. Do you think this is going to stop me?

_Hell no._

I will never back down from exposing Trump and his bloodthirsty followers for the dangers they are to our democracy. **I will never stop fighting for freedom, accountability, and community over chaos.**

But I can't do it alone. **With MAGA extremists targeting me (and anyone who dares to stand up to them), I need to know you have my back.** [Can you split $10 or more between me and Voter Protection Project to fight back?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85757?t=6&akid=18339%2E878179%2E3N8Htm) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Eric Swalwell and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85758?t=7&akid=18339%2E878179%2E3N8Htm)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85759?t=8&akid=18339%2E878179%2E3N8Htm)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85760?t=9&akid=18339%2E878179%2E3N8Htm)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85761?t=10&akid=18339%2E878179%2E3N8Htm)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85762?t=11&akid=18339%2E878179%2E3N8Htm)
2025 will be the ultimate test of our democracy. I'm in this fight for my kids, for you, and for the soul of America.

Let’s get to work,

Eric
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18339%2E878179%2E3N8Htm). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18339%2E878179%2E3N8Htm).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18339%2E878179%2E3N8Htm) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=18339%2E878179%2E3N8Htm). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=18339%2E878179%2E3N8Htm)
---

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: The Road Ahead
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/speakingup-11573606?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend, Over the past two years, Mississippi has seen historic conservative wins – from education funding reform to fund students, not systems, and a bill to combat Critical Race Theory.

But we are only just getting started. **In fact, Mississippi needs many more big strategic changes to stop our state being left behind.**

That is why I am so excited to share with you our latest publication, **A BLUEPRINT FOR MISSISSIPPI. **

The **BLUEPRINT** sets out ten changes we need to continue and accelerate the momentum we’ve all built together, going into next year and beyond. These are homegrown ideas for real change.
Mississippi-specific solutions to improve our state, such as:

** School Choice:** Public-to-public school choice to allow families more choice, and to allow families to control their share of state education funds.

** Tax Cuts:** Allowing Mississippi families to keep more of what they earn and reduce the cost of bureaucracy in our state.

** Anti DEI:** Tackling this extreme ideology that risks dividing our country.

**Certificate of Need repeal:** Removing these restrictions would improve access to healthcare in our state.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=815899b96f&e=5703353baa)
---
You can read the full **BLUEPRINT** [here](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=332993ee02&e=5703353baa)
| As we move into a new year and approach a new legislative session, we have the opportunity to continue delivering conservative policy solutions for the next generation.

We need these changes to take our state to the top!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=1245011d7e&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| _P.S. We will be mailing printed copies of the roadmap to all of our supporters. If you'd like to receive a copy, you can _[**_make an end-of-year, tax-deductible gift today here_** ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=0597e3c0e6&e=5703353baa "https://opportunityarkansas.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9280deb7ef78168a80f7a238d&id=f7213bdfa9&e=72fd246ce6")_and we'll add you to our mailing list!_
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=d0a97a32a2) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=d0a97a32a2).
