name: Erica Henry
subject: This is a disturbing trend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
How to reverse it in 2025? We’re ready. | | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99383395/519762725/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241228trend_N_EH_90DO_10_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE1NmE4YTA1LTI0YzUtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zQgJD01f371Ptr9ZA-rwLvvVdMgdYbWTDYkK4htb69Y=)
---
Hi Peter,

This year, the Center for American Women and Politics (CAWP) released a stunning report: the number of women who ran for Congress in 2024 was **_far less_** than it has been in previous election cycles.

As we near 2025, we cannot afford for this downward trend to continue. We cannot risk losing ground on all the progress women have made over the past century:

[**We want to make sure that number goes back up next year and beyond. Chip in today so we can begin recruiting pro-choice, pro-women women to run for office in 2025! With your help, we can reverse this trend over the next four years. →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99383399/519762734/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241228trend_N_EH_90DO_10_NG_N_L1&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE1NmE4YTA1LTI0YzUtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zQgJD01f371Ptr9ZA-rwLvvVdMgdYbWTDYkK4htb69Y=)

**Let’s look at the numbers:**

Since 2022, the number of women running for federal office is down by 25%. Executive offices at the state level: down by 73%. The number of women running for State legislature is down by 55.4% – and the numbers are even worse when you break it down by race...

**Dangerous laws about women’s bodies are being crafted by rooms full of men across the country. We desperately need more women in those rooms.**

It’s critical that we reverse this trend in the years to come. That’s why Her Bold Move is providing women candidates with the wide range of support they **need** to win their elections.

It’s far more challenging to run for office as a woman than it is for men. Women candidates are more likely to be subjected to sexual harassment, sexism, misogyny, double standards, and even death threats. But electing women to the rooms where decisions about our bodies are being made **__is more important than ever.__** **_We must defend all of the hard-fought progress of the past century._**

Only a century ago, women couldn’t vote.
Only half a century ago, women couldn’t open their own credit cards.
We have come so far in a relatively short time – but that progress took an unbelievable amount of determination and work. It is our duty to protect it.

[**We are working to ensure that women’s hard-fought progress doesn’t disappear. We are beginning to recruit women to run for office NOW. Join us to elect as many pro-choice, pro-_women_ women as possible in the new year by donating $20.25 or more right now. →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-pac/?refcode=EM_F_241228trend_N_EH_90DO_10_NG_N_L2&amount=20.25) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$20.25 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99383403/519762742/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241228trend_N_EH_90DO_10_NG_N__EB20.25&express_lane=true&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE1NmE4YTA1LTI0YzUtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zQgJD01f371Ptr9ZA-rwLvvVdMgdYbWTDYkK4htb69Y=)

Her Bold Move
| | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for office in the United States. Since our founding in 2020, we have supported hundreds of pro-choice, pro-women women candidates across 42 states and counting. As abortion bans and other dangerous laws about women tend to get passed in states with the lowest representation numbers for women in government (4%, 11%, 12%....) we've made it our mission to break the anti-choice male supermajorities in those state legislatures.

clean_body: How to reverse it in 2025? We’re ready. | | | | | = Hi Peter, This year, the Center for American Women and Politics (CAWP) released a stunning report: the number of women who ran for Congress in 2024 was far less than it has been in previous election cycles. As we near 2025, we cannot afford for this downward trend to continue. We cannot risk losing ground on all the progress women have made over the past century: = Let’s look at the numbers: Since 2022, the number of women running for federal office is down by 25%. Executive offices at the state level: down by 73%. The number of women running for State legislature is down by 55.4% – and the numbers are even worse when you break it down by race... Dangerous laws about women’s bodies are being crafted by rooms full of men across the country. We desperately need more women in those rooms. It’s critical that we reverse this trend in the years to come. That’s why Her Bold Move is providing women candidates with the wide range of support they need to win their elections. It’s far more challenging to run for office as a woman than it is for men. Women candidates are more likely to be subjected to sexual harassment, sexism, misogyny, double standards, and even death threats. But electing women to the rooms where decisions about our bodies are being made is more important than ever. We must defend all of the hard-fought progress of the past century. Only a century ago, women couldn’t vote. Only half a century ago, women couldn’t open their own credit cards. We have come so far in a relatively short time – but that progress took an unbelievable amount of determination and work. It is our duty to protect it. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Onward, Erica Henry Senior Political Advisor Her Bold Move | | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for office in the United States. Since our founding in 2020, we have supported hundreds of pro-choice, pro-women women candidates across 42 states and counting. As abortion bans and other dangerous laws about women tend to get passed in states with the lowest representation numbers for women in government (4%, 11%, 12%....) we've made it our mission to break the anti-choice male supermajorities in those state legislatures. Support this work with a contribution today! = | | | | | Paid for by Her Bold Move Action. ## Climate Change Isn’t Making Hurricanes Worse. Here’s Why.
Climate alarmists like President Joe Biden assure us that all we need do to avert the destruction of hurricanes—or at least to lessen it—is to sacrifice offerings to the climate gods by giving up our gas-guzzling internal combustion engines and paying indulgences to Al Gore or something. name: Official Democratic Headquarters
subject: Less than four days
body:
With less than four days left before 2025, we’re running out of time to reach our end-of-quarter fundraising goal.
---
[](https://ak.democrats.org/go/11275?mi_u=22930333&refcode=em_20241228_2433_fr&refcode2=2433.22930333.uBBkUF&t=1&akid=2433%2E22930333%2EuBBkUF) Derek — with less than four days left before 2025, we’re running out of time to reach our end-of-quarter fundraising goal. [**Can we count on you to help us get there?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?refcode=em_20241228_2433_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2433_22930333_uBBkUF&akid=2433%2E22930333%2EuBBkUF) **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?refcode=em_20241228_2433_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2433_22930333_uBBkUF&akid=2433%2E22930333%2EuBBkUF)** With Trump’s inauguration looming and his threats to cut Social Security and Medicare, enact a nationwide abortion ban, and rig the economy for the ultra-wealthy, **so much is at stake.** Trump and his allies would love nothing more than for the millions of people who voted against him to give up and back down. We can’t — and won’t — do that. But the work ahead will not be easy. It’s going to take all of us coming together to hold him and his allies accountable, and stop the worst impulses of a Trump administration and an emboldened Republican Party under his control. [**So please, Derek, will you be one of the 52 supporters from Cresco to chip in ahead of Tuesday’s deadline?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?refcode=em_20241228_2433_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2433_22930333_uBBkUF&akid=2433%2E22930333%2EuBBkUF) **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?refcode=em_20241228_2433_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2433_22930333_uBBkUF&akid=2433%2E22930333%2EuBBkUF)** Thank you for your support, The Democrats

|
---

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Bill Gray
subject: Did you think we’d see...
body:
One of the most effective ways to engage the far-Left on the battlefield of education

_**A message from our sponsor...**_

| | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ea7c1aaff6a2410fac8c705d855957c7&_e=WxsOREeQVsjN2DlglPxoiM1QLW1DOlPrfONAMR9GdfHUlyjHOM-Kt5LUfYxRIbtsTb1DCLA0QqCdlRZ_gK1yLFaSLckiUJhFQC6aOa7XiDiukCwOVNsKgGjH9QIZZrXXuqzWaod0yskgOUgxWEadjIrhEvltTmNbxaj48NnOF6dm-Se704ljACxukyFfqxcwd4GoJjv69jjGpDEFormGQ3FLmS7gOe7-jFMYdYfEqbI1iguLOzsi66sp3PmJfAwU1msEJ-hE3vrylWLnIsNFZOIrUhVfyCdFcPMyiXVg143kyAPOp_7NKI2KbnR3b-9tqif9N2xMEvaSb_fwZQk69xVIWtUyQKr4qP0cY3LgA9zQs5aUvOKQ1GyWEMMFCQyfyaH4J3l1beL2eolK-5QLcw%3D%3D)
---
| |
Peter,

It's cold and quiet in Hillsdale, Michigan today. I hope you're staying warm, and that you and your family are doing well. Our students have headed home for a much-needed break, and I wanted to send you a quick note as we approach the close of 2024.

The end of one year and the beginning of another is a natural time to reflect. When I think back over the year that was, I never could've predicted we'd be where we are today. Did you think we'd see...

Campus protests, legacy media censorship, wars in Europe and the Middle East, and multiple assassination attempts of a presidential candidate?

I certainly didn't!

At the same time...

This year ended with so many Americans showing they haven't given up on this country. A renewed hope is in the air. There is a feeling that we can and will accomplish great things again.

I don't know about you, but when I remember America and its leaders in my prayers, I am so grateful to God to live in a country where the people can still choose those leaders and where we can enjoy so much personal freedom.

Even with the events of the last few years, our country remains "the last, best hope on earth," to quote one of our country's greatest presidents--Abraham Lincoln.

Like America in Lincoln's time, our country is once again going through a time of crisis and division. That's why next year if we're going to restore liberty, we must educate all who wish to learn. [We must make it possible for them to do so for FREE if it is within our power.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ea7c1aaff6a2410fac8c705d855957c7&_e=WxsOREeQVsjN2DlglPxoiM1QLW1DOlPrfONAMR9GdfHUlyjHOM-Kt5LUfYxRIbtsTb1DCLA0QqCdlRZ_gK1yLFaSLckiUJhFQC6aOa7XiDiukCwOVNsKgGjH9QIZZrXXuqzWaod0yskgOUgxWEadjIrhEvltTmNbxaj48NnOF6dm-Se704ljACxukyFfqxcwd4GoJjv69jjGpDEFormGQ3FLmS7gOe7-jFMYdYfEqbL0hTweZG2SbbRohliS0umW6A8en6nR-PNC4ZyqKU2Jf2QidkR1FS0W9iO5wPaJL6CEaGk5D_AZWKV838FDmDpiQyTpVdfj94j1Llh5d0OqwtK1RhwA4Ht_nvce1v7zEy3xvB9wqg9ENCy_4Lchgn6JIdTE9T0-Y23cVeSXTiqRIw%3D%3D)

And that means that you and I must do all we can to teach the next generation the principles of liberty, something that Hillsdale does better than any other college in America.

We're committed to doing this no matter the cost because it's part of our 180-year-old mission to preserve "the blessings of liberty" we enjoy in America.

Our extensive **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education** is one of the most effective ways to engage the far-Left on the battlefield of education.

Through _Imprimis_ , free online courses, the Hillsdale College Podcast Network, and classical K-12 educational outreach, we are "developing minds and improving hearts," one community, one school, one classroom, one student at a time.

And this is multiplied by thousands and thousands...

If possible, could you consider making a generous tax-deductible gift before December 31? Hillsdale's mission is so important, and I know you stand with us. Your timely donation will help us continue to expand these programs in this **critical time for our nation while helping us reach our ambitious year-end fundraising goal.**

**If you 're able, please make your best tax-deductible gift of $50, $100, or even $250 before midnight on December 31. **

**We still have not reached our $6,000,000 goal, and time is running out.**

I've included a secure link for you to see our progress and to make your gift safely:

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ea7c1aaff6a2410fac8c705d855957c7&_e=WxsOREeQVsjN2DlglPxoiM1QLW1DOlPrfONAMR9GdfHUlyjHOM-Kt5LUfYxRIbtsTb1DCLA0QqCdlRZ_gK1yLFaSLckiUJhFQC6aOa7XiDiukCwOVNsKgGjH9QIZZrXXuqzWaod0yskgOUgxWEadjIrhEvltTmNbxaj48NnOF6dm-Se704ljACxukyFfqxcwd4GoJjv69jjGpDEFormGQ3FLmS7gOe7-jFMYdYfEqbJGdiRUPxvhgi5uMnN47v98Rx3cJA296JEvWTbhpgb0qCppf5OaomBvMMz4ZtmXFMABbzyd3DfIIpzj7wwlzGLk6116CXPvFR8EYTwZHhHs_TGUbEsALB4eNt6F0kpkjpcQ4lZmD65Zujrtsznx8nfjXqrCdnre_LJBzlirWcr1SQ%3D%3D)

Please know how thankful I am to have you as a friend. Together, we can educate for liberty in America. Enjoy the rest of your day!

Looking forward to hearing from you,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. There's more that we have to do to secure liberty in America in 2025. That's why we have an ambitious $6,000,000 online fundraising goal. So, would you be willing to make a gift to help reach and teach even more people? Here's a secure link for you to chip in a $50, $100, or even $250 gift:

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ea7c1aaff6a2410fac8c705d855957c7&_e=WxsOREeQVsjN2DlglPxoiM1QLW1DOlPrfONAMR9GdfHUlyjHOM-Kt5LUfYxRIbtsTb1DCLA0QqCdlRZ_gK1yLFaSLckiUJhFQC6aOa7XiDiukCwOVNsKgGjH9QIZZrXXuqzWaod0yskgOUgxWEadjIrhEvltTmNbxaj48NnOF6dm-Se704ljACxukyFfqxcwd4GoJjv69jjGpDEFormGQ3FLmS7gOe7-jFMYdYfEqbIk1yJ-SpQf-vdwnY61iur96YeFdfZwWOrOtyVKv3SHpBDr2Ok1JFPhXb484DIaMA7AYk1TgT4h5GU67YY9s0B6IKODvyiEMosvDSjOknW9VsiPrngxTKnBorD3mqvM_u19LPKm8HAeswZJZGhap5btQ33X6I5QCGt1VYy_M9JTfw%3D%3D)

Thank you!

[Unsubscribe](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=ea7c1aaff6a2410fac8c705d855957c7&_t=DXRGNnCyXmJ-o0Ib9wQKK0NjZ7_bWhwAXpasf_spIo9hRJMt5pRIE9oZpSBAhpzLW9oxttyBB8mV_jIoL_WVYCqIpGEY0jCqf3_BGwg0I71xVRpLhEDzz08mC8nnyCKc)

---

| | When it comes to everyday carry (EDC), there’s no room for compromise.

You need a blade that’s quick, reliable, and built to handle whatever life throws at you. Introducing the **[Yellow Jacket OTF Knife](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19508/6374453/e181da6c78e1a8c9a57aa7913a47466380a4158d/18b856e37da3bf614a8d3af00210e6f3c821913a) **—the ultimate tool for anyone serious about their gear.
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19508/6374453/e181da6c78e1a8c9a57aa7913a47466380a4158d/18b856e37da3bf614a8d3af00210e6f3c821913a)
---
Here’s Why You Need This Knife in Your Arsenal: **> Lightning-Fast Deployment**: With the Out-The-Front (OTF) mechanism, this knife is ready to go in an instant. Perfect for when every second counts. **> Superior Blade Quality**: Crafted with high-quality steel, this blade is sharp, durable, and designed to maintain its edge, making it a reliable companion in any situation. **> Rugged, Tactical Design**: [Built to withstand the toughest conditions, the Yellow Jacket OTF Knife](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19508/6374453/e181da6c78e1a8c9a57aa7913a47466380a4158d/18b856e37da3bf614a8d3af00210e6f3c821913a) is as tough as you are. It’s not just a knife; it’s a statement. **> Compact & Concealable**: Designed to be discreet yet always within reach, it’s the perfect size to fit comfortably in your pocket or clip onto your gear. **Limited Stock Alert:** These knives are in high demand, and we’ve got a limited quantity available. Don’t miss out on owning one of the most versatile and dependable OTF knives on the market. **Special Offer Just for You:** For a limited time, we’re offering an **exclusive discount** to our loyal subscribers. Don’t wait—this deal won’t last forever. [**Claim Your Yellow Jacket OTF Knife Here!**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19508/6374453/e181da6c78e1a8c9a57aa7913a47466380a4158d/18b856e37da3bf614a8d3af00210e6f3c821913a)

This is more than just a knife—it’s a piece of gear you’ll be proud to carry every day. Whether you’re in the field, on the job, or just out and about, the Yellow Jacket OTF Knife is the edge you need.

Stay sharp, stay prepared.

_~John G._ _Gunner Gear_ P.S. **Don’t wait!** Our stock is limited, and once these knives are gone, they’re gone. [Grab yours now before they sell out!](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19508/6374453/e181da6c78e1a8c9a57aa7913a47466380a4158d/18b856e37da3bf614a8d3af00210e6f3c821913a)

name: Team Keith
subject: We had to follow up with you
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter,

We hate to interrupt your Saturday, but our team just met and we wanted to follow up with you personally.

Our fundraising numbers have plummeted since Election Day. If we don’t make up ground soon, we’re going to fall short of our $50,000 end-of-year goal.

We get it. Many of you gave as much time and money as you could spare before the election in November. We know people are exhausted, and we understand why some folks are tuning out right now.

But this is a critical time for our people-powered movement. Our one and only public fundraising deadline is just three days away. Shortly after it passes, local MAGA Republicans emboldened by Donald Trump’s return to the White House will have their best chance yet to gauge our strength heading into the inauguration.

According to our records, you’re still eligible for Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program, but to claim your 2024 refund, you need to take action by 11:59 pm on December 31.

Peter, will you make a fully refundable donation of $75 (or $150 for couples) right now to help our team get back on track and hit the ground running in the New Year?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241228ke?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CHIP IN $25 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241228ke?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
CHIP IN $75 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241228ke?express_lane=true&amount=75&refcode=express_lane_75]
CHIP IN $150 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241228ke?express_lane=true&amount=150&refcode=express_lane_150]
CHIP IN $250 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241228ke?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_250]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241228ke?refcode=other]

Thank you,

Team Keith

You can use your 2024 PCR to contribute up to $75 (or $150 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota.

Please take advantage of your PCR and make a REFUNDABLE $75 DONATION so Keith can continue fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect.

CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241228ke?refcode=body&amount=25]

clean_body: Peter, We hate to interrupt your Saturday, but our team just met and we wanted to follow up with you personally. Our fundraising numbers have plummeted since Election Day. If we don’t make up ground soon, we’re going to fall short of our $50,000 end-of-year goal. We get it. Many of you gave as much time and money as you could spare before the election in November. We know people are exhausted, and we understand why some folks are tuning out right now. But this is a critical time for our people-powered movement. Our one and only public fundraising deadline is just three days away. Shortly after it passes, local MAGA Republicans emboldened by Donald Trump’s return to the White House will have their best chance yet to gauge our strength heading into the inauguration. According to our records, you’re still eligible for Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program, but to claim your 2024 refund, you need to take action by 11:59 pm on December 31. Peter, will you make a fully refundable donation of $75 (or $150 for couples) right now to help our team get back on track and hit the ground running in the New Year? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: CHIP IN $10 NOW [] CHIP IN $25 NOW [] CHIP IN $75 NOW [] CHIP IN $150 NOW [] CHIP IN $250 NOW [] OTHER AMOUNT [] Thank you, Team Keith You can use your 2024 PCR to contribute up to $75 (or $150 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota. Please take advantage of your PCR and make a REFUNDABLE $75 DONATION so Keith can continue fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect. body:
As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4cde40ac6529472398b162e5d5b3b7f5&_e=0ybb6RwzSB-z0UTlTBkQ-OaYEWjKXIm7JDfwL4m5ftR08eUY7JNGqNLyZBV0wGYwVqETQ8oC3oif9G_8htVpCQYTrALNdiwdBobyI9_JQI9XztBHAq-Qqk0vxZ43Ov5r5LGgJKNxDjYsTZkCYTdZApbL_wh34dDxbcdYp8dgAMiXzMyiDWaoq0m7up9S_Q3ByhNRB1DFLU0E4hA0GI7LGsEHF18rwSsaCtIk-e-iE4eDQal8VnDTKgfXgtngsad-7bKHmck6VqwNFQfIq680T0l8gFPfMwfwA9KkxF_2yQCWaETQCaq1ey0Lqk_5hiNJGVKT95VnwYqpEFNIiGSvUdbruwhg3lG5e8jFDy6Jz5li47Gk5r1RAZv1MZm6F6EVoEMeVTVuKt5iwBxaPTnRVws6SN7iFFrU11R6S19UJPw%3D)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4cde40ac6529472398b162e5d5b3b7f5&_e=0ybb6RwzSB-z0UTlTBkQ-OaYEWjKXIm7JDfwL4m5ftR08eUY7JNGqNLyZBV0wGYwVqETQ8oC3oif9G_8htVpCQYTrALNdiwdBobyI9_JQI9XztBHAq-Qqk0vxZ43Ov5r5LGgJKNxDjYsTZkCYTdZApbL_wh34dDxbcdYp8dgAMiXzMyiDWaoq0m7up9S_Q3ByhNRB1DFLU0E4hA0GI7LGsEHF18rwSsaCtIk-e-iE4eDQal8VnDTKgfXgtngsad-vVHI-YkuxvglBOMD46CFRibgxJajqvYLtg1-mXl3_AV6lI_ZXZlAo5BxTSEftG4RhJy5xfCGItkzo9fFhwjKacSYalBShdfZtn8CfrhHZgweREqE0shap-k50bh0ez29z8PZg2BgVvD_MJCeBi3Y7IeBWixsC0Ququ1vewzSZYk%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. body:

Peter, I hope your Christmas was blessed with family bonding and delicious treats! Did you get everything you wanted? Of course, as we get older, the gifts that matter most are not “things.” They are the people we love, and the memories we make together. Our supporters definitely fall into that category! Next month, we have a big legislative session, and TFVC is determined to educate every representative about the harsh realities of vaccine injuries and why informed consent, medical privacy, and vaccine choice should be protected. Your gift of [$250, $75, $50, or even $25](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTQxOTc2OTg3NjA3NTAwMzAxLFwiclwiOjE0MTk3NzAyODY0MTQyNDczN30iLCJzIjoiN2UyOWUzZDUxYjVhNDdhNyJ9) funds our efforts to advocate for a state in which you are free to make the best medical decisions for your family without mandates or coercion.

| | | [ **Give Today!** ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTQxOTc2OTg3NjExNjk0NjA3LFwiclwiOjE0MTk3NzAyODY0MTQyNDczN30iLCJzIjoiYjdlYjBjOTVhY2E0ZDE4NyJ9)
---
|
---
No one should lose a job, education, or right to healthcare over a decision to refuse the jab, and frankly, it’s no one’s business! The MAHA movement has dramatically changed the political landscape, sparking much-needed conversations about vaccine safety and Big Pharma corruption. This February will mark our 10th year of effective advocacy and activism. We hope you will continue to be at our side on this journey to help make Texas a safe haven for medical liberty. We have made so much progress this year, and with your help, we will reach even more individuals, educating them to effectively advocate for pro-medical freedom policies. Together, we can start meaningful conversations and change lives.
|
---
| | | **Gratefully,** **Rebecca Hardy** **President, TFVC**
---|---|---
|
---
P.S. Support Texans for Vaccine Choice before the year ends so we can work towards a healthier Texas in 2025!

body:
[|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/ZQU-5ygGIfUkSlBpD6Thzw~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRpUqF_P0QgaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZXJpY2ZvcmlsbGlub2lzLmNvbS9XA3NwY0IKZ2WKHHBnsq0L8VIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABs~)
| | [](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/YjHbXcPLxAdt7OHVqISZCA~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRpUqF_P0TlaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2VzLXE0LTIwMjQ_~~) Hi Peter - It’s Shawn, Eric’s partner. I hope that you and your family had a fun and relaxing holiday. As we wrap up 2024, I wanted to send you a note to tell you how much we appreciate all of your support over the past four years. Watching so many attacks on his passion for meteorology, and resurgent attacks on our ability to freely be ourselves, Eric saw that our hometown (Rockford) didn't need another politician, they needed someone they trust to help guide them to make good decisions, and cut out the toxicity of today’s politics. **One thing you have to understand: Hate has never been a family value of ours. Love always has.** I know Eric’s love for our place in the world and his decades of putting our neighbors well-being first. It’s genuinely appreciated, but even I wasn’t prepared for just how impassioned the outpouring of support that we received, coming from people across the country. Folks were tired of feeling made to be small and under-_represented._ But in Eric, folks see a glimmer of hope. I want to thank you for the power you have brought to Eric to the campaign. Your energy is what gives us the courage and the strength to keep going, even in the most challenging times. **Now is the time to lead with acceptance, tolerance, and love.** [**Which brings me to my least favorite part of this email. Eric is facing his first end-of-quarter deadline since the election, and if you are able we would sincerely appreciate $3 or more to help us meet our goal, and show everyone that we can lead with compassion and freedoms for everyone. Your support, no matter the size, matters.**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/YjHbXcPLxAdt7OHVqISZCA~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRpUqF_P0TlaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2VzLXE0LTIwMjQ_~~) | **[Donate](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/YjHbXcPLxAdt7OHVqISZCA~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRpUqF_P0TlaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2VzLXE0LTIwMjQ_~~)**
---
Thank you, Peter.
Shawn

Folks were tired of feeling made to be small and under-represented. But in Eric, folks see a glimmer of hope. I want to thank you for the power you have brought to Eric to the campaign. Your energy is what gives us the courage and the strength to keep going, even in the most challenging times. Now is the time to lead with acceptance, tolerance, and love. ~~ | ~~ Thank you, Peter. Shawn | Paid for by Eric Sorensen for Illinois. Eric Sorensen for IllinoisPO Box 1172Moline, IL 61265United States ~ "Website"•~ "Privacy Policy"

name: Emma Brown, Giffords.org
subject: The GIFFORDS community is very special
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I wanted to reach out before the year ends to thank you so much for your support of GIFFORDS and our mission to end gun violence.
#

Hi friends, it’s Emma Brown. I wanted to reach out before the year ends to thank you so much for your support of GIFFORDS and our mission to end gun violence.
When I began as Executive Director of GIFFORDS in January of this year, I already knew how special this organization and community was, and getting to meet so many of you in person this year affirmed that. It was a privilege to travel the country and hear your stories about your connection to the gun violence prevention movement, and belief in the importance of saving lives. GIFFORDS is a team filled with passion and determination, and I’m grateful to have seen that in action this year.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec24.MAKoxe&refcode=em241228-1-b&t=1&akid=9714%2E3935704%2EULKG_g)
At the peak of election season, Gabby and I were on the ground in swing states helping to get out the vote for gun safety candidates. Out of the 341 candidates GIFFORDS endorsed this cycle, up and down the ballot, 86% won their elections. Particularly in a tough year, that is a huge deal and a testament to the strength of our work, and gun violence prevention.
I won’t try to convince you that the next year will be easy. Despite our wins, we must be prepared for the roadblocks that a Republican House and Senate majority will bring and for another four years of Donald Trump in the White House. Here at GIFFORDS, we are hard at work shaping our legislative priorities and ensuring we’re ready to defend our gun safety progress from the MAGA right and its gun lobby backers.
This work is important and lifesaving, and it requires resources. What you may not realize is that unlike the corporate gun lobby, the majority of our fundraising comes from people like you chipping in what they can, when they can.
As we approach our end of year FEC fundraising deadline in just three days, today is one of those times where I am asking for your financial support to fuel GIFFORDS’ work to save lives from gun violence.
[**If you are able to make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today before our December 31st FEC deadline, please use this link or select an amount below. It would mean so much to me, Gabby, and everyone on the team:**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec24.MAKoxe&refcode=em241228-1-b&t=2&akid=9714%2E3935704%2EULKG_g)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-dec24.YP__Dn&amount=3&refcode=em241228-1-b&t=21&akid=9714%2E3935704%2EULKG_g)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-dec24.Tl-4ZJ&refcode=em241228-1-b&t=22&akid=9714%2E3935704%2EULKG_g)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-dec24.Wil-xB&refcode=em241228-1-b&t=23&akid=9714%2E3935704%2EULKG_g)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-dec24.5v9WVG&refcode=em241228-1-b&t=24&akid=9714%2E3935704%2EULKG_g)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-dec24.DV10SI&refcode=em241228-1-b&t=25&akid=9714%2E3935704%2EULKG_g)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-dec24.YP__Dn&refcode=em241228-1-b&t=26&akid=9714%2E3935704%2EULKG_g)**
---
****
Thank you. I hope you and your loved ones are enjoying the holiday season.
All my best,
Emma Brown
Executive Director, GIFFORDS
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec24.MAKoxe&refcode=em241228-1-b&t=27&akid=9714%2E3935704%2EULKG_g)**

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Office of U.S. Senator Raphael Warnock
subject: What we accomplished together in 2024
body:
|
---
Dear Neighbors,

I pray you're enjoying a fulfilling holiday season with your loved ones. As the year and the 118th Congress comes to a close, I wanted to take a moment to reflect on all we have been able to accomplish together.

2024 hasn't been the easiest year for many of us. But time and again I watched Georgians in every corner of the state--from Atlanta to Apalachee to Augusta to Albany--come to the aid of their neighbors and help families and communities find a way forward. Georgians have overcome so much over the past year, which is why I've worked tirelessly to ensure the federal government was giving our state its fair share. As a proud voice for Georgia in the Senate, I look forward to continuing my work to center the people in the public policy coming out of Washington--in 2025 and beyond.

Below are some of my favorite wins and moments from 2024:

**Lowering Costs**
It's no secret that too many Georgians have been struggling because of high costs on everyday goods and services. That's why I've focused sharply in 2024 on working to lower costs and put money back in Georgians' pockets. |
###### _Senator Reverend Warnock meeting Georgians during his January visit to the Georgia State Capitol_
|

* _Airlines_ : [Secured](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16797.19189085.7446221.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.warnock.senate.gov%2fnewsroom%2fpress-releases%2fbreaking-senator-reverend-warnocks-provisions-to-bolster-aviation-workforce-support-georgia-airports-travelers-signed-into-law%2f&redir_log=976973478991291) new protections ensuring fliers get a refund when their flight is cancelled or significantly delayed, and aren't charged extra just to sit together
* _Overdraft Fees_ : Successfully [fought](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16797.19189085.7446221.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.warnock.senate.gov%2fnewsroom%2fpress-releases%2ffollowing-senator-reverend-warnocks-urging-cfpb-announces-termination-of-overdraft-loophole-potentially-saving-american-families-billions%2f&redir_log=275374330741368) to end a rule that allowed banks to collect burdensome overdraft fees, saving Americans an estimated $5 billion annually
* _Student Debt Relief: _Successfully [pushed](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16797.19189085.7446221.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenWarnock%26crop%3d16622QQQ18097525QQQ7444131QQQ14863160%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252fwww.warnock.senate.gov%252fnewsroom%252fpress-releases%252ffollowing-longtime-pressure-from-senator-reverend-warnock-biden-administration-announces-more-than-7-billion-in-additional-student-debt-relief-for-georgians-americans%252f%26redir_log%3d308340258571559&redir_log=558065916922826) President Biden to cancel some $175 billion in student loan debt for roughly 5 million Georgians and Americans.
* _Child Care_ : [Secured](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16797.19189085.7446221.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.warnock.senate.gov%2fnewsroom%2fpress-releases%2ffully-funding-the-government-for-fiscal-year-2024-senator-reverend-warnock-secures-major-investments-for-georgia%2f&redir_log=17707000261176) more $1 billion in new federal investments for child care
* _Hidden Hotel and Concert Fees_ : Successfully [pushed](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16797.19189085.7446221.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.ftc.gov%2fnews-events%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2f2024%2f12%2ffederal-trade-commission-announces-bipartisan-rule-banning-junk-ticket-hotel-fees&redir_log=784275133462983) to keep hotels and live-event ticketing from charging hidden fees

---|---
**In 2025, know I will continue fighting to help Georgians get ahead by:**
* [ Fighting](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16797.19189085.7446221.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenWarnock%26crop%3d16660QQQ18098472QQQ7445060QQQ14863160%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252fgeorgiarecorder.com%252fbriefs%252fwarnock-champions-proposal-to-removal-medical-debt-from-credit-reports-amid-shake-up-in-washington%252f%26redir_log%3d839975714636938&redir_log=930910913542181) to remove medical debt from Georgians' credit scores
* Working to [cap](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16797.19189085.7446221.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fwatch%3fv%3dfI5LNMZiek0&redir_log=454113023866291) the high costs of insulin at $35 a month for everyone who needs it
* Pushing to [close](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16797.19189085.7446221.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.warnock.senate.gov%2fnewsroom%2fpress-releases%2ficymi-senator-reverend-warnock-brings-north-georgia-nurse-to-state-of-the-union-reiterates-call-to-expand-medicaid-for-over-600000-georgians%2f&redir_log=312602772221349) Georgia's health care gap and make affordable health care accessible for more than 640,000 Georgians
* Fighting to make [permanent](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16797.19189085.7446221.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.warnock.senate.gov%2fnewsroom%2fpress-releases%2fwatch-senator-reverend-warnock-chastises-washington-lawmakers-following-failed-vote-to-expand-the-child-tax-credit%2f&redir_log=455733796741194) the expanded Child Tax Credit that sent monthly checks to working class families

---
**Good Georgia Jobs & Workers**
As someone who believes in the dignity of work, I understand that a job is more than a source of income--it can provide a sense of purpose and a pathway to improving Georgians' lives. That's why I've been proud to not only secure funding to help create new good-paying Georgia jobs, but to make sure that Georgians have the skills and training they need to take these new jobs coming to our state.

> _Aviation Jobs_ : [Authorized](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16797.19189085.7446221.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.warnock.senate.gov%2fnewsroom%2fpress-releases%2fsenator-reverend-warnock-secures-major-wins-for-aviation-workforce-georgia-airports-travelers-in-faa-reauthorization%2f&redir_log=513632560091219) DOUBLE the federal funding available to train pilots, aviation mechanics, and aviation manufacturers, helping alleviate the national pilot shortage and creating good-paying jobs in the aviation industry.
|
###### _Senator Reverend Warnock viewing aircraft worked on by students at Savannah Technical College_
---|---
###### _Senator Reverend Warnock during his visit celebrating the federal investment for OFS Fitel in Norcross and Absolics in Covington_
|
> _Advanced Manufacturing Jobs_ : [Secured](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16797.19189085.7446221.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.warnock.senate.gov%2fnewsroom%2fpress-releases%2fsenators-reverend-warnock-ossoff-announce-75-million-in-chips-funding-to-covingtons-absolics-bringing-total-federal-chips-investment-to-up-to-175-million%2f&redir_log=518317738011453) $175 million in federal funding for semiconductor company Absolics in Covington to create over 200 new jobs--and fought to make sure Georgia manufacturers weren't left out of new federal grant money. Plus, worked to make federal investments available to OFS Fitel in Norcross, creating over 100 new local jobs.
**Looking ahead to 2025, I will keep pushing to:**
* _Pathways to Prosperity Act_ : Pass my bipartisan [Pathways to Prosperity Act](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16797.19189085.7446221.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.warnock.senate.gov%2fnewsroom%2fpress-releases%2fsenators-reverend-warnock-braun-leads-bipartisan-legislation-to-move-georgians-into-good-paying-jobs%2f&redir_log=300277701821098) that will create public-private partnerships to allow Georgians to work at Georgia companies while they earn a technical degree.
* _Workforce Development_ : Strengthen federal workforce development programs and direct those investments to boost workforce training, recruitment and retention efforts across industries in every corner of the state.

---
**Working for Rural Georgia**
With parents from Screven County and Ware County, my roots run deep in rural Georgia's soil. That's why I've worked over the course of 2024 to deliver for rural Georgians.

###### _Senator Reverend Warnock before giving the commencement speech at Albany State University_
###### _Senator Reverend Warnock and members of his staff assisting Georgians in the aftermath of Hurricane Helene_
|
* _Relief for Farmers_ : [Secured](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16797.19189085.7446221.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.warnock.senate.gov%2fnewsroom%2fpress-releases%2fsenator-reverend-warnock-secures-disaster-relief-farmer-aid-in-short-term-funding-bill%2f&redir_log=740176953744995) tens of millions in relief for Georgia's farmers to help keep their heads above water, as well as additional funds to farmers impacted by Hurricane Helene.
* _Hurricane Helene Recovery_ : Held [community clinics](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16797.19189085.7446221.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fx.com%2fSenatorWarnock%2fstatus%2f1858630420083958180&redir_log=011261069161333) to provide in-person support to Georgians navigating the federal disaster assistance process and secured over $250 million in federal dollars for Georgians with millions more on the way
* _Rural Broadband_ : Secured $1.3 billion in federal dollars to [expand](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16797.19189085.7446221.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.warnock.senate.gov%2fnewsroom%2fpress-releases%2fvideo-senator-reverend-warnock-announces-historic-1-3-billion-investment-in-georgia-broadband-expansion%2f&redir_log=415841737911115) broadband and close the digital divide across Georgia, especially in rural areas

---|---

**Making Washington Work for YOU**
From day one, I've directed my staff to make your issues with federal agencies a top priority, from helping with Medicare claims, to getting you a passport on time, to helping navigate the complexities of Veteran Affairs or the Social Security Administration--and everything in between. And in 2024, Team Warnock did just that.

###### _Senator Reverend Warnock greeting Valdosta students visiting Washington, DC_
|
* Closed **11,200 cases** of Georgians seeking assistance from federal agencies
* Responded to **over 300,000** phone, email, and mail inquiries from constituents
* Hosted **7 Community Resources Clinics** to provide Georgians with in-person assistance

---|---
**In 2025 my commitment to delivering for Georgians in every corner of the state will not waver.** For more information on how my office can help you, [CLICK HERE](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16797.19189085.7446221.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.warnock.senate.gov%2fcontact%2fcontact-form%2f%3fpath%3dhelp&redir_log=904232600857435).
---

**My 2024 in Review**
Lastly, whether I was sitting down with trusted Georgia journalists to discuss how I'm working across the aisle in Washington to deliver for Georgia as the nation's 14th [most bipartisan Senator](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16797.19189085.7446221.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.warnock.senate.gov%2fnewsroom%2fpress-releases%2frenowned-lugar-center-ranks-senator-reverend-warnock-as-14th-most-bipartisan-senator%2f&redir_log=363222031378982), or taking PBS to my childhood home in Savannah, Georgia to talk about the values that inspire my service, I had some great chats this past year about how I'm fighting for Georgia in Washington, and about my hopes for the future of our state and country. I hope you take a moment for some of these important conversations I've had over 2024.

###### _Senator Reverend Warnock addresses the Georgia State Senate_
|

* Atlanta Journal Constitution: [Opinion: Without reelectio looming, Warnock dives into the grind of lawmaking](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16797.19189085.7446221.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.ajc.com%2fpolitics%2fopinion-without-reelection-looming-warnock-dives-into-the-grind-of-lawmaking%2fTOLC3GRJNFHGLKFD3LBXGSYTIE%2f&redir_log=46918911116888)
* PBS: [Breaking Bread with Raphael Warnock in Savannah, Georgia](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16797.19189085.7446221.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.wgbh.org%2ftv-shows%2fopen-mind%2fthe-reverend-senator-9vdpct&redir_log=335867507913471)
* The New Yorker: [Senator Raphael Warnock on America's "Moral and Spiritual Battle"](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16797.19189085.7446221.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.newyorker.com%2fpodcast%2fthe-new-yorker-radio-hour%2fsenator-raphael-warnock-on-americas-moral-and-spiritual-battle&redir_log=613575974595859)
* Politically Georgia: [U.S. Sen. Raphael Warnock maintains balancing act between politics and ministry](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16797.19189085.7446221.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.ajc.com%2fpolitics%2fus-sen-raphael-warnock-maintains-balancing-act-between-politics-and-ministry%2f3KRM3J7FSNDLNKJAPZ4QSLOZ4Y%2f&redir_log=21847709089889)
* The Axe Files: [Sit Down with Senator Raphael Warnock](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16797.19189085.7446221.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fpodcasts.apple.com%2fus%2fpodcast%2fep-567-sen-raphael-warnock%2fid1043593599%3fi%3d1000644608368&redir_log=369845196277571)

---|---

I still pinch myself when I think about how lucky I am to represent the people of Georgia in the U.S. Senate. Please know that every day I'm working to center the people in the policies coming out of Washington, as we work to create a beloved community where all of God's children have the support and resources they need to thrive, no matter who they are or where they come from.

I still believe Dr. King was right when he said, "we are caught in an inescapable network of mutuality, tied in a single garment of destiny; whatever affects one directly affects all indirectly." Know that in 2025 and beyond, I will keep fighting to deliver for you and your family, and all Georgians in every corner of our state.

May peace be with you through the remainder of the holiday season, and here's wishing you and your families a happy and healthy New Year!

Keep the Faith,

U.S. Senator Reverend Raphael Warnock

| This is official correspondence from the Office of Senator Reverend Raphael Warnock. If you have any questions, please contact our office [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16797.19189085.7446221.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.warnock.senate.gov%2fcontact%2fcontact-form%2f&redir_log=51402161759365).
If you need help with a federal agency, please click [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16797.19189085.7446221.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.warnock.senate.gov%2fcontact%2fcontact-form%2f%3fpath%3dhelp&redir_log=904232600857435).

PRIVACY POLICY: Your e-mail address will not be shared with anyone else or sold in any way.
TO UNSUBSCRIBE, PLEASE CLICK [HERE](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16797.19189085.7446221.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.warnock.senate.gov%2fcontact%2fnewsletter-signup%2funsubscribe%2f&redir_log=564209011866492).
---

Below are some of my favorite wins and moments from 2024: Lowering Costs It's no secret that too many Georgians have been struggling because of high costs on everyday goods and services. That's why I've focused sharply in 2024 on working to lower costs and put money back in Georgians' pockets. | Senator Reverend Warnock meeting Georgians during his January visit to the Georgia State Capitol | Airlines : new protections ensuring fliers get a refund when their flight is cancelled or significantly delayed, and aren't charged extra just to sit together Overdraft Fees : Successfully to end a rule that allowed banks to collect burdensome overdraft fees, saving Americans an estimated $5 billion annually Student Debt Relief: Successfully President Biden to cancel some $175 billion in student loan debt for roughly 5 million Georgians and Americans. Child Care : more $1 billion in new federal investments for child care Hidden Hotel and Concert Fees : Successfully to keep hotels and live-event ticketing from charging hidden fees ---|--- In 2025, know I will continue fighting to help Georgians get ahead by: to remove medical debt from Georgians' credit scores Working to the high costs of insulin at $35 a month for everyone who needs it Pushing to Georgia's health care gap and make affordable health care accessible for more than 640,000 Georgians Fighting to make the expanded Child Tax Credit that sent monthly checks to working class families Good Georgia Jobs & Workers As someone who believes in the dignity of work, I understand that a job is more than a source of income--it can provide a sense of purpose and a pathway to improving Georgians' lives. That's why I've been proud to not only secure funding to help create new good-paying Georgia jobs, but to make sure that Georgians have the skills and training they need to take these new jobs coming to our state. Aviation Jobs : DOUBLE the federal funding available to train pilots, aviation mechanics, and aviation manufacturers, helping alleviate the national pilot shortage and creating good-paying jobs in the aviation industry. | Senator Reverend Warnock viewing aircraft worked on by students at Savannah Technical College ---|--- Senator Reverend Warnock during his visit celebrating the federal investment for OFS Fitel in Norcross and Absolics in Covington | Advanced Manufacturing Jobs : $175 million in federal funding for semiconductor company Absolics in Covington to create over 200 new jobs--and fought to make sure Georgia manufacturers weren't left out of new federal grant money. Plus, worked to make federal investments available to OFS Fitel in Norcross, creating over 100 new local jobs. Looking ahead to 2025, I will keep pushing to: Pathways to Prosperity Act : Pass my bipartisan that will create public-private partnerships to allow Georgians to work at Georgia companies while they earn a technical degree. Workforce Development : Strengthen federal workforce development programs and direct those investments to boost workforce training, recruitment and retention efforts across industries in every corner of the state. Working for Rural Georgia With parents from Screven County and Ware County, my roots run deep in rural Georgia's soil. That's why I've worked over the course of 2024 to deliver for rural Georgians. Senator Reverend Warnock before giving the commencement speech at Albany State University Senator Reverend Warnock and members of his staff assisting Georgians in the aftermath of Hurricane Helene | Relief for Farmers : tens of millions in relief for Georgia's farmers to help keep their heads above water, as well as additional funds to farmers impacted by Hurricane Helene. Hurricane Helene Recovery : Held to provide in-person support to Georgians navigating the federal disaster assistance process and secured over $250 million in federal dollars for Georgians with millions more on the way Rural Broadband : Secured $1.3 billion in federal dollars to broadband and close the digital divide across Georgia, especially in rural areas ---|--- Making Washington Work for YOU From day one, I've directed my staff to make your issues with federal agencies a top priority, from helping with Medicare claims, to getting you a passport on time, to helping navigate the complexities of Veteran Affairs or the Social Security Administration--and everything in between. And in 2024, Team Warnock did just that. Senator Reverend Warnock greeting Valdosta students visiting Washington, DC | Closed 11,200 cases of Georgians seeking assistance from federal agencies Responded to over 300,000 phone, email, and mail inquiries from constituents Hosted 7 Community Resources Clinics to provide Georgians with in-person assistance ---|--- In 2025 my commitment to delivering for Georgians in every corner of the state will not waver. For more information on how my office can help you, . My 2024 in Review Lastly, whether I was sitting down with trusted Georgia journalists to discuss how I'm working across the aisle in Washington to deliver for Georgia as the nation's 14th , or taking PBS to my childhood home in Savannah, Georgia to talk about the values that inspire my service, I had some great chats this past year about how I'm fighting for Georgia in Washington, and about my hopes for the future of our state and country. I hope you take a moment for some of these important conversations I've had over 2024. Senator Reverend Warnock addresses the Georgia State Senate | Atlanta Journal Constitution: PBS: The New Yorker: Politically Georgia: The Axe Files: ---|--- I still pinch myself when I think about how lucky I am to represent the people of Georgia in the U.S. Senate. Please know that every day I'm working to center the people in the policies coming out of Washington, as we work to create a beloved community where all of God's children have the support and resources they need to thrive, no matter who they are or where they come from. I still believe Dr. King was right when he said, "we are caught in an inescapable network of mutuality, tied in a single garment of destiny; whatever affects one directly affects all indirectly." Know that in 2025 and beyond, I will keep fighting to deliver for you and your family, and all Georgians in every corner of our state. May peace be with you through the remainder of the holiday season, and here's wishing you and your families a happy and healthy New Year! Keep the Faith, U.S. Senator Reverend Raphael Warnock | This is official correspondence from the Office of Senator Reverend Raphael Warnock. If you have any questions, please contact our office . If you need help with a federal agency, please click .

**_Begin Forwarded Message from Gabe Vasquez:_**
I hope your holiday season has been filled with celebration and relaxation.
2025 is just four days away, and I’m feeling reflective. 2024 has been a whirlwind of a ride, to say the least.
It’s been an unprecedented year from start to end, and I know many of us are still processing the results of the presidential election. Despite the results of the presidential election, I can’t help but feel grateful that folks like you helped us hold NM-02 blue for two consecutive terms for the first time in over 40 years.
But truth be told, we have a lot of work ahead of us, folks. As we enter another term under Donald Trump, we have to be prepared for every possible curveball Republicans could throw our way.
We’ve proven that Team Vasquez is a winning machine, and that makes us a TOP target of national Republicans.
Our final FEC reporting deadline of 2024 is on New Year’s Eve at midnight, and we’ve set an end-of-year fundraising goal of **$15,000** — that’s what it’s going to take to win the fight for freedom, democracy, reproductive rights and New Mexico.
[Your support will go a long way. Will you make a donation of any amount to support my work and help us reach our $15,000 end-of-year goal before Tuesday at midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99399946/519803080/646161803?amount=10&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_122824_1_2_EOY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Nzg1MzliMi0zMmM1LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HRdfPqJ-eyaEKr7zdhsHjKO3rPD4IMvCbWZVIJI0zx4=)

clean_body: We know it’s been a crazy year so far, but we need your help one last time before we ring in the new year. Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Did you see Gabe’s message from yesterday? We know it’s been a crazy year so far, but we need your help one last time before we ring in the new year. You gave us the resources to win in a Trump district in 2024, and you’re going to be the key to winning whatever battles he throws our way in 2025 and 2026. = | | = Begin Forwarded Message from Gabe Vasquez: I hope your holiday season has been filled with celebration and relaxation. 2025 is just four days away, and I’m feeling reflective. 2024 has been a whirlwind of a ride, to say the least. It’s been an unprecedented year from start to end, and I know many of us are still processing the results of the presidential election. Despite the results of the presidential election, I can’t help but feel grateful that folks like you helped us hold NM-02 blue for two consecutive terms for the first time in over 40 years. But truth be told, we have a lot of work ahead of us, folks. As we enter another term under Donald Trump, we have to be prepared for every possible curveball Republicans could throw our way. We’ve proven that Team Vasquez is a winning machine, and that makes us a TOP target of national Republicans. Our final FEC reporting deadline of 2024 is on New Year’s Eve at midnight, and we’ve set an end-of-year fundraising goal of $15,000 — that’s what it’s going to take to win the fight for freedom, democracy, reproductive rights and New Mexico. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Gracias, Gabe | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.** | = = Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: To receive less email from Gabe Vasquez for Congress, . subject: Grateful is an understatement, Derek.

body:
|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99400556/519804102/-52086822?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_EOY_241228_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWExMmVmOS0zMmM1LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0UIbfj4GecRe1L3l8zXbZHVJV9NdP_pAOWIalFwUozQ=) Derek,

First of all, I want to say thank you to everyone who signed my birthday card. Reading your kind messages truly is the highlight of my year, every year.

I also want to say thank you for all of your support this year. I know we took some tough losses in the election, but I think it’s important we celebrate our wins. Because of your support, we were able to reelect Virginia’s own Tim Kaine to the Senate and send Suhas Subramanyam and Eugene Vindman to the House. And we played a role in protecting other critical Senate seats, like Jacky Rosen’s in Nevada and Tammy Baldwin in Wisconsin. It’s all thanks to you, Derek.

As we look forward to 2025 and prepare for the year ahead, the first thing on my list is the Commonwealth’s special election on January 7th, where voters will decide whether we protect our Democratic majority in both the State Senate and the House of Delegates.

I’ll be frank: under a Trump administration and a Republican-controlled Congress, keeping our General Assembly blue as our line of defense is the most important thing we can do right now.

[_**So I’m asking: can I count on you to do the same thing you did this year and help me elect Democratic champions, right here at home? Chip in before our end-of-year fundraising deadline so we can secure the resources we need to get it done >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99400557/519804109/-52086822?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_EOY_241228_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWExMmVmOS0zMmM1LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0UIbfj4GecRe1L3l8zXbZHVJV9NdP_pAOWIalFwUozQ=)

Thank you for being on this team,

Mark Warner

But we also must stand up against extremism when necessary, which includes laying the groundwork for the midterm elections now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = This has been a long year, but I remain dedicated to the people of Rhode Island every single day. We have so much more work to do together – to build an economy that works for working people, and to protect our democracy from the extremists who want to divide us. = Thank you, Seth | = PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress PO BOX 40993, PROVIDENCE, RI 02940 If you’d like to unsubscribe, . You can also =.

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: They think you’re dumb
body:
Are you fed up with leftist global elites?

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=8d5068613fad4da8af5b71d736b0e94a&_t=3keHDblJy2hR7nzIyBNhr83-7vzk05OmeL8fq3xCZT-8W48EQuo65QIEqy0mHZ9CSfEthRSF1ji2Qf-Gt10kciiJpDzvpzzYU-5rfl-EivW-DBrMFskaMgiwMsY17cg9)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=8d5068613fad4da8af5b71d736b0e94a&_e=I6qIV5MY8iciArhqKB1E0NUjnNPfrn31Pc8lGZw0Gzr4iqiJHV3mHbI4m6ko5VF4bm9iHLEzdF_lqjd0nx74OOdHABa6kEy5815TegbAlmZ8m6zqrfYVbTtb5fqQeyWuB7Ld8zXikXHJqyIkTpwR9Mg13K-TXlG7Cuns6ic9GuvEtl1t4UMSGetsaBJNFQ72fHaVXOS-XEoCe0X4QytHQSlK2H_FyMI4X_Xr49HybGSkId4ZMe6AZtWuaGIwlpwyZbb7ohPvxHpUk9e46aHVBJuWvMzG8D0zbg8MjPuaCSfegjq4nqQf5WQdbOA2aCtAK_M6pc4vH0M3T35uD4jklN1j6NBcUrCNFTp705Wkfs8%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

Are you fed up with leftist global elites?

I think they're a bunch of hypocritical self-avowed Marxists, private-jet environmentalists, and genocide-adjacent humanitarians.

November's election results proved that the American people are fed up with leftist elites who want to take away your liberty and destroy our nation's prosperity, security, and American way of life.

[**But you can help stop the leftist elites ' agenda today.**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=8d5068613fad4da8af5b71d736b0e94a&_e=I6qIV5MY8iciArhqKB1E0NUjnNPfrn31Pc8lGZw0Gzr4iqiJHV3mHbI4m6ko5VF4bm9iHLEzdF_lqjd0nx74OOdHABa6kEy5815TegbAlmZ8m6zqrfYVbTtb5fqQeyWuB7Ld8zXikXHJqyIkTpwR9Mg13K-TXlG7Cuns6ic9GuvEtl1t4UMSGetsaBJNFQ72fHaVXOS-XEoCe0X4QytHQdxoy-dselDfOz3_hIn-2zUB3aIlbIo0GL6Pg5gkGhUfnaHsJgYuI1Xu6RSGg1TyMBJVvYMTPiDGxMsgV55ZAXSXidFaPLm2fMnPXemiRKHkMxTD-wWr_yWipG0JII6Ft5GIRfYe6T402SWbY6Odb-k%3D)

I told the leftist elites at the World Economic Forum that the next administration should compile a list of everything that's ever been proposed at the World Economic Forum and object to all of them, wholesale.

With the new administration arriving in a few short weeks, you and I need to act right now to do just that.

Your year-end gift to The Heritage Foundation will help:
* Create and promote public policies that put America first and reject globalism.
* Dismantle the administrative state, whose leftist bureaucrats want to push globalism, not help the American people.
* Educate millions of Americans on the dangers of globalism.

**Please make your year-end gift and activate your Heritage Foundation membership to help stop leftist globalism using the secure link below.**

body:
We wanted to share some highlights from 2024 with you.| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99401584/519807855/642808054?refcode=EM_F_241228highlights_N_NPPEF_10_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk5NzM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE1ODE5NGM4LTM0YzUtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pjjSwdCvf-o6mtoiRFTUMFO02XITwlwgS7MhLScZxzo=)
---
| | Friend,

As we near the end of the year, we wanted to share some highlights from 2024 with you.

**But first, we are falling short of our critical year-end goal that would enable us to sustain our work in 2025 and beyond.**[**Will you consider chipping in a MATCHED $25 contribution today and have DOUBLE the impact?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99401585/519807857/645888246?refcode=EM_F_241228highlights_N_NPPEF_10_NG_N_L1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk5NzM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE1ODE5NGM4LTM0YzUtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pjjSwdCvf-o6mtoiRFTUMFO02XITwlwgS7MhLScZxzo=)

Since 2021, The New PA Project Education Fund, along with the affiliated New Pennsylvania Project, has assisted more than 48,000 Pennsylvanians in registering to vote and making their voices heard at the ballot box. This year alone, NPPEF and NPP assisted more than 13,000 Pennsylvanians in registering to vote, 74% of voters self-identified as belonging to a community of color.

We focused in key regions across the Commonwealth including: Philadelphia, Lancaster, Cumberland, Dauphin, Montgomery, Chester, Delaware, Bucks, Northampton, Lehigh, Monroe, Berks, and Allegheny counties. And thanks to your support, we were able to expand into additional rural/exurban counties, including Centre, York, Lackawanna, Beaver, Lawrence, Luzerne, Lebanon and Erie counties.
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99401591/519807860/642808054?refcode=EM_F_241228highlights_N_NPPEF_10_NG_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk5NzM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE1ODE5NGM4LTM0YzUtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pjjSwdCvf-o6mtoiRFTUMFO02XITwlwgS7MhLScZxzo=)
---
And that’s not all. The NPPEF team also worked hard to protect the right to vote in PA. New PA Project Education Fund joined the ACLU of Pennsylvania, Public Interest Law Center, and other pro-voter organizations in a lawsuit against the Pennsylvania Department of State and Secretary of State Al Schmidt, in his formal capacity in _Black Political Empowerment Project v. Schmidt_ to demand an end to the disqualification of mail-in ballots for inconsequential date errors. The Commonwealth Court ruled on August 30, 2024 ruled in favor of the pro-voter good government groups, ensuring incorrectly dated ballots would still be counted. Weeks later, by a 4-3 decision, the PA Supreme Court voided the PA Commonwealth Court’s ruling, citing lower court jurisdiction, and not on the merits of the underlying claim. On October 5th, the PA Supreme Court refused to hear _New PA Project Education Fund v. Al Schmidt_ , King’s Bench case without reaching the merits.

In February, Why Courts Matter - PA campaign joined NPPEF. Why Courts Matter - Pennsylvania, is an advocacy project seeking to protect the independence of our state and federal courts, and educate the electorate about their importance.

Finally, with your help, we were able to organize and execute more than 200 community engagement events, maintained a staff of 65+ part-time and full-time community leaders, develop more than 50 partnerships with like-minded community organizations, and run robust engagement programs on college campuses and universities.

Creating change does not happen overnight. It takes strategic and consistent effort to move PA forward. We are proud of all that we have accomplished. Now, we need your help to keep up year-round voter engagement heading in 2025 and beyond.

[**Friend, will you help us hit our end-of-year fundraising goal and take advantage of a $25,000 match so we can hit the ground running in the new year by pitching in $25 or whatever you can today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99401598/519807877/645888246?refcode=EM_F_241228highlights_N_NPPEF_10_NG_N_L1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk5NzM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE1ODE5NGM4LTM0YzUtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pjjSwdCvf-o6mtoiRFTUMFO02XITwlwgS7MhLScZxzo=)
---

[Donate other = Have 2X the impact](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99401619/519807903/645888246?refcode=EM_F_241228highlights_N_NPPEF_10_NG_N_EBother&express_lane=true&amount=other&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk5NzM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE1ODE5NGM4LTM0YzUtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pjjSwdCvf-o6mtoiRFTUMFO02XITwlwgS7MhLScZxzo=)

Together,

Team NPPEF
---
| | _The New PA Project Education Fund (NPPEF) is a non-partisan organization led by community leaders across the Commonwealth dedicated to centering underrepresented and underserved communities to embrace their power. NPPEF ensures full participation in the democratic process through civic education and year-round engagement by centering Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth - with intention - as they are the least represented and most impacted by decisions our government is making._

**Will you support us with a contribution today?** [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99401622/519807909/645888246?refcode=EM_F_241228highlights_N_NPPEF_10_NG_N_biobox&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk5NzM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE1ODE5NGM4LTM0YzUtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pjjSwdCvf-o6mtoiRFTUMFO02XITwlwgS7MhLScZxzo=)

name: History Facts
subject: What oranges used to look like
body:
Oranges weren’t always as popular or as common as they are today — and they didn’t even look the same.
---

# [What Did Oranges Used To Look Like? (They Weren’t Always Orange)](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp7oko&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Science & Industry](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp7oko&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp7oko&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| O ranges weren’t always as popular or as common as they are today — and they didn’t even look the same. The oranges we’re familiar with are the result of thousands of years of cultivation and selective breeding. Here, we peel back the layers of history to discover what oranges used to look like and how they evolved into the fruit we enjoy today.

name: Social Security and Medicare Update via Blue Amp Action
subject: REPUBLICANS LIED about Social Security and Medicare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0452b234-1081-425d-b37b-b39f52f0e80c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter: Trump and his far-right cult LIED to the American people. This week, extremist MAGA Republicans admitted that Social Security and Medicare are on the chopping block. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T45eddddd-09d3-48eb-bf11-809e15d43644/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [PROTECT SOCIAL SECURITY AND MEDICARE](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbb675370-a20a-498a-93dd-ea4c31848373/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | **Millions of Americans depend on these benefits to survive – including our veterans and seniors. But Republicans have made it clear that they will aim to gut Social Security and Medicare under a second Trump term.** **[We’re calling on 385 Democrats from](https://default.salsalabs.org/T15b3d179-2d30-4ef1-9e56-fdd4b8c0c353/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ 22122](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6d8c94e9-0fc6-4bf9-a138-1a2a43b8a46b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**[**to add their name in support of Social Security and Medicare. Will you sign your name to our petition before midnight?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc10c6476-a65e-40fa-9e63-810a9b41cdb3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://default.salsalabs.org/T45b8bba9-ca9c-40db-88dd-bd4e2d8de2f4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Millions of Americans depend on Social Security benefits – and as many as 9 in 10 Americans oppose cuts to the program! Yet, Republicans are finalizing their plans to strip these benefits which would be disastrous to those who depend on their Social Security benefits. But we want to hear directly from you, so we created a petition. Please let us know before midnight tonight, Peter:

| **WILL YOU SIGN YOUR NAME IN SUPPORT OF SOCIAL SECURITY AND MEDICARE?** **SUPPORTER:[ dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb5641327-c737-4464-bffe-d087ab378108/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **SIGNATURE: PENDING** **DEADLINE: 11:59 P.M.** **[****[NO!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3bef1ec4-4514-48d6-9aab-9e7588927f86/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**[ →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5189d603-a624-4ec1-b2ce-8f1947428e77/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**]** **[****[YES!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0d5a0c31-952b-4398-9a1f-0b8bebe69a6c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**[ →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T11962217-ff6a-464b-bdd4-d061714f660c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**]**

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal polls and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1e55b3ae-e7b3-444c-a26f-5b2e984a4061/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
