name: Sen. Jacky Rosen
subject: Need to hear from top supporters ASAP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Friend,

I’m so grateful to have grassroots supporters like you by my side as we work to improve the lives of hardworking families in Nevada and across the country. **And as we brace ourselves for the first year of the second Trump administration and the new GOP-controlled Senate, I'm looking to hear directly from top supporters like you.**
In November, we were able to keep this Senate seat blue thanks to _your_ on-the-ground insights. Now, I'm ready to fight with everything I have in the Senate to speak out against MAGA extremism, stand up for our shared values, and ensure _every_ American has the opportunity to thrive. But to do that, I need to hear from you again.
**That's why my team and I are launching a brand-new survey to get your input before 2025 begins, and I'm counting on you to share your responses before midnight tonight.****[So please, friend: Will you take a moment now to tell me what issues are most important to you? I need your grassroots input to shape my priorities in the Senate and continue making progress for you and your family.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99403562/519814051/1383551478?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=37087&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&refcode=jtk5426-su-nd&code=jtk5426-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDZkYTkyYy0zNmM1LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sDlqk9E2LKwpfOGjwHF7VW204yfCny5RGUmzvDNKRrc=&emci=88c5b2e7-67c4-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=006da92c-36c5-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=3800590)**

– Sen. Jacky Rosen

name: John Fetterman
subject: Couldn’t be more grateful for your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Some people do politics like this ⬇️ — but not me.
#
**Derek, let let me start by saying I HATE the idea of calling up ultra-millionaires to ask for their money.**
Some people do politics like this ⬇️ — but not me.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241228?refcode=em20241228-9731&refcode2=9731_434096_mvof9Q&akid=9731%2E434096%2Emvof9Q)
We’re a grassroots team funded by folks like you. And when we say we’re counting on your support to hit an important goal, we mean it.
**Like right now, Derek. My team and I set a goal of bringing in another 7,500 donations before the end of the year, and we need your help to do it.[Can you pitch in $5 or any amount today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241228?refcode=em20241228-9731&refcode2=9731_434096_mvof9Q&akid=9731%2E434096%2Emvof9Q)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241228?amount=5&refcode=em20241228-9731&refcode2=9731_434096_mvof9Q&akid=9731%2E434096%2Emvof9Q)**
Believe me when I say your donation will not go unseen or unappreciated. Each + every dollar we raise helps me to focus on fighting for working people in the U.S. Senate. NOT calling up mega-donors.
Thanks, Derek. I couldn’t be more grateful for your support.
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20241228-9731-footer&t=1&refcode2=9731_434096_mvof9Q&akid=9731%2E434096%2Emvof9Q)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

clean_body: Some people do politics like this ⬇️ — but not me. Derek, let let me start by saying I HATE the idea of calling up ultra-millionaires to ask for their money. Some people do politics like this ⬇️ — but not me. We’re a grassroots team funded by folks like you. And when we say we’re counting on your support to hit an important goal, we mean it. Like right now, Derek. My team and I set a goal of bringing in another 7,500 donations before the end of the year, and we need your help to do it. Believe me when I say your donation will not go unseen or unappreciated. Each + every dollar we raise helps me to focus on fighting for working people in the U.S. Senate. NOT calling up mega-donors. Thanks, Derek. I couldn’t be more grateful for your support. ❤️ John John Fetterman U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

During my first term in Congress, I went to bat every day for the hardworking folks of Western PA.

I’ve led the fight to hold big railroads accountable for derailments like the one in East Palestine. I took action to defend and expand veterans benefits. I fought back against Republican efforts to rip away reproductive freedom. I fought to lower costs for working families.

Those are fights I’m going to continue, and I can promise you this: if a Trump agenda gets in the way of progress for Western PA, I’ll be the first in line to push back and defend our work.

I’ve led the fight to hold big railroads accountable for derailments like the one in East Palestine. I took action to defend and expand veterans benefits. Those are fights I’m going to continue, and I can promise you this: if a Trump agenda gets in the way of progress for Western PA, I’ll be the first in line to push back and defend our work. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thank you, Chris | Make sure this email goes to your inbox. name: Greg Casar (via Working Families Party)
subject: We’re already seeing their true colors
disclaimer_text: paid for by cuts to critical programs like Social Security and Medicare
body:
The first agenda item for Republicans in 2025 will be giving massive kickbacks to their billionaire donors that they want the rest of us to pay for. | | | Hi Peter — this is Congressman Greg Casar from Texas. I’m a proud Democrat, and a proud longtime member of the Working Families Party. **And a couple weeks ago, my colleagues in Congress elected me as the new chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus.** Look, Peter: we know the next few years will be challenging. Like you, I worry about the future of our country. That’s why I want to take a few moments to tell you a little more about the work ahead of us. But before I do, **[can you help ensure our movement has the resources to fight back in 2025 by making an end-of-year contribution to the Working Families Party? The fights ahead of us will be tough. But as an organizer, I know that when we come together, there’s nothing that can stand in the way of our movement.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9IMCZqG23MZNa_R3nK0XZCN1Llm_iq605UX_h9nau6NKj6VHf2IT-gSgPRkxbnN21bIJOR-3ibK3NVmBlSDONJY7AqRbMyzGtBnvhbCGEg1IBNAbcFdnlBVt-Z7xg9TBrJtrcN6fWARzFNZpEfz__AIoYij91W-Zf_oTF21PyrCeucIYO3XN_Dtrts-dxawQOiHGuecMIwHcEIYh1hmKq2xmBnbHpF0WWoydQEy3PVrAbk5GmYeKyZmqeHrSLdTSVdd2C8gBKdfYNUVbSjEPxwq16a1U89WpMLU34LfiHch1ieTg4Wii544Alcd-pL9nBbq9U2kDhazKM5bJ2aZRHRw/4co/_Q3LHyGyTcuy6GRGSfXkYA/h0/h001.0yXRy0Q8yXMpDvBnsXbL5jiO0Aw0zNhu1JXcpIqhZUs)** **[Donate »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9IMCZqG23MZNa_R3nK0XZCN1Llm_iq605UX_h9nau6NKj6VHf2IT-gSgPRkxbnN21JEQbF_AMhFcsEW_wPql1SKU_E1elrQoyIE3_q0tBbdZnsCsjS1hVJgvW5VYodHuedd2PNZ8I_2_hojkcp_swypeV7c31PUU0Re12M8gVtFucLs8zQ91dMSHuXC37vblBrPbtrBfA7KoeJeuGIWYc-ULqtkd231M9NMvy8Q_eK-vWNHokB9Vl1vosUc7fiYsrME-w4sXB8tL6M9LCbDXo_o_xcpVCMxz0oFZUwJ6U06DcKH-iw2HHQEf3e3XbAEO0HHgHV2_J8iWgdZ56ZyG9lA/4co/_Q3LHyGyTcuy6GRGSfXkYA/h1/h001.nhQCJ14Syn4RjGgkDP3lMQhuKGiWMHFYhTjMz8t1Ao4)** These days, it’s a lot easier to get elected to Congress — and to stay here — if you’ve got billionaires and corporate megadonors on your side. My journey has been a different one. I am a proud native Texan and son of immigrants. For years, I worked as a labor organizer, fighting for living wages and dignity for working families. After that, I was elected to the Austin City Council, where I fought for and won victories like paid sick days and affordable housing. And for the last two years in Congress, I’ve worked side-by-side with the Working Families Party to continue many of these same fights — **always keeping working people in my district and across the country front-and-center**. Since November’s results, I’ve heard pundit after pundit talk about how the Democratic Party should focus more on issues like wages, housing, and child care that speak to pocketbook challenges working people are feeling. Well, guess what? **Those are exactly the kinds of policies that the Congressional Progressive Caucus has championed — often over the opposition of more corporate elements in the Democratic Party coalition.** As for Republicans — they may have pretended to care about the concerns of working-class voters in the campaign, but we’re already seeing their true colors. Trump is filling his cabinet with billionaire oligarchs and wealthy donors who will do his bidding. He’s promised massive tax cuts to the wealthiest donors, paid for by cuts to critical programs like Social Security and Medicare. **Make no mistake: the first agenda item for Republicans in 2025 will be giving massive kickbacks to their billionaire donors that they want the rest of us to pay for**. It’s outrageous. And just like during the campaign, they’re going to try to distract us by pointing to other issues, hoping we look away while they pick our pockets. We aren’t going to let them get away with it. Our job is to stay true to our core values, focus on the needs of working people, and make our tent even bigger to fight back against his corrupt handouts to the billionaire class. **That’s the work that’s ahead of us — and it’s exactly the kind of work that the Working Families Party was built for.** WFP doesn’t just show up every few years with a few weeks to go before election day. They organize year-round across the country, and they help identify, train, and elect working-class candidates that aren’t bankrolled by billionaire donors. **[With billionaires and corporate megadonors flooding our political system, it’s more important than ever that working people have the infrastructure to fight back and win real governing power at every level. Can you make an end-of-year contribution to the Working Families Party to ensure they have the resources they need to fight back?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9IMCZqG23MZNa_R3nK0XZCN1Llm_iq605UX_h9nau6NKj6VHf2IT-gSgPRkxbnN21fsYFztMa0C9Cy3T8p6lKKZOxz6NXLNQaKP9jPnIqyMa8T5D4ZwhOumOwTCchiFabyHan29hyOsVO47fu492Avn2VsD-PBIxQeSF2AUUe81Vrhav2mBEfgWvPzDIVC1ZeLIfrON_l02rI54sIQfFbmGZzJrAmFQQGLBBJLcX6Gnf-hkM4LXVnP9YZEOgVkYNuvyf4t9zm2aPzcGpi6H7ivyN2sENnRnMraDrRg5xNrSe7vT7McWfZ1ZRc-pWLoy6VI2mYbtioc2IP9Dw0TSHkxA/4co/_Q3LHyGyTcuy6GRGSfXkYA/h2/h001.U-7b0ff0ZdaYhlrG5PDN_224P9vhqKL18N8a5lBtUmo)** clean_body: The first agenda item for Republicans in 2025 will be giving massive kickbacks to their billionaire donors that they want the rest of us to pay for. | | | Hi Peter — this is Congressman Greg Casar from Texas. I’m a proud Democrat, and a proud longtime member of the Working Families Party. And a couple weeks ago, my colleagues in Congress elected me as the new chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus. Look, Peter: we know the next few years will be challenging. Like you, I worry about the future of our country. That’s why I want to take a few moments to tell you a little more about the work ahead of us. But before I do, These days, it’s a lot easier to get elected to Congress — and to stay here — if you’ve got billionaires and corporate megadonors on your side. My journey has been a different one. I am a proud native Texan and son of immigrants. For years, I worked as a labor organizer, fighting for living wages and dignity for working families. After that, I was elected to the Austin City Council, where I fought for and won victories like paid sick days and affordable housing. And for the last two years in Congress, I’ve worked side-by-side with the Working Families Party to continue many of these same fights — always keeping working people in my district and across the country front-and-center. Since November’s results, I’ve heard pundit after pundit talk about how the Democratic Party should focus more on issues like wages, housing, and child care that speak to pocketbook challenges working people are feeling. Well, guess what? Those are exactly the kinds of policies that the Congressional Progressive Caucus has championed — often over the opposition of more corporate elements in the Democratic Party coalition. As for Republicans — they may have pretended to care about the concerns of working-class voters in the campaign, but we’re already seeing their true colors. Trump is filling his cabinet with billionaire oligarchs and wealthy donors who will do his bidding. He’s promised massive tax cuts to the wealthiest donors, paid for by cuts to critical programs like Social Security and Medicare. Make no mistake: the first agenda item for Republicans in 2025 will be giving massive kickbacks to their billionaire donors that they want the rest of us to pay for. It’s outrageous. And just like during the campaign, they’re going to try to distract us by pointing to other issues, hoping we look away while they pick our pockets. We aren’t going to let them get away with it. Our job is to stay true to our core values, focus on the needs of working people, and make our tent even bigger to fight back against his corrupt handouts to the billionaire class. That’s the work that’s ahead of us — and it’s exactly the kind of work that the Working Families Party was built for. WFP doesn’t just show up every few years with a few weeks to go before election day. They organize year-round across the country, and they help identify, train, and elect working-class candidates that aren’t bankrolled by billionaire donors. In solidarity, Greg Casar Thoughts? name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Find Peace in Uncertain Times
body:
Have you been watching what is going on in our world? |
---
| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=a15f868ee5204d549cacb105cda85360&_t=IbN6MtivolIqCsrIYoh7ocnlTyQt2hwXO9dKCL7p1232mmaRPV9DSjaXYrLoTh5Hab0SZsKk2Ap3L563VYXAdcwv-4c4M8va0-YtqyCfcpWA0K4goEu_DTp5SMiqQPZj)_

| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a15f868ee5204d549cacb105cda85360&_e=Pmq4Wbo55DyeUQL2RPSBOarD4aVgiryzEXIW05X0SOuLTv6fsBABucSOCP8rOfQ0PEcmAtFe9y1ZJASNqcmd3GxKHcW26MKO2WKarfqrUmz8emZbin00jhLWwtLO1vn13dw262idaWQVQ2loMslVX-5rNDBE3G-VFVZq3dAOfrBmA3LwJVp8ueZ60qZrtJD_zzJmAP6g3XER-b80Miam6syDXaASQBTUujcW8fD96u5lCHcb2qYLJPUO_9rxdcX9HyMjpcGwgTon1PjUABYaU7rLlalMO7ZoFdrYnejl6IkzjovT_Ju0B0PGbRW8qe-sjmyp_9owpKbYW5vjajVRhuCj5gqwJZyZotqx-5ag1BWwYuEswIceAhFeomVB8KoN)
---
Hello Friend, Have you been watching what is going on in our world? Do you need help to encourage you in your faith and fortify your hope in these dark days? When anxiety over inflation, wars, and uncertainty strikes, you need hope immediately. That's why God has given you His Word. He doesn't want you to have to wait for the peace that comes from knowing He's in control of the future. God's Word says that he knows how the end will happen.. Jesus rules victoriously over evil, and you'll spend an eternity in glory -- free from pain and suffering -- in His presence. That is such good news! While we wait for that ending, perhaps you or someone you love might have questions about what is happening now in our world and how it fits in with what God says is coming. Those are legitimate questions, and God's Word has answers! I've written a book that outlines the end of your story. That ending is powerful and perfect. You won't be disappointed, and believe me, you won't want to change a thing. The name of my book is _Perfect Ending: Why Your Eternal Future Matters Today_. This book will help you face your tomorrows, not in fear, but in absolute confidence, to prepare you for the soon and certain return of Christ. As you read, you'll:
---
* Gain valuable insight into how future biblical events affect you in the here and now.
* Find the answers to the 10 most frequently asked questions about heaven.
* Discover how some of our government's policies are paving the way for the Antichrist.
* Come to understand the crucial, but often confusing and overwhelming subject of Bible prophecy.
* Understand the precise sequence and importance of prophetic events like the rapture, tribulation, and millennium.

---
_Perfect Ending_ will be mailed to you as a way of saying thanks for whatever donation you are able to give to the ministry of Pathway to Victory. And as an added bonus, we will include our informative Bible Prophecy Chart to help you visualize end-times events.
---

Let's be watching and waiting -- and learning all we can from God's Word about our role in the days ahead. Eagerly awaiting His return, Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas

# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Reader, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts. The New York Sun is different. It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party. Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point. When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments. I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join. The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today. Every person matters in this effort. Don’t wait. name: Katie Porter
subject: My 2024 reading wrapped!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
In my last year of flying weekly to and from Congress, I vowed to read more—and scroll through social media less.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39369%2E3422442%2EExnrd7)
Derek,
Let’s face it: you definitely will want some distractions as a survival tactic in the Trump 2.0 presidency. In my last year of flying weekly to and from Congress, I vowed to read more—and scroll through social media less.
And now as we wrap up 2024, I am proud that I beat my goal of reading 52 books, an average of one a week.
Reading should be a judgment-free activity; we all read for different reasons. Because I read two newspapers each day and wade through staff briefs, witness testimony, and legislation, my personal reading is all fiction.
I won’t apologize; fiction, even so-called chick lit, can help us empathize with others, see new perspectives, and become better storytellers. These are three critical skills for candidates and elected leaders. You cannot win tough elections (or survive bad ones!) without these tools.
Below are a few books that I enjoyed, with my own personal categories, to help you pick a next read!
_**My family is not as dysfunctional as yours:**_ The Latecomer by Jean Hanff Korelitz
I read The Plot by Jean Hanff Korelitz and liked it well enough to try another book by her. The Latecomer describes a complex family, with characters that are imperfect yet empathetic. We don’t all get to our destination at the same time, a message that a striver like me needs to hear.
_**Being a 50-year old woman *is* that Hard:**_ How Hard Can It Be by Allison Pearson
Funny and real, this book is pitch perfect on its descriptions of the ways in which family and work both overwhelm and reward mothers. I picked this one up at my library used book sale. I handed it off to another 50-year old working mom who probably will struggle to find time to read it.
_**We’ll find our way through hard shit together:**_ The Guncle by Steven Rowley
This book won the Thurber prize for American humor, and indeed, it made me laugh. The poignancy and resilience of the characters resonated, however, long after I forgot the funny moments.
_**Wildly creative and I’m still puzzling:**_ The Ministry of Time by Kaliane Bradley
This debut novel is bursting with imagination— somehow the book is a romance-science fiction-history-thriller. I’m still noodling on the ethics of its premise, having been prompted to read more on the history of Arctic exploration after finishing the book. This book is flawed and brilliant, a paradox that is perfectly apt for its plot.
_**How did I miss this great book:** _Honor by Thrity Umrigar
Ethnic and religious nationalism may be growing problems in many parts of the world, but they are not new. This book looks at present and past divisions in India, showing how the dehumanization of others spreads, infecting some and hurting others.
_**Read RomComs for Joy:**_ The True Love Experiment by Christina Lauren
My fellow Congressperson, Lizzie Fletcher, is the sister of one of my favorite authors, Katherine Center. Katherine’s motto is Read for Joy. This book features an audacious, hilarious protagonist— a romance novelist who realizes she has fizzled out in her own romantic life.
_**Weird but I laughed:**_ Death Valley by Melissa Broder
This book won’t be for everyone, but its depiction of struggles—both real and self-imposed—has stayed with me. Set in California, the writer spends a harrowing weekend in the desert confronting her personal and professional insecurities. (And listening to rocks explain the wisdom of the world!)
_**My top recommendation:**_ The Real Americans by Rachel Khong
Limiting myself to books released in 2024, my top recommendation is The Real Americans. The three generational perspectives that reveal the story are equally skillful, a testament to the author’s ability to voice the experiences and perspectives of others.
_I first sent this email to my Substack list. I use Substack to send longer form content. If you’d like to make sure you’re subscribed to that list,**[click here](https://act.katieporter.com/go/19217?source=em20241228-39369&t=2&akid=39369%2E3422442%2EExnrd7)**._
Happy reading!
Katie Porter
[Follow on Substack](https://act.katieporter.com/go/19217?source=em20241228-39369&t=3&akid=39369%2E3422442%2EExnrd7)

**Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20241228-39369&amounts=&t=4&refcode2=39369_3422442_Exnrd7&akid=39369%2E3422442%2EExnrd7)**
---
Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=39369%2E3422442%2EExnrd7).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99406538/519821939/-1259394887?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_281124_FR_EOY-1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGIxZGQ0MjgtM2RjNS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jdnNP46SloC_DubZQKmFRVolw6sK2D-9zBrbwQWJC24=)
Team,

Look, we're sorry we have to be reaching out right now during what may be your holiday vacation. But trust us, we wouldn’t be doing so if we didn’t absolutely have to.

I’ll cut to the chase: Our work didn’t stop on Election Day, because we have municipal elections coming up in April. That means, a whole new crop of candidates for offices around the state who need support, mentorship, and resources.

Now that Trump is just days away from starting his second term, it’s more critical than ever that we have people in office who won’t back down from a fight.

[**With our end of year deadline coming up in just a couple days, will you make a donation right now to help us hit our $8,000 Municipal Election goal?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99406539/519821940/-1259394887?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_281124_FR_EOY-1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGIxZGQ0MjgtM2RjNS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jdnNP46SloC_DubZQKmFRVolw6sK2D-9zBrbwQWJC24=)
[**DONATE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99406540/519821941/-1259394887?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_281124_FR_EOY-1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGIxZGQ0MjgtM2RjNS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jdnNP46SloC_DubZQKmFRVolw6sK2D-9zBrbwQWJC24=) The municipal elections will be the first elections of the new Trump era, and our first opportunity to prove that we’re still in the game and not giving up on our values. However, we have to help our County Parties to rebuild their infrastructure so we can all hit the ground running in the new year.

[**With just a couple days until the deadline, will you rush a contribution now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99406541/519821944/-1259394887?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_281124_FR_EOY-1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGIxZGQ0MjgtM2RjNS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jdnNP46SloC_DubZQKmFRVolw6sK2D-9zBrbwQWJC24=)

Thanks for everything,
Team IDCCA

clean_body: = Team, Look, we're sorry we have to be reaching out right now during what may be your holiday vacation. But trust us, we wouldn’t be doing so if we didn’t absolutely have to. I’ll cut to the chase: Our work didn’t stop on Election Day, because we have municipal elections coming up in April. That means, a whole new crop of candidates for offices around the state who need support, mentorship, and resources. Now that Trump is just days away from starting his second term, it’s more critical than ever that we have people in office who won’t back down from a fight. = = The municipal elections will be the first elections of the new Trump era, and our first opportunity to prove that we’re still in the game and not giving up on our values. name: Larry P. Arnn
subject: This is insane
body:
We should not really be surprised

_**A message from our sponsor...**_

| | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=69a2a847cd054f39b47d5e5d378e9c5b&_e=PFLEKfgIX-olk-fNewnpSB931v6F3sL3nnjvOpwspOjd5_csRXqa0_J_xxuzbrSFxBcHoOrPH5aEwPWAjRCWpgC3Vus_g5rhCNZg_aoquyTnieLtO6wt2SM4DybJHrM4YJB4ps4noxdHex1MmbVifmscBzqYHI0rAQnBP43qMs6EkZGep1IOvFw_ITk3JqgVB7wF_qnSgjkMw-PwhlwZYmRVOVTZkY6tfPq8h1JJ3_1gW9olPvRdIQbatI3MH9A3kw-aYxIin9xkraWVX1cOG8FofQ42caF4Hkoet29-8V0xFrwJNkypNi7ZWutZ-DVo1WuESqByB30fwQlSxuhiCgHe41CTGoB-GMa2WRT2y1SARUoksV1KcFJnMw0kgDSLDqr3uTO-2DzqS8q_ygP_hw%3D%3D)
---
| |
Peter,

Did you read in the news how several leading colleges and universities reacted to last month's election?

Some of these so-called elite institutions canceled classes and gave students coloring books, hot cocoa, and counseling so they could cope with the election results.

Could there be better proof that too many of America's schools fail to prepare their students to be responsible citizens of the world's greatest and longest-lasting constitutional republic?

Yet, we should not really be surprised by this. After all, the forces of the anti-American Left have been focused on seizing control of our educational institutions since the late 1960s.

Too many young Americans are taught that our nation's founding principles were developed to promote white supremacy, that natural rights and private property are codewords for fascism, and that justice requires the destruction of capitalism.

To normal, hard-working Americans, this sounds insane. That's because it _is_ insane.

Our American way of life is under relentless attack on campuses across the country. This problem won't be fixed quickly or easily--although I believe we have the opportunity to score significant victories in the coming year.

I am hopeful for our future, and one of the main reasons I am hopeful is the sense of civic responsibility and generosity of people like **YOU**.

With your support, Hillsdale College plans to redouble its efforts in 2025 to revive and preserve liberty through education.

**[Given the urgency of engaging the Left on the battleground of education, will you consider a tax-deductible gift today to help Hillsdale College expand its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=69a2a847cd054f39b47d5e5d378e9c5b&_e=PFLEKfgIX-olk-fNewnpSB931v6F3sL3nnjvOpwspOjd5_csRXqa0_J_xxuzbrSFxBcHoOrPH5aEwPWAjRCWpgC3Vus_g5rhCNZg_aoquyTnieLtO6wt2SM4DybJHrM4YJB4ps4noxdHex1MmbVifmscBzqYHI0rAQnBP43qMs6EkZGep1IOvFw_ITk3JqgVB7wF_qnSgjkMw-PwhlwZYmRVOVTZkY6tfPq8h1JJ3_1gW9olPvRdIQbatI3MH9A3mReGVGV7eaCDdt95dQrlL3Z3FFfRVT1exmEnNwRBxqPYDd_WAArLZ_McmEycMnKTcBqqzosjtOs0JfGSWgp3k1L8JNYebNFVHVbt6qgvhC4A6oyLgjmTDMF_kCBHMTKBOle6rdtWuy_zNlVAdNBCug%3D%3D)? **

You will help us to expand the production of our free online courses, increase the readership of _Imprimis_ , and launch increasing numbers of Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Stepping up the battle to retake American education from the anti-American Left is an essential part of restoring and preserving the American way of life. It will take a mighty effort--but in the words of Hillsdale's motto, "Strength Rejoices in the Challenge."

Your generous support of our educational outreach programs will help us to reach and teach additional millions of our fellow citizens.

**As you know, Hillsdale refuses to accept one penny of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. **

This allows Hillsdale to remain **genuinely independent** and focused on its mission, free of burdensome and corrupting federal regulations.

But it also means that all our work--including our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--**is entirely dependent on the support of citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.**

2025 will be a critical year, and the Left will pull out all the stops to keep its stranglehold on our government and on our schools.

It will take significant resources to promote our online courses--such as our recent course on "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism"--while also expanding Hillsdale's other educational outreach efforts.

Many of our most faithful supporters give gifts of **$25** or **$50** , while others give gifts of **$100** , **$500** , or even more. What's most important is that you give what you can.

Please help today by making your best tax-deductible, year-end gift using the secure, convenient link below:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=69a2a847cd054f39b47d5e5d378e9c5b&_e=PFLEKfgIX-olk-fNewnpSB931v6F3sL3nnjvOpwspOjd5_csRXqa0_J_xxuzbrSFxBcHoOrPH5aEwPWAjRCWpgC3Vus_g5rhCNZg_aoquyTnieLtO6wt2SM4DybJHrM4YJB4ps4noxdHex1MmbVifmscBzqYHI0rAQnBP43qMs6EkZGep1IOvFw_ITk3JqgVB7wF_qnSgjkMw-PwhlwZYmRVOVTZkY6tfPq8h1JJ3_1gW9olPvRdIQbatI3MH9A3HSaS0H2hY8YQDVbjZoyLai4SwxpLb8M7YRvuB8_aNC1Y10IeTZRPkjuhsauOO9Njn7vy_VmPcucdyNEeGy7ZYhwFPFiCt0qDhe_oHocdn2tYs3BuPfT-0aCPnvYChJFLcYazmbO5XL3pYd4HhB6Mqw%3D%3D)

Thank you for your partnership in our educational efforts to preserve liberty and the American way of life.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
[

Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=69a2a847cd054f39b47d5e5d378e9c5b&_t=jV6bZxLAyWFVbi1PSPJNRzCaZVioX94uBkmc0qJX2ipru10q1C0n5jXa4ZAp0NKYkWqRPVjl_6uDj1HXLrY9BmTINaBHmHjHFo9CgM8B-A-06AgqIxlhengTBWWCHxZW)

Peter, President Trump asked me to check in on you.
With three special elections in the House and two toss-up gubernatorial races on the horizon, Republicans need the most accurate data and insights from our top Patriots.
So when President Trump authorized us to conduct the Official Patriot Census — the largest one ever conducted by the leader of the free world — I knew I needed to get in contact with you.
**[Our records show that if we’re going to win these toss-up races, it will all come down to the critical data we collect from Patriots like YOU.>>](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=08ba2b1c835644b1b75ccf4dcb353884&_e=NG_jVPDM6uJdBRRIu0XELxX5IxENdHCeDScAxjItFmc_cut8r40ytICyLl_R752xnIbRGd6bHfKtN0Y_JA8M8yBJ-oSj8lBqQa-uL5USY2Y6EZs_yScNqv_FaTuBJZryD4teZ5YNilkjZxY3TJUUG7Z81k9Po4qZdgE7kwh78RiwqntTPpWDSfB30xGlKsrRqdGXb5ygXO57ICETSylxKHl2M5J9M3xxOlapy9xd46FSMB-93TSqgHwUZMbqdRgSaV6ouPBqganvc8N2BhwH1bgGvURQO5n5QyCuB3M_t7045D4Dmze5Y2BMvnKsuD7xL-sTI9nl7d--4aNre-MJlS9zpKVRF4UEMHwsM1o4hQlmBBbUYRv88ApwFNjI6AQ9oHbh1nWsP7qpbwg2-z8gnQ%3D%3D)**

**_Here’s a breakdown of why these races are so mission-critical to President Trump:_**

* In Virginia, Pelosi-Puppet Abigail Spanberger is poised to win the Democrat gubernatorial nomination. If we lose this race, radical Democrats will add NON-CITIZENS to the Virginia voter rolls and engage in election interference.
* In New Jersey – a state where President Trump made HUGE gains in November – Democrats are fighting among themselves to select the most rabid ANTI-TRUMP candidate they can find. If we win here, we can flip New Jersey RED for good.
* And in the special elections being held in Florida and New York, we’ll need to win ALL THREE to ensure President Trump holds onto his MAGA majority in the House.

It's Gretchen Whitmer.

2024 has been one hell of a year. This election cycle showed us an America deeply divided over our vision for this country, and as a result of that division, many of our fundamental freedoms are sure to come under threat in new and outrageous ways.

In times of upheaval, we need to look to what has always been true. And here's what I know for sure: More freedom is better than less. Some rights, like the right to make our own medical decisions, are nonnegotiable. And when more women are at the decision-making table, we all win.

**My friends at EMILYs List have been helping Democratic pro-choice women win elections for almost 40 years. Their role in changing the face of power in American politics can't be overstated, and I'm proud to be an EMILYs List woman myself.[Their work is entirely donor-supported, and this week is their last fundraising drive of 2024. body:
---

name: Justice Democrats
subject: re: Elon Musk
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

150 billionaire families spent $1.9 billion on the 2024 election.

Donald Trump appointed 13 billionaires (so far) to his administration.

Elon Musk influenced critical votes in Congress, threatened a government
shutdown, and is reportedly being considered for House Speaker — without
being an actual elected official.

This is what an oligarchy looks like,
Peter.

If the Democratic Party wasn't beholden to the wants of billionaires and
corporations, then they could show the American people that only one party
is ruled by billionaires, and that’s the GOP.

Democrats should take this opportunity to divorce the Party from the
wealthy elite once and for all.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241228?refcode=em20241228-36263&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36263_1203867_qHOLIj&akid=36263%2E1203867%2EqHOLIj ]Justice Democrats is working to recruit and elect more working-class
progressives to Congress who will reject corporate PAC money and big
checks from billionaires — but we need to raise $100,000 before our
end-of-year deadline in just three days. Will you help us reach our goal
by chipping in now?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241228?refcode=em20241228-36263&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36263_1203867_qHOLIj&akid=36263%2E1203867%2EqHOLIj ]Contribute $5

Together, we can make the Democratic Party the Party of working-class
people again instead of billionaires.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20241228-36263-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36263_1203867_qHOLIj&akid=36263%2E1203867%2EqHOLIj

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36263%2E1203867%2EqHOLIj

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Peter,

In just 23 days, Donald Trump will take office, and Republicans will have control of the House, the Senate and the White House. I know for many of us, there’s a heightened sense of anxiety about what the future holds.

**But, I want you to rest assured knowing that I have never backed down from adversity, and I won’t start now.** I will continue to do what you sent me to Congress to do: fight for YOU.

Your support has always been the cornerstone of my mission, and I need it more than ever. Tuesday at midnight marks the end of 2024, and our final end-of-quarter reporting deadline of the year. Peter **–**
From Fox News, to X, to Joe Rogan, to Tiktok, the right-wing’s dominance over the media is working.
This vast propaganda network helped elect Donald Trump in 2016. It catapulted the Big Lie about the 2020 election into the mainstream. And it helped Trump secure his victory and the White House again in 2024.
It’s clear that the left has a lot of catching up to do if we want to protect democracy and build trust with voters.
Thankfully, COURIER is already one step ahead.
At COURIER, we’re already reaching millions with fact-based, local reporting. Here’s what we’ve been up to:
* **Reaching disengaged voters in critical swing states:** Our 11 state-based newsrooms in Pennsylvania, Arizona, Michigan, and more bring local, values-driven reporting to communities most at risk of right-wing propaganda.
* **Meeting voters where they are:** With over 4.5 million followers and 2 billion social media impressions in the 90 days before Election Day, we’re delivering critical reporting on platforms like TikTok, X, and Instagram.
* **Redefining progressive media:** Our journalists and creators provide factual, community-centered news that challenges misinformation and focuses on the issues that matter most to our movement and our country.

While other news organizations are still scrambling to find out how Trump won, COURIER has the playbook to make sure it never happens again.
We just need your help to continue reaching the people who matter most.
**Our critical end-of-year fundraising deadline is only 3 days away, and we’re still $15,000 short of our 2024 goal. We need your support to continue funding the pro-democracy media network that can protect the truth during Trump’s next term.**

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Re: Help train the candidates of tomorrow, today
body:
Our Campaign School focuses on training women of color and BIPOC candidates with the lived experience needed to serve our communities. | | |
---
Friend, **Too often, candidates are millionaires who can spend a lot of money on ads and mailers, but don’t actually understand the needs of the communities they serve.** Our Rooted in Community Campaign School is geared toward women of color and BIPOC candidates who have the lived experiences needed to represent and uplift working people and families. **Starting the first weekend in February, we’ll train a cohort of 15 candidates to run for office,** teaching folks the fundamentals of grassroots campaigning, including communications, field work, fundraising, and more. **But, while we’ve budgeted to train 15 candidates, we received a record number of applicants. Can you help us expand the number of trainees?** Campaign School is completely free to attend, with the program costing $400 per candidate. [**Help us expand this year’s Rooted in Community Campaign School to train more working-class candidates. From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Fri, Dec 27, 2024
Subject: Help train the candidates of tomorrow, today
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
A friend once told me, “People like us never think about running for office and that’s the problem.”
**That’s exactly why we created the Rooted in Community Campaign School** , an in-person program to train progressive candidates running for local or state office.
**Our Campaign School focuses on training women of color and BIPOC candidates with the lived experience needed to serve our communities.** This month-long course, which will take place over five Saturdays in February and March, is completely free and will train the leaders of tomorrow, today.
**While we budgeted for training 15 candidates, we received a record number of applicants and would love to expand this year’s Campaign School further.** The cost per trainee is just $400, which means that every donation, whether it’s $5 or $400, goes a long way toward training future leaders to run for office.
[**Click here to donate today and power our Rooted in Community Campaign School to train working-class candidates with the lived experience to represent their communities.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv8B2U1BBuL1L5M7fYmQ1Fh3rx5SKuzIBr3Yg5nQcNTLs6AhQqrp9H_ywke_kPJiA2CnemHKJNyxqshw9Jy2-TZORb9FMpGVDugzlBDKF-0L0pRJYSK2w1QAytLVH22d8s70nwm1M4oCe9nX3EU9CT4S9QwdRonofToNNcUMaiSRZQIgTLxcdiAJbYEgbVdksZjrn5S54ytIZxm4dHAM1Z826EauEii4MXw8gGPeQNYXfck4kqYAvvl1jZoR4BTcqddA5Xh0Hw5mGQ867wxi58sErdJYJIRgpmCTuG5YfUyh8gfJioT8i-Li6zrPJfD8aa5Y4OrxNiKaHdgH31Ja9R4SMGiOaFBtC96dtvW3r3D8g/4co/k1LJfVhTQhO3wS_-IfFM_Q/h7/h001.viviJxsyFQL4P9BnV83GbbgqT-SkKsvAc2wqLVXXeEQ)
[DONATE NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv8B2U1BBuL1L5M7fYmQ1Fh3rx5SKuzIBr3Yg5nQcNTLmIJyMueT4VOxfeOcBGtdUiQYtkYxnAbb2bL3w-K8T7V0M9nZlwWn0QKtAMgGiJ3K-rwCxgdY8VWSXgUU5r1Tx726WZ6jji7MS1d76Ko8Lr2bBHO2f9bNxqVXmthIWQsC8ojF--9DCjMc-8d-PqP3UwQYuJY4Ft08CoYpeReC8bgwzeHIw_qvClbTr-Nqhz6ZCyxqiMHW1fCwPpq_fSsG6wso5q2h8cE0SK0YwA5lm30cgjjbjHiGt-hUi1qxByVVd4qGtR6wgy-vjO6DQ-inPMUzKWq05BjjOcOOTHETo16F4LZqYMOPvnPvOEmr5YybQ/4co/k1LJfVhTQhO3wS_-IfFM_Q/h8/h001.wgrh3z35eXIMYS76YE6zDevomQw4TBlajtMuNyunDas)

clean_body: Our Campaign School focuses on training women of color and BIPOC candidates with the lived experience needed to serve our communities. | | | Friend, Too often, candidates are millionaires who can spend a lot of money on ads and mailers, but don’t actually understand the needs of the communities they serve. Our Rooted in Community Campaign School is geared toward women of color and BIPOC candidates who have the lived experiences needed to represent and uplift working people and families. Starting the first weekend in February, we’ll train a cohort of 15 candidates to run for office, teaching folks the fundamentals of grassroots campaigning, including communications, field work, fundraising, and more. But, while we’ve budgeted to train 15 candidates, we received a record number of applicants. Can you help us expand the number of trainees? Campaign School is completely free to attend, with the program costing $400 per candidate. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Together, we will always organize and fight from outside halls of power. But we also need allies on the inside who will serve our communities with love and never sell us out. Let’s help shape the future of our communities. -Rashida Tlaib \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Fri, Dec 27, 2024 Subject: Help train the candidates of tomorrow, today To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, A friend once told me, “People like us never think about running for office and that’s the problem.” That’s exactly why we created the Rooted in Community Campaign School , an in-person program to train progressive candidates running for local or state office. Our Campaign School focuses on training women of color and BIPOC candidates with the lived experience needed to serve our communities. This month-long course, which will take place over five Saturdays in February and March, is completely free and will train the leaders of tomorrow, today. While we budgeted for training 15 candidates, we received a record number of applicants and would love to expand this year’s Campaign School further. The cost per trainee is just $400, which means that every donation, whether it’s $5 or $400, goes a long way toward training future leaders to run for office. We’ll train candidates on the fundamentals of running a grassroots campaign from communications to field work to fundraising, and more―and we’ll ensure that each of these campaign strategies is rooted in community and reflects the needs of each candidate’s district, whether they’re running for local or statewide office. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | If this past election taught us anything, it’s that we need more candidates who understand the needs of voters―and too often, everyday people don’t have the knowledge or resources to run for office and represent their communities. Join us and help shape the future of our communities together, Rashida Tlaib * | Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003, not authorized by any candidate or candidates committee. | | Sent via . name: Carolina at United We Dream Action
subject: I’ll make this quick:
body:
We don’t treat you like an ATM | | | Peter, I’m going to keep this quick. Here at UWDA, we don’t treat you like an ATM. We don’t make up phony match campaigns, fake fundraising deadlines, or anything of the sort. When we say your donation is important because it goes straight towards funding our work to create a pathway to citizenship for all 11 million undocumented folks, **that’s the truth.** And when we say we have an end-of-year deadline coming up in just a few days, and the money we raise now will affect our budget for the first year of Trump’s presidency, and what we’re able to accomplish, **that’s the truth.** **We never ask you to chip in without a good reason.** But now, as we’re weeks away from the second Trump Presidency and his never-ending attacks on immigrants, we’re asking you to please step up. It’s critically important. **[Peter, we’re counting on you to donate today to fuel our immigrant-youth led movement working to create the future we know is possible:](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplr-B85eW5KR2i85l1zhyntpaPWhvSNKc7zMqSF25YK1ATRlwRb8gBVtbXaJNGthTZP6KxeNhVXS0Z1ufmS9M7uuHmZ4_uX3TKHm1Ib2txVQwb0aXu-MBnwmNp3HrOrY9uVLRAcnDnAJs8TMbJft_MhMgXWu_PWG59apk4ndKpy_iKWsVCgm1Zy50rBLApQ5RsZRDJTDatjBm5ykp9aLnBafTDWEjtLY4q71n_NybH8j-xqyF8eB9a0IRimVFsj2SWXXhnr-cr_cMVWMWXMRvchF1GVfLCqT7WLra0oi7vCdlH0mzSM_wZAnALY6Cdzh9e3/4co/JJg5omtBQZKT8HAsskj80g/h0/h001.dB-VjeUMXo7iEJ_EYbeXIdLOsqRhMWbld2QhS4NgbRY)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplr-B85eW5KR2i85l1zhyntpaPWhvSNKc7zMqSF25YK1ATRlwRb8gBVtbXaJNGthTZPEcegJci_ytsfclTY-pW4A1TgO9JuDkZ-aY2qe4s660iDGLppv4nMeT-DqL5foDH_P2vcDkSXzCBiBUIYYWZGyJEXzuTl6CTfhn76H_J6u7m4FBUlZ2FFzQS71OGytmRwFKA6RprbxKWjgPTN5yjZg_i0B14GpAEWaa80GSzvlF5umaVDafgeA-KtTfUCJOoSPEVfmsCAFEOiIMsnjp22YDJpKxuCHdf99vm54ucOAE5ksSD7ZYzfXGTeVFdMx0dmNUVnGYY7lok5QCGyhmySje3KxjF0d0tAUHYPORL-LoE/4co/JJg5omtBQZKT8HAsskj80g/h1/h001.jOWf9nXPs4n34-9gvLJ--HoIrtLGFGuvpxaOiJOSGjE)

clean_body: We don’t treat you like an ATM | | | Peter, I’m going to keep this quick. Here at UWDA, we don’t treat you like an ATM. We don’t make up phony match campaigns, fake fundraising deadlines, or anything of the sort. When we say your donation is important because it goes straight towards funding our work to create a pathway to citizenship for all 11 million undocumented folks, that’s the truth. And when we say we have an end-of-year deadline coming up in just a few days, and the money we raise now will affect our budget for the first year of Trump’s presidency, and what we’re able to accomplish, that’s the truth. We never ask you to chip in without a good reason. But now, as we’re weeks away from the second Trump Presidency and his never-ending attacks on immigrants, we’re asking you to please step up. It’s critically important. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for your support, — Carolina, United We Dream Action | Our most dedicated supporters are chipping in monthly to sustain our fight to secure a pathway to citizenship. Join them and help us win permanent protections in Congress by starting a recurring donation today: | |

name: Democrats.org
subject: In case you missed it: Our Official 2025 Democratic Member Card design is here
body:
We wanted to make sure you saw this:
---
Derek, We know it’s a busy time, so we wanted to make sure you saw this. **We’ve chosen the design for our Official 2025 Democratic Member Cards:** [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024-reserve-member-card?refcode=em_20241228_2437_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2437_22930333_dj_bAn&akid=2437%2E22930333%2Edj_bAn)
[**Don’t wait — make a $3 contribution now and get yours delivered right to your door.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024-reserve-member-card?refcode=em_20241228_2437_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2437_22930333_dj_bAn&akid=2437%2E22930333%2Edj_bAn)
When you contribute $3, you’re not just getting your very own member card, Derek. You’re sending a powerful message that you’re ready to build the strongest possible Democratic Party, invest in state parties all over the country, win key statewide races in states like New Jersey and Virginia in 2025, win back Congress in 2026, and the White House in 2028.
Make no mistake: The work ahead of us won’t be easy, and it’s going to take all of us doing our part.
[**And that starts today. So please, take the first step by getting your member card, and say you’re ready to get to work in 2025 and beyond.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024-reserve-member-card?refcode=em_20241228_2437_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2437_22930333_dj_bAn&akid=2437%2E22930333%2Edj_bAn)
Thank you for everything,
The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

Hey there **Dr. Michael O’Brien here!** I’m excited to introduce myself as the new Director of Strategic Communications at Their Future Fund. Joining this incredible team alongside Annie and Renee to fight for the well-being of children in this country is an honor.

**[Before I keep going, I wanted to remind everyone of the $10,000 fundraising goal the Their Future team set for the end of the year. Can you ship in $5 or any amount to help us meet it?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtp_gPQ8YxNWLpLEnIZqVkAzQwCuqDDTlB_XsbHXe-aR63Y-TfdHtXamVg2fGhwB5pD9xHlm3rwVmkI1VZaykEn4uItU-GUxK21k6IIq4jKa1r1DjHAUzTxyoNKPIXAQTeBTW9y4L9oUM_lNNd--J-8c4BTa2_CAsbAobkB0yiI30Q9TD5MGmth4i6BSgr--ShfeqRPWfEYic1CAk0lDu-SQ0TmJ0sk97T2Z9Uw8Nnrs8KgxuqGQrI-l6bIJoF18TDh0AcsuALx0b6QGE-o2aWQptpXA2bRjacr9JwGrZUMGzYI1GOvkaA9bbOE0EQZnUV4wto2XtlI_HqjmgMnUk9MSxhs4agwCk9HStkWgOK6gapdG_9W-eZcNiND7bzBZ3U/4co/xoZvY1_uRp2OJkxLcI6ntg/h1/h001.Ish9gbqpnZPFKiRjnuysW2eUXqAbjJDku5h2X6Q_7pE)**

As a pediatrician, I see everyday the importance of giving our children the support and resources they need to thrive — and the toll it takes when they lack that support. That’s why as we head into the new year, I’m eager to build on the progress this team has already made and ensure children’s voices and needs remain at the forefront of policy decisions.

Whether it’s through equipping families with education, raising awareness, or empowering communities to advocate for change, I’m ready to dive in and help make a real impact.

**A little bit more about me- Annie and I met (on Twitter!) during her campaign for Congress. I was a vocal supporter of her work then and am happy to say our online friendship turned into a real friendship. I am so proud to stand with her in this fight to give children a voice in policymaking. Like Annie, I can’t sit idly by while our children face near insurmountable challenges. You will be hearing a lot more from me in the coming weeks and months but just know I am in this fight for the long haul.
**
Thank you for your ongoing support of Their Future Fund! **[Please, help us meet our end-of-year goal with a gift of any amount today!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtp_gPQ8YxNWLpLEnIZqVkAzQwCuqDDTlB_XsbHXe-aR63Y-TfdHtXamVg2fGhwB5pD9xHlm3rwVmkI1VZaykEn4uItU-GUxK21k6IIq4jKa1r1DjHAUzTxyoNKPIXAQTdyiDTSqClQe6b7GVhQ2DvplAB3dKqREM8RvWs-UdtnNgtgARk8APKkv4NsMWNmt2Oqy_T56QRN3uk2FFnVOvsFSBs6c8GaRHT8HjCVEV1QRLzisKdvWGRvQJ_sB85aDoG-5nviLcRjkGGh2JvoK1Vjb5_nxNNutvo1txbswUfBaaCiWoAVgfY5s0f8hyJTKr__T8SiYFc0oS14Qg1IqljSrTdt0hQ6UfnLzy8JwI-ZdjjkhQx1_W6U-zwovBHYwl0/4co/xoZvY1_uRp2OJkxLcI6ntg/h2/h001.vv0Hf_ug8-EoMTLb6CZQ16U-tWYWcOw4CuEBculzmL8)**

name: Team Benson
subject: Did you know this about Michigan?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
🌊
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/5?t=1&akid=14%2E181023%2Eh__Yx8)
Did you know that Michigan is the only state to be bordered by 4 out of the 5 Great Lakes? There’s a reason we’re called the Great Lake State.
You’re typically only 6 miles from a body of water, or 86 miles from one of the Great Lakes regardless of where you are in the state. It’s one of the many, many reasons to love living in Michigan!
Here on Team Benson, we love our state and fight for everyone who calls it home. That’s why we’ve spent every year since 2018 working to provide Michiganders with the smoothest, safest, and most secure elections in state history.
Our goal is simple. We want Michiganders to rest easy (maybe by a beautiful winter lakeshore?) knowing their fundamental rights are well-protected.
**[Here’s the thing-- we can’t keep up this transformative work without support from folks like you. Will you chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20241228-1?refcode=em20241228-1&refcode2=14_181023_h__Yx8&akid=14%2E181023%2Eh__Yx8)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20241228-1?amount=5&refcode=em20241228-1&refcode2=14_181023_h__Yx8&akid=14%2E181023%2Eh__Yx8)**
Thank you for all you do to support us,
Team Benson

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=14%2E181023%2Eh__Yx8)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_2024/?t=3&akid=14%2E181023%2Eh__Yx8)

Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
PO BOX 21368,
Detroit, MI 48221

name: Break up UnitedHealth via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Bernie's policies are NOT radical
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis —
UnitedHealth, Cigna, and CVS Health make
billions in profits from people just trying to get health care. Executives
get rich and stocks go up while everyday Americans suffer.

But recently, health care stocks fell as lawmakers introduced legislation
to break up these big corporations. With bipartisan support, this bill
could be a key step in our movement’s fight for Medicare for All.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20723?source=email-20241228&t=1011&akid=7445%2E5885482%2Eu_WhHx ]ADD YOUR NAME: Support legislation to break up the deadly, for profit
health care industry then chip in to fuel our fight for M4A!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20723?source=email-20241228&t=1012&akid=7445%2E5885482%2Eu_WhHx ]ADD YOUR NAME

The Wall Street Journal makes the bill sound like some nefarious “plot.”
It isn’t, it’s a small but important step towards holding health
corporations accountable for profiting from care.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20790?t=1013&akid=7445%2E5885482%2Eu_WhHx ][IMG]

No matter what the corporate media and CEO class say, the reality is that
the deadly, for profit healthcare system ONLY benefits corporate
shareholders and the ultra-rich.

Bernie likes to say that his proposed policies actually aren’t radical.
Medicare for All is NOT radical because getting people the care they need
and saving lives without bankrupting people is how healthcare SHOULD be.

This legislation, to prevent health care companies from controlling all
aspects of the industry, is definitely not radical. Breaking up
corporations to lower costs is not radical.

We need a massive push to pressure lawmakers for healthcare justice right
now, and we can only do it with your support.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20723?source=email-20241228&t=1014&akid=7445%2E5885482%2Eu_WhHx ]Send a message to your lawmakers to break up giant health corporations
like UnitedHealth now!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20723?source=email-20241228&t=1015&akid=7445%2E5885482%2Eu_WhHx ]ADD YOUR NAME

When we organize, we win!

name: Laura Friedman
subject: Showing our strength
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99412546/519837297/158001685?refcode=em-12.28.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjU0Y2IzZDQtNDVjNS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ow4pRgwS3l0HTuhffN9-4U9HSUduCrAsc-cNc2qKpTA=)

Friend,

[**This is a long, but important email about the approach I will take in Congress. Please take a moment to read it, then consider chipping in $3 to help me meet my final FEC deadline of 2024 to start our first term together in strength.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99412551/519837298/158001685?refcode=em-12.28.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjU0Y2IzZDQtNDVjNS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ow4pRgwS3l0HTuhffN9-4U9HSUduCrAsc-cNc2qKpTA=)
| ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99412552/519837299/158001685?refcode=em-12.28.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjU0Y2IzZDQtNDVjNS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ow4pRgwS3l0HTuhffN9-4U9HSUduCrAsc-cNc2qKpTA=)****
---

There’s no question that our region should be an example for the rest of the country.

**Unfortunately, today’s Congress is led by extremists focused on advancing their fringe political agenda. They’ve shown little interest in caring about the people I represent.**

As a mother and an Angeleno, I'm worried about the future of our county. That's why as a legislator and activist, I'm stepping up to do something about it.

In Congress, it’s my promise that every vote I make will be grounded in whether or not it truly meets the needs of this district - removing barriers to affordable housing and healthcare, combating climate change, fighting for good jobs, and defending the rights of our LGBTQ+ friends and family from far-right attacks.

That’s why I’m proud to represent CA-30, and it’s why I’m asking for your support:

[**We're officially in the final week of 2024, facing our last FEC deadline before Congress starts, and we have a $15,000 goal to close the year strong. If you can, please pitch in $3 today to help us meet the mark.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99412554/519837301/158001685?refcode=em-12.28.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjU0Y2IzZDQtNDVjNS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ow4pRgwS3l0HTuhffN9-4U9HSUduCrAsc-cNc2qKpTA=)

name: Larry P. Arnn
subject: Engaging the Left on the battleground of education
body:
This is insane

_**A message from our sponsor...**_

| | | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=aacdd81be16e407ba1fc211b9ef82fc9&_e=Zp6CO1XB1R7uQ-tSJudS2W_Syb3FlJaErfN0ZKqtzPxoOCmd8qH3m__-078bPrDhNBzg-fivRZXddqSRwIXsGY5VvI1iwWiURHHW95H4aDdvRib8-yst3oAoRQgcy6ONy6qjWDhfF7OWyk44cl1vxrsibxwVrD6w99FxZiN3ewx0Md6NT--5gIwPOAprvtlCxqMct66XseXODffEZqzxGYzvVIT0gmsULIs2UwG_FQGjp8-ct02YRzoCoXv3KuRLCJuAvnM2tkXBn_ip_GrS_Xp_sIxEcrt-cXWpdPZvzmlxcKqiX6orQWdiKCH_d1k9zlzYxwPNHBpoL8nyEvnY555wx1KPl_oj3r3ue4_DoknIEZnmg6QjGkdt4Mmf5hHhiBp6IFLy29-b8dd-wWvn8Q%3D%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

You know that most institutions of higher education have been hotbeds of anti-Americanism for decades.

In recent years, the radical ideologies hatched in higher education have spread into the mainstream of American life.

The need to push back aggressively has become urgent.

Next year, we must do even more for the cause of liberty and the American way of life. And I think the opportunities are significantly better than in the past.

**We must do all we can to revive and preserve the principles and practices of liberty and limited constitutional government on the battlefield of education. **

Hillsdale College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades. With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this crucial time for our nation.

That's why we have set a goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty Through Education** in 2025.

The focus of this vital project is to foster informed patriotism nationwide, especially among younger Americans. And we need your help.

**[Before the end of 2024, would you consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift? We have set a goal to raise $6,000,000 from our friends nationwide by December 31](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=aacdd81be16e407ba1fc211b9ef82fc9&_e=Zp6CO1XB1R7uQ-tSJudS2W_Syb3FlJaErfN0ZKqtzPxoOCmd8qH3m__-078bPrDhNBzg-fivRZXddqSRwIXsGY5VvI1iwWiURHHW95H4aDdvRib8-yst3oAoRQgcy6ONy6qjWDhfF7OWyk44cl1vxrsibxwVrD6w99FxZiN3ewx0Md6NT--5gIwPOAprvtlCxqMct66XseXODffEZqzxGYzvVIT0gmsULIs2UwG_FQGH_vVeN06jgJIuHCe9uYTJ00kstqDl8RRza4gO_-OlugANoNykV4wP1BWsMQN7ppfsnOiLN5yJaUkCVv-37XDla8AzDyRE1b95adCxg8yW-MUj3IvE3SOac_KJupXbhDMAAI5cnPiK4NMxt_170QJt7Dsg1gXF1rZ1x4_SKHVMzA%3D%3D).**

Hillsdale's educational outreach on behalf of liberty has never been more urgent than it is today. That's because efforts to undermine patriotism and destroy the American way of life have been increasing--with the ultimate goal of transforming American government and society.

Your year-end gift will help us to promote informed patriotism by educating millions of Americans--especially younger Americans--about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

One way we accomplish this is through our free online courses--courses such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," "Land of Hope: The Great American Story," and "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism."

**We must increase the number of citizens we reach and teach through these free online courses, as well as through our several other educational outreach efforts --efforts such as _Imprimis_ and our ongoing work to help launch and support Hillsdale-affiliated K-12 charter schools nationwide. **

**Defeating the anti-American Left on the battlefield of education is an essential part of reviving and preserving the American way of life.**

Hillsdale College refuses to accept even one penny of government support--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. _This principled independence frees us from many burdensome and corrupting federal regulations and allows us to remain true to our mission._

It also means that we depend entirely on the support of citizens like you.

**I see the tremendous impact of this support as I travel around the nation and talk to those who benefit from Hillsdale 's educational outreach. It is especially gratifying to see the impact on younger Americans.**

Your year-end contribution will help us expand Hillsdale's educational outreach on behalf of liberty in 2025.

If you agree that it is vitally important to promote informed patriotism by educating increasing millions of citizens (especially younger Americans) about our nation's great heritage of liberty, please make your best tax-deductible gift to Hillsdale College by December 31.

**You can give your year-end tax-deductible gift using this secure link:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=aacdd81be16e407ba1fc211b9ef82fc9&_e=Zp6CO1XB1R7uQ-tSJudS2W_Syb3FlJaErfN0ZKqtzPxoOCmd8qH3m__-078bPrDhNBzg-fivRZXddqSRwIXsGY5VvI1iwWiURHHW95H4aDdvRib8-yst3oAoRQgcy6ONy6qjWDhfF7OWyk44cl1vxrsibxwVrD6w99FxZiN3ewx0Md6NT--5gIwPOAprvtlCxqMct66XseXODffEZqzxGYzvVIT0gmsULIs2UwG_FQFM7JABNLH3IDlC60UeRdP4DFDf0LmF8bEtJ5q_W2X9oiFGBq7wL3KtsQjxOyOAf1vrlL2cMgDAZKIpU3pbY7c9wRFUMc4daflDRNhRBxQyVX9HtHy6G9x6JVlwNNZImBpFklRraJSbRgziP7rjbkmKapr50P2iTqRq5ajFr3LmKQ%3D%3D)

We are honored by your partnership in the crucial year ahead.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
[

Unsubscribe](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=aacdd81be16e407ba1fc211b9ef82fc9&_t=RMtuR-Yc0YXfqVRR6nRlnohsqHXC__bav8Lxsq0rvO1g-jWZiqwqkd2N-GGQoOR-XxfpRBhTyEK6FxDZv20V7Ag4ljnuRxVKgASfxVhgJEA84CmxOY5EePOT6N3KjHKD)

---

## Announcing the VIP Founders Club
---
Join at the VIP Founders Club level and you and your guest never wait in line, pay a fee and you are invited to private briefings and exclusive receptions with only fellow VIP Founders Club Members. **We have 24 Luncheons and Receptions planned for 2025** **PLUS Special Events and trips to the Capital to work with our Legislators** **And** **the BIZPAC Center for Business Excellence Accelerator and PITCH ROOM**

**If it is time to renew your membership and we hope you will take advantage of this amazing offer.** _If not, it is time to UP GRADE to VIP FOUNDERS CLUB. You get full value of our current membership applied to your VIP Upgrade._ **The small business owner is vulnerable alone, but, together we are strong.** **We are building an effective and amazing organization that fosters our business growth and guides our legislative bodies.** **-JL Trahan** **Founder & Executive Chairman**

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bdcbde6d-f3ed-4082-b9e2-25a97f025fb4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

After the pearl-clutching media spent four years telling Americans that "walls don't work" from their multi-million dollar studios, I traveled to the Yuma sector of the border while on assignment as Video Director for Daily Caller.
It was weeks before the election of 2020 when I toured the Imperial Sand dunes in a Corvette engine-powered dune buggy (I asked to drive but the Border Patrol officer kindly declined), cruised the Colorado in a turbo diesel-powered flat boat, and buzzed over seventy miles of border wall at various stages of construction in the gunner seat of a Blackhawk helicopter.
Aside from being terrified by my feet dangling hundreds of feet above the Arizona desert, I was amazed by how many construction crews dotted the landscape, and how quickly this wall was going up.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fd6d0d90-eb78-4301-b3cf-96fe98c6e38d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/21e2d953-4f6a-4512-84bd-a5c48411700d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
After the tour was complete, I came to a SHOCKING revelation. I must recommend you are sitting down when you read the insane proposition that comes next:
Walls... actually... work!
* * *
# The left-wing riots that destroyed America - A firsthand account:
Learn the TRUTH about the democrat riots that ravaged American cities in 2020. The media wants this all to go away... We can't let that happen!
Pick up Richie McGinniss' new book "Riot Diet," his direct experience living through the riots the mainstream media called "peaceful protests."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a8178b61-9979-4d9f-a872-603a66d67304?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Get "Riot Diet" Today](https://substack.com/redirect/a8178b61-9979-4d9f-a872-603a66d67304?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Of the dozens that I spoke to on that particular trip (and the hundreds since then), every single Border Patrol agent told me that a wall would be a tremendous asset to curbing illegal immigration, human trafficking, and drug smuggling.
I spoke with then-Chief of the Border Patrol Rodney Scott and he said, "There's no other single investment that we can make that lasts this long and has an immediate return on investment."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d85c69f4-c647-4579-b4f1-389303a74f74?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Click to watch
During Trump's first term, the corporate, anti-Trump media told us ad-nauseum that a $30 billion price tag for a border wall was simply more than the taxpayers could spare. But that brings us to the present day, where Biden and Border Czar Kamala Harriss' immigration crisis has [cost America over $150 billion and counting](https://substack.com/redirect/a393d8eb-1b3d-45f3-84c3-cb16c167d741?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Alas, my fine-feathered patriotic readers, I haven't even gotten to the most infuriating part. During the first months of the Biden administration, I took a bird's eye view of the growing crisis at Texas' southern border with a drone. Within seconds it was plainly obvious that thousands of migrants strolled into the outskirts of the small city of Mcallen Texas through the gaps in the unfinished wall. The overwhelming majority of migrants we spoke to during their first moments on U.S. soil stated that they came because Biden had been elected and they knew it would be easier to get in. This was right before they voluntarily turned themselves over to Border Patrol, because United Nations-sponsored NGO's told told them in their home countries that they would not be deported for entering the country illegally.
Quite the contrary, they would be rewarded with a free flight to the location of their choosing in the interior of the United States. There are no Border Patrol hospitals in places like McCallen (or anywhere), and the residents of the city were sounding the alarm on their overwhelmed infrastructure.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e82dae3e-4aae-4348-8eef-531a929eff71?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/65575474-b7ed-4c64-a194-65d9f99e8711?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Click to watch
To my city slicking, east coast dwelling ears, this sounded too insane to be true. It wasn't until these migrants began arriving by the millions in urban centers across the country that the rest of America found out it was a far greater problem than the smooth-talking, holier-than-thou Biden officials were willing to admit.
To make matters worse, the Biden admin had halted ALL construction of the wall, including contracts that were already paid. While the wall builders sat in their trailers and were bankrolled by our government to twiddle their thumbs, what could have been hundreds of miles of additional border protection sat slowly rusting in the dry desert sun.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7f29b41f-abaa-40fa-b122-8e598e74fab2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
All the while, news orgs like my former employer, NBC News (I was a Production Assistant and they paid me the non livable wage of $12 per hour), [told us that Kamala's pledge to address the "root causes" of immigration were yielding tremendous success.](https://substack.com/redirect/6d2f9290-d6bf-4788-8e32-c0cad9b704e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Now that we established the Biden admin oversaw the most reckless and preventable immigration crisis in American history, let's get to Kamala's empty pledge to address the "root causes" of the immigration crisis. I traveled to Guatemala in October of 2022. I joined the Guatemalan Air Force in a Vietnam-era Huey flying from Guatemala city to the southern border between Guatemala and Honduras. This time I wasn't belted into the gunner seat as I was in the Blackhawk, but sitting on the floor with my feet dangling on the door, holding on for dear life because there were no seatbelts for me.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/588e34b4-1adb-425b-8f0b-cefe64da452c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
On site at the port of entry, the authorities assured me that they were doing everything they could to prevent border crossings. But much like my visits to America's southern border during the Biden Admin, the reality on the ground told a much different tale.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ff63e55f-b862-42c9-ac19-848e266649ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I spoke to one man who had come from West Africa via a container ship that arrived in Brazil, then he proceeded through the grueling jungle of the Darren Gap in Panama. Standing within 100 yards of the border crossing where the guards told me they were enforcing the port of entry, this man told me he had simply walked through. Kamala's "root cause" approach apparently had more to do with investing American taxpayer dollars in central American economies than ensuring their borders were actually secure.
Whether it was the border, inflation, domestic crime, or tactical realities in the wars of Ukraine and the Middle East, the Biden Administration spent four years telling American citizens not to believe their lying eyes. This is why Trump will be President in less than a month. If the Democrats are smart they will realize that the "root cause" of their epic electoral failure came down to one thing: they believed that the American people are dumb but they are not.
* * *
# A firsthand account of the left-wing riots that destroyed America
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a8178b61-9979-4d9f-a872-603a66d67304?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Pick up "Riot Diet" Today](https://substack.com/redirect/a8178b61-9979-4d9f-a872-603a66d67304?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *

Do you agree that gerrymandering is cheating?
