Peter,Republicans maintained a majority in the United States House of Representatives this November’s election — but only with a narrow, five-seat margin. And when we account for the upcoming vacancies of Elise Stefanik, Michael Waltz, and Matt Gaetz, we’re looking at just a two-seat margin: 217 - 215. Now consider this: The gerrymandered maps in North Carolina flipped _three_ seats held by Democrats. That’s right: **Without the seats that Republicans won through a brutal, egregiously partisan, mid-Census gerrymander, Democrats could have won a majority in the U.S. House.** [**Do you think this is unfair? Do you agree that gerrymandering is cheating? Donate to help fund the work that’s protecting fair maps and fighting back against undemocratic power grabs.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99414672/519841494/1701676424?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_NCGerrymanderingNOR_email_20241228-NDRC-Tier1-NCGerrymanderingNOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241228-NDRC-Tier1-NCGerrymanderingNOR_&utm_campaign=NCGerrymanderingNOR&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRiZTdhYzhiLTQ1YzUtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Zdxi6QF8abR73ll2xjhzUcjegY5XSxTJSUbWm6y9S0o=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

North Carolina is actually a perfect example of why we do this work — and the impact your support can have on fair maps across the country.
The maps drawn in North Carolina following the 2020 Census were some of the most extreme in the country. In fact, the state supreme court ruled that the maps were such blatant examples of partisan gerrymandering that they violated the state constitution.
So the court redrew the maps — and on those new court-drawn maps, voters in the battleground state elected seven Democrats and seven Republicans to Congress in 2022. The maps were fair and representative! A huge win for democracy!
But then, a Republican majority in the state supreme court _REVERSED_ the original ruling and the maps were, yet again, redrawn. These new maps make North Carolina again one of the most egregiously gerrymandered states in the country.
**Anti-democracy politicians pursued map manipulation in order to win unearned power — and it worked:**
Despite Democratic candidates receiving **43% of the total votes cast for Congress** in November, **only 4 of the 14 (29%)** seats were won by Democrats. That’s a sign that maps aren’t fairly drawn. [**If you believe that voters should choose their representatives — and not the other way around — contribute now to help restore fairness to our democracy.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99414686/519841512/1701676424?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_NCGerrymanderingNOR_email_20241228-NDRC-Tier1-NCGerrymanderingNOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241228-NDRC-Tier1-NCGerrymanderingNOR_&utm_campaign=NCGerrymanderingNOR&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRiZTdhYzhiLTQ1YzUtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Zdxi6QF8abR73ll2xjhzUcjegY5XSxTJSUbWm6y9S0o=)
One piece of good news from the election is that North Carolinians re-elected Democracy Defender Justice Allison Riggs to the state supreme court. We threw our full support behind Justice Riggs in that race because she’s a fair-minded champion of every American’s fundamental rights, including voting rights. And during ongoing rounds of recounts (including outrageous efforts to throw out properly cast ballots), we’ve supported efforts to make sure every voter’s voice was heard.
Justice Riggs’s re-election will ensure that critical pro-democracy leadership remains a force on this massively influential court — and it also prevents yet another extreme partisan voice from joining the court.
**We’ll continue to build on this momentum to keep fighting for fair maps in North Carolina — and stop GOP mid-cycle gerrymanders across the country.**
[**If you believe that this work matters, please make a donation of any amount right now to fight back against gerrymandering.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99414687/519841513/1701676424?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_NCGerrymanderingNOR_email_20241228-NDRC-Tier1-NCGerrymanderingNOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241228-NDRC-Tier1-NCGerrymanderingNOR_&utm_campaign=NCGerrymanderingNOR&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRiZTdhYzhiLTQ1YzUtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Zdxi6QF8abR73ll2xjhzUcjegY5XSxTJSUbWm6y9S0o=)
Thank you,
National Democratic Redistricting Committee

clean_body: Do you agree that gerrymandering is cheating? | Peter,Republicans maintained a majority in the United States House of Representatives this November’s election — but only with a narrow, five-seat margin. And when we account for the upcoming vacancies of Elise Stefanik, Michael Waltz, and Matt Gaetz, we’re looking at just a two-seat margin: 217 - 215. Now consider this: The gerrymandered maps in North Carolina flipped three seats held by Democrats. That’s right: Without the seats that Republicans won through a brutal, egregiously partisan, mid-Census gerrymander, Democrats could have won a majority in the U.S. House. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = North Carolina is actually a perfect example of why we do this work — and the impact your support can have on fair maps across the country. The maps drawn in North Carolina following the 2020 Census were some of the most extreme in the country. In fact, the state supreme court ruled that the maps were such blatant examples of partisan gerrymandering that they violated the state constitution. So the court redrew the maps — and on those new court-drawn maps, voters in the battleground state elected seven Democrats and seven Republicans to Congress in 2022. The maps were fair and representative! A huge win for democracy! But then, a Republican majority in the state supreme court REVERSED the original ruling and the maps were, yet again, redrawn. These new maps make North Carolina again one of the most egregiously gerrymandered states in the country. Anti-democracy politicians pursued map manipulation in order to win unearned power — and it worked: Despite Democratic candidates receiving 43% of the total votes cast for Congress in November, only 4 of the 14 (29%) seats were won by Democrats. That’s a sign that maps aren’t fairly drawn. = One piece of good news from the election is that North Carolinians re-elected Democracy Defender Justice Allison Riggs to the state supreme court. We threw our full support behind Justice Riggs in that race because she’s a fair-minded champion of every American’s fundamental rights, including voting rights. And during ongoing rounds of recounts (including outrageous efforts to throw out properly cast ballots), we’ve supported efforts to make sure every voter’s voice was heard. Justice Riggs’s re-election will ensure that critical pro-democracy leadership remains a force on this massively influential court — and it also prevents yet another extreme partisan voice from joining the court. We’ll continue to build on this momentum to keep fighting for fair maps in North Carolina — and stop GOP mid-cycle gerrymanders across the country. = Thank you, National Democratic Redistricting Committee = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Look friend, I get it — we send quite a few message to your inbox, and it’s not always the best time. But each message is crucial, especially during fundraising deadlines like these.
Donald Trump is assembling the _richest_ cabinet in history, and we know that he has a record of cutting breaks for himself and his wealthy buddies on the backs of everyday folks.
The extreme right may bankroll their candidates with big checks tied to special interests, but I’d rather rely on support from this grassroots movement than depend on wealthy donors who are not invested in moving our communities forward.
Every contribution we receive from emails like this one helps me spend more time focusing on fighting for folks like you in Congress than fundraising. With your support, we can build a strong grassroots team dedicated to pushing for an agenda that benefits everyday working people.
In January, the 119th Congress will begin, and we need to hit the ground running. Your support is crucial to ensure we have the resources to advocate for important issues, such as healthcare, job creation, and education reform.
**[If you can spare anything at all, please make a donation before our deadline on December 31st to help us reach our grassroots goal before the ball drops.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99415028/519842084/-147474916?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC120_20241228_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDE1MGQ3Mi00OGM1LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zD9QFWAHHevOruxeUkKN2duF4eSIKTyDNTbGSzW34Z8=)**

clean_body: In January, the 119th Congress will begin, and we need to hit the ground running. | = Hi team, It’s the last Saturday of 2024 and next week, we will not only ring in the new year but also close the books on our grassroots fundraising for this year. = | = Look friend, I get it — we send quite a few message to your inbox, and it’s not always the best time. But each message is crucial, especially during fundraising deadlines like these. Donald Trump is assembling the richest cabinet in history, and we know that he has a record of cutting breaks for himself and his wealthy buddies on the backs of everyday folks. The extreme right may bankroll their candidates with big checks tied to special interests, but I’d rather rely on support from this grassroots movement than depend on wealthy donors who are not invested in moving our communities forward. Every contribution we receive from emails like this one helps me spend more time focusing on fighting for folks like you in Congress than fundraising. With your support, we can build a strong grassroots team dedicated to pushing for an agenda that benefits everyday working people. In January, the 119th Congress will begin, and we need to hit the ground running. Your support is crucial to ensure we have the resources to advocate for important issues, such as healthcare, job creation, and education reform. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you for powering my efforts. Together, we can make a real difference. With gratitude, Nikki = | **= Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States | mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Just 1 SEAT?!
body:
Our new majority is on the brink.
| [](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=b2f2c023e7f74966bbb59c72a4f95845&_e=ShJKasiDw23gCNmRNJxugg9h3oduSjqmdF_ZfoFZJbBvvwpjLuhcjawK3uj9SxIUAu8N4HF0JPlB8VJKokky5AMpLaYmhenslxtPsyvTogmFtdbqVZhtp3AHPJ6Fmvtt6t4Tv5wS9gWS2XLcN7bnW1MLa99ZS1dQ7mmFkH8tsoAZ0jdNNKy-VBU1XnTsebaXVL-yJM8SB-xPeQSakBRlm5HZ11ruG0pH-lfseV5TT-n4Da7y5n88WW9i7LgPpkI0DAgauaHBwb5Qspyt-Wxh-7iJGEvyB79g_FFR_JBTp2cLQOMDGaYSmsghcwj6t28cmt50CxxZHkhqXVVlVbHL6tI3QjjxkxYQmd_XHIPgzGGpkuOup5hg26IZQef7TnyeinWQWrNJknJ_5IlwDhdYxpnfI9QdsZ_5FU4g8wsiOE4%3D)
---
Peter,
---
Please don’t misunderstand...
---
I don’t want this email to come across as a message of doom and gloom.
---
_After all, no one can deny the sweeping mandate that President Trump and Republicans were just given by voters like YOU, sweeping the White House _AND_ both chambers of Congress. _
---
But we also must face a glaring reality:
---
**Very soon – with a number of special elections already on the books for 2025 – our new majority will be narrowed to just 1 SEAT.**
---
Yes, you read that right. _1 seat._
---

clean_body: Our new majority is on the brink. | Peter, Please don’t misunderstand... I don’t want this email to come across as a message of doom and gloom. After all, no one can deny the sweeping mandate that President Trump and Republicans were just given by voters like YOU, sweeping the White House AND both chambers of Congress. But we also must face a glaring reality: Very soon – with a number of special elections already on the books for 2025 – our new majority will be narrowed to just 1 SEAT. Yes, you read that right. 1 seat. I know how hard you fought for this new majority, Peter. I’m right there with you... Over the course of the election, I transferred $2.5 million from my own campaign to help counter Kamala’s plot to buy our House majority. And now that our new majority could be hanging on by a thread next year, I refuse to let those efforts go to waste. That’s why I have no choice but to reach out before year’s end. I’m asking 2.5 million patriots to match my 2024 commitment with a contribution of ANY amount to help defend our NEW majority that will soon be cut down to just 1 SEAT. - Thank you, Jim Jordan Paid for by Team Jordan a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed between Jim Jordan for Congress, Buckeye Liberty Fund, and American Liberty Foundation PAC. PO Box 909, Marysville, OH 43040 |

body:
This year changed my life, and your unwavering support played a vital role.

George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by running to represent New York's 16th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-Phg2RhDIEGJVPbb5vK87g2?unsubscribedata=A39xy7kvEi5Ctn9IypiPaGNbh%2FnEFm2ptGXlUwJ2KwPTHE9mL3fxOKuWYJIkcgaAKkLmS5HwGsBZtSgRHOi0Cyr2i3TF6iJ2EfhI53OLDaveNIRkuhG5%2FdC0u383W3K9dwJGs6yVShwto9PNTnJPBqUa0QHclFhBkkQB8JkCioElM8Oi1yxkOlOCoLEWLi1Qp29p6h%2Fo8CTQKmgxo4Utxz1Tejz4xSUInnMvCxf%2Fr58v2w9UPJkZxd%2FJWDYsUnfQgWFfZt2YFEUG5k8YRRK5JGnfFkXNML6UcIiqENeWFL9oTf74iWyUGfCAtcu1UFUD5No4pfBYh7LAt6k0Tfj4r%2B79rAok0XcTXWB0VcmfOr8OQZ0sk84ZTd4P0NA5Jk8HyxAOmHKBSDM%2BuyHKn5%2Fb%2F4qDThGwrlGuJoJz7YqP91a2uP0oog0cVg4xk6ms70M0)

Peter, As we approach the end of the year, I’ve been reflecting on all we accomplished together. **This year changed my life, and your unwavering support played a vital role.** This time last year, I had just announced my campaign for Congress, and we were facing down our first FEC deadline of the cycle. Now, a year later, we’re days away from our final FEC deadline of the cycle. This team has shown up for every mid-month, end-of-month, and end-of-quarter deadline that we’ve faced. You helped me win a competitive primary, and then elected me to be your next Congressman. And now, I’m asking you to show up one more time before the end of 2024. [On Tuesday, we’re facing our final FEC deadline, and it’s critical that we knock this deadline out of the park and show that our momentum has not slowed down since November. For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality.

clean_body: This year changed my life, and your unwavering support played a vital role. George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by running to represent New York's 16th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, As we approach the end of the year, I’ve been reflecting on all we accomplished together. This year changed my life, and your unwavering support played a vital role. This time last year, I had just announced my campaign for Congress, and we were facing down our first FEC deadline of the cycle. Now, a year later, we’re days away from our final FEC deadline of the cycle. This team has shown up for every mid-month, end-of-month, and end-of-quarter deadline that we’ve faced. You helped me win a competitive primary, and then elected me to be your next Congressman. subject: Reflecting
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
As we wrap up 2024, I can’t help but reflect on all the good work we were able to accomplish together this year.

While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=t9gA4HhjWlFtjTBpoIyoHXCs7aAU9ZjLjhy7OwtdNvhLZpdovzpsNx5NisDfjRNmIualOY%2FAp6%2F1rN1t%2BQ2oyS2NCYrbftH9C76GjvLHYT92nRHDF2K7%2FR6dNJoOoAtzVtgpitkKFi6MRFGDeJ49BmDDWuts1ZPtMtnFAgtBLaXjQYaHLzV38x6EpqiruFHh1RqTgBKO0di%2BUxfNT%2Bi%2BAM1GlnA4cILTBE6jRS7VlbAfDwA%2BNNme4G4L3vyedzKaw%2BPzKlDoCgEULs5ocMWZqrMkrqlz3NvMLFvW%2BojWpTKWGt6vvCKvWn5tWoGteSUR42XQIyR4TdFg3s0FFMQYwcHxPPwLYHOAFoLKiOTeKnuzQwqCA1Ze1yOAWWkilDERGp2sWv0QRKTgToHYBkd4DY0dJVq4Q%2FcJKb%2BaBexrrpOT1cySpA8188rg3ZqOXVwi)

As we wrap up 2024, I can’t help but reflect on all the good work we were able to accomplish together this year. Be it championing expansions of Medicare for uninsured families or fighting to guarantee our veterans are getting the benefits they deserve, each day in Congress brings us a unique opportunity to advance legislation that puts us on the path to progress. Since day one, that’s exactly what I’ve done — and I couldn’t be more grateful to have the chance to continue fighting for you in Congress. But here’s the deal: Next year, we’ll be entering a Republican trifecta in Washington. In an era of uncertainty about what the future holds, it’s never been more important for us to stand united in defense of our values and belief in a better future for all. My team has set an ambitious goal of raising $15,000 by the new year to give us the resources we need to keep up this fight, and right now, falling short isn’t an option. [Having you by my side will make all the difference — and I’m counting on your support. The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress and to flip the House blue this November.**

clean_body: As we wrap up 2024, I can’t help but reflect on all the good work we were able to accomplish together this year. While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | As we wrap up 2024, I can’t help but reflect on all the good work we were able to accomplish together this year. Be it championing expansions of Medicare for uninsured families or fighting to guarantee our veterans are getting the benefits they deserve, each day in Congress brings us a unique opportunity to advance legislation that puts us on the path to progress. Since day one, that’s exactly what I’ve done — and I couldn’t be more grateful to have the chance to continue fighting for you in Congress. But here’s the deal: Next year, we’ll be entering a Republican trifecta in Washington. In an era of uncertainty about what the future holds, it’s never been more important for us to stand united in defense of our values and belief in a better future for all. My team has set an ambitious goal of raising $15,000 by the new year to give us the resources we need to keep up this fight, and right now, falling short isn’t an option. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = Only together can we secure a future we are all proud of. Thank you for your support, Raul | | | ---|---|--- = The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress and to flip the House blue this November.** | = = PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =. Dr. Raul Ruiz for Congress Committee P.O. Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 United States

body:
Abigail’s career in Congress has been characterized by getting things done and bringing people together, and her impact on Virginia is clear.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99416843/519845968/-1898250644?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-12-28_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDM1MTE3MTktNGRjNS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=p6l0iYwZ2gOC3XjWOJcRDMZBcmayrABPs2nzZYJ4lyI=)

| Peter,

On January 3, Abigail will officially wrap up her six years in Congress representing the people of Virginia’s Seventh District.

Abigail’s career in Congress has been characterized by getting things done and bringing people together, and her impact on Virginia is clear.

She has been part of landmark legislation over the last six years, including but not limited to the _Inflation Reduction Act_ , the _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_ , and the _Honoring Our PACT Act_. Abigail is committed to continuing this important work as Governor, where her top priorities are strengthening our public schools, lowering costs for families, keeping our kids safe, and safeguarding reproductive rights.

**Virginia deserves leaders like Abigail, and we have to do all we can NOW to make sure she can continue her important work as Governor of Virginia.[_Your support is critical to our campaign’s success, and we’re hoping you’ll join us by contributing to her campaign today ahead of our December 31st reporting deadline:_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99416847/519845977/-1898250644?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-12-28_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDM1MTE3MTktNGRjNS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=p6l0iYwZ2gOC3XjWOJcRDMZBcmayrABPs2nzZYJ4lyI=)**

clean_body: Abigail’s career in Congress has been characterized by getting things done and bringing people together, and her impact on Virginia is clear. | = | Peter, On January 3, Abigail will officially wrap up her six years in Congress representing the people of Virginia’s Seventh District. Abigail’s career in Congress has been characterized by getting things done and bringing people together, and her impact on Virginia is clear. She has been part of landmark legislation over the last six years, including but not limited to the Inflation Reduction Act , the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act , and the Honoring Our PACT Act. Abigail is committed to continuing this important work as Governor, where her top priorities are strengthening our public schools, lowering costs for families, keeping our kids safe, and safeguarding reproductive rights. Virginia deserves leaders like Abigail, and we have to do all we can NOW to make sure she can continue her important work as Governor of Virginia.= | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Spanberger for Governor Team * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

I’m running against Trump and DeSantis’s hand picked nominee, Randy Fine. He’s a far-right extremist who will be a rubber stamp on everything they want to do in Congress.**_[

To stop him, we first need a strong launch to our campaign. That's why I’m counting on you to chip in what you can to help us win.](https://vxobal.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyNDk3NjcsXCJsXCI6MTQxOTkwMDcyMDkzMjQ2Njc3LFwiclwiOjE0MTk5MDA4NDk5ODA3MTMwMn0iLCJzIjoiZThkNWNiZDk4YmJhMTQ3NiJ9)_**

This race is winnable with a bold and clear message for Florida’s Sixth Congressional District.

As you know, special elections are a more favorable electorate for Democrats. And with Trump poised to create chaos in Washington, this could be an incredibly favorable electoral climate for a candidate like me.

I believe our nation is only as wealthy as its poorest citizens. The tax dollars of the working class are used to subsidize the lifestyles of billionaires while we struggle with rising food costs, an inaccessible housing market, and access to health care.

Unlike some other Democrats, I get it because I don’t come from money. I’ve been a public educator in Osceola.

Dan, I'm really counting on you. Will you donate $10, $25, or more so we can defeat Trump’s handpicked nominee and flip the House of Representatives?

Thank you for your contribution,

name: Hillsdale College via Liberty Pulse
subject: Your input is needed
body:
It’s a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: who rules whom?
| | |
---
| | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=deaf58b86f8849858aa3d8cca9e2a4fe&_t=ka4qPmKM85C9qAREUCfu616PSzZkIyso660fVMrAHwJ6R5L-dPkYQtbOA7P5E9rEiFENEvBfQT25cL4wF4Q1Ecr-vXzoQ-vh5OOoMowj3W-prEV5XYTV4Ec1In5pOrCt)_
---
[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=deaf58b86f8849858aa3d8cca9e2a4fe&_e=9N7YMEonLJIurmj9W7KfPKyr1W1ek-9Cq6iL2dqOpG0e4sxJ3Pp8wqxuxfEzp7iR4Cjfp_npfHLuxxUm0pPdno2L06KYhZtjNcvONVz0EJMGKI-49mXWijZPcPgvwub7D7doYun_nst8GytZU7zXthPq-IbfxqUMxy4kzjH7lDYCR4EkxuEGlIA7X9rU-AqjJ-_VYbr1Lo7mWWgwM5asFvTN8J8hW7w97f7pL6PvTsiqJT_FlY4aa2GfBEh8odl-sMVT2yG9y9AJDM1ztVb3eF9mOV6jaDAVCenNL56UXWZVg9xXmiD6Y1yS3qWOnuuVpEKMU9xsx7-zcTC9STpnmxUfWUUyOxBLq6c1TTTtYmr_CYkAjEmm2hHmArJ-eDIa-Vc0nWRhpCFbn8LJVYNx0w%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=deaf58b86f8849858aa3d8cca9e2a4fe&_e=9N7YMEonLJIurmj9W7KfPKyr1W1ek-9Cq6iL2dqOpG0e4sxJ3Pp8wqxuxfEzp7iR4Cjfp_npfHLuxxUm0pPdno2L06KYhZtjNcvONVz0EJMGKI-49mXWijZPcPgvwub7D7doYun_nst8GytZU7zXthPq-IbfxqUMxy4kzjH7lDYCR4EkxuEGlIA7X9rU-AqjJ-_VYbr1Lo7mWWgwM5asFvTN8J8hW7w97f7pL6PvTsiqJT_FlY4aa2GfBEh8odl-dmWDanapkKflQwpROHVGIExq50SXeTnAjFua-3xGZzX0XBlEl-jt2ZD4Qp4pkNOOq_k4jmSjVv79bJi4WHZsrfbZ8tdivLAjhTOfRy_VXDGg4XFzaRM2GInnuU8IrSCldoi6587WM39rURCMcgLEMQ%3D%3D).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** **** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=deaf58b86f8849858aa3d8cca9e2a4fe&_e=9N7YMEonLJIurmj9W7KfPKyr1W1ek-9Cq6iL2dqOpG0e4sxJ3Pp8wqxuxfEzp7iR4Cjfp_npfHLuxxUm0pPdno2L06KYhZtjNcvONVz0EJMGKI-49mXWijZPcPgvwub7D7doYun_nst8GytZU7zXthPq-IbfxqUMxy4kzjH7lDYCR4EkxuEGlIA7X9rU-AqjJ-_VYbr1Lo7mWWgwM5asFvTN8J8hW7w97f7pL6PvTsiqJT_FlY4aa2GfBEh8odl-YZZvIDPI2D6fBFBvcYhSiFnNPPVFbTE0ZkbIVl5TukWVCeERimcCrkq1xcCpE4-aCpfLGeaTRXirrIYrLmyUFIIkPaTrjDZyzPNEKSJqFVdeQCC8CEf9Ej9i7OXQpsxKPBmfA8xk3pSS1KTR6Q4-oQ%3D%3D)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=deaf58b86f8849858aa3d8cca9e2a4fe&_e=9N7YMEonLJIurmj9W7KfPKyr1W1ek-9Cq6iL2dqOpG0e4sxJ3Pp8wqxuxfEzp7iR4Cjfp_npfHLuxxUm0pPdno2L06KYhZtjNcvONVz0EJMGKI-49mXWijZPcPgvwub7D7doYun_nst8GytZU7zXthPq-IbfxqUMxy4kzjH7lDYCR4EkxuEGlIA7X9rU-AqjJ-_VYbr1Lo7mWWgwM5asFvTN8J8hW7w97f7pL6PvTsiqJT_FlY4aa2GfBEh8odl-9J_kC_2EcxnQ0nL-IE0RgvA2BdLZDXiT2hI10Y73iKgsVjEH5Rv70gwqFf4XbdaiDHQ1phWhLc_WtEBfZJBaj4sdcRsZmlrGUAMcvMYhTReW_7ofd9YzDva5fLBTUwWKpBh8Zv2wVxtZF2CRI4Yczw%3D%3D)**

If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its . Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because our country is facing a constitutional crisis. It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: who rules whom? The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history. Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens. ** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations. Together we create hope for a climate safe and healthy future. It’s imperative that we take action and continue to make progress on climate this upcoming legislative session. # Hi Peter, I hope you have been enjoying a warm and joyful holiday with your loved ones.
---
I’m writing to you today to extend a branch of hope as we head into 2025. The holidays remind me of the spirit of togetherness, giving, and hope. The next four years will be tough with Trump back in the White House, but here in Oregon we are lucky to be in a position that many other states aren’t. With newly elected supermajorities in the Oregon House and Senate and pro-environment statewide leaders, we can and must still make progress on climate and defend against threats from the federal level.
---

clean_body: | | | Dear Peter, I’m sure you are busy celebrating this holiday season, resting, and preparing for the new year, so I wanted to make sure that you saw this message from OLCV’s Executive Director. Together we create hope for a climate safe and healthy future. We’re at a critical turning point for the state of our climate. It’s imperative that we take action and continue to make progress on climate this upcoming legislative session. We know that’s no small task in this coming year, as we will simultaneously be defending against federal climate threats. With thanks, Sarah KlineOLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator P.S.: We are in the big push for end of year fundraising. If you would no longer like to receive emails related to end of year fundraising, but still remain on our general email list! | Hi Peter, I hope you have been enjoying a warm and joyful holiday with your loved ones. I’m writing to you today to extend a branch of hope as we head into 2025. The holidays remind me of the spirit of togetherness, giving, and hope. The next four years will be tough with Trump back in the White House, but here in Oregon we are lucky to be in a position that many other states aren’t. With newly elected supermajorities in the Oregon House and Senate and pro-environment statewide leaders, we can and must still make progress on climate and defend against threats from the federal level. | | I’m hopeful about what we can accomplish next year and beyond, but we still need your support. | | | Next year, we have important work to do protecting our clean air and water, making sure Oregonians have access to affordable energy, improving our communities’ climate resiliency, and passing an equitable and climate-friendly transportation package. We have our work cut out for us, and in addition to passing our priorities we know that we will have to defend against threats and rollbacks at the state and federal level. There’s a lot ahead of us, but I’m hopeful because I know that we have you and thousands of other grassroots supporters with us. We accomplished a lot this year — securing nearly $20 million in funding for programs that help low income Oregonians lower their energy bills while increasing energy efficiency and clean energy, passing legislation to reduce e-waste, and protecting and strengthening our marine reserves. We elected over 84% of our endorsed candidates and secured supermajorities in the senate and house. I’m so grateful for all that you do, whether it’s donating, volunteering, or taking one of our online actions. Thank you for being part of our community. Much gratitude, Lindsey ScholtenOLCV Executive Director P.S.: We are in the big push for end of year fundraising. Peter,

We’re 3 days away from our final FEC fundraising deadline of the year. Will you **[chip in $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99417460/519847969/2104826962?refcode=em-12.28.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzUyODQyZC00ZWM1LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FQs_oXz3D6xMgyQSy_zVrVC0Y3fo5devsSXNpcWinb0=)** , then read along about why your support is so important?

I’m fired up to officially be sworn into Congress next week, and get to work for CA-27. If you’ve kept up on the news lately, you know this is a tumultuous time to be entering Washington.

Extremists in Congress continue to foment chaos, and I expect that will only increase in the new year – along with their attempts to replace me with one of their own.

**I’m not deterred by these challenges.** We overcame the odds and flipped this seat blue back in November, and our community is trusting me to deliver.

Meeting our $50,000 end‐of‐year goal is a surefire way to prove that our movement is still strong. As a reminder, this report will go public for Republican leadership to scour for any weakness.

**[I know I’ve asked a lot of you in recent months, and I thank you for your continued support. $3, or any amount, today would go a long way in keeping our momentum going.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99417461/519847970/2104826962?refcode=em-12.28.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzUyODQyZC00ZWM1LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FQs_oXz3D6xMgyQSy_zVrVC0Y3fo5devsSXNpcWinb0=)**

| | The final fundraising deadline of 2024 is just days away, and this is our moment to show the Democrats that we’re not backing down. _While they still have a hold on Oregon, we are fighting every single day to take back our state and defend the conservative values that make Oregon great._ We know the challenges ahead, but we also know the strength of our movement. By ending this year stronger than ever, we’ll be ready to hit the ground running in 2025. **Every dollar raised before midnight on December 31st is a powerful message that Oregon Republicans are united, determined, and ready to lead.** We can’t afford to slow down now. The 2025 Legislative Session gets underway in January. This is about more than just numbers – it’s about showing the strength of our grassroots army and preparing for the battles ahead. name: Liz Walters, ODP Chair
subject: A heartfelt thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99417613/519848474/614831798?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_EOY_241228_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGNlNTY1OC00ZWM1LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=In7mslMyjwieBZFhfaVMy27Z9XsYiLpKUnK7TlokbGo=) Team,

As we look back on this year, I want to take a moment to say **thank you.**

Thank you for showing up, for standing up, and for believing in the power of grassroots organizing. We faced hard battles and, at times, heartbreaking losses. But through it all, one thing gave me hope: **you.**

Your grassroots support – every single dollar, every volunteer shift, every conversation with a neighbor – was a reminder that we are not alone in this fight.

It’s not always easy, but progress takes persistence. And as we look ahead to 2025, we need to carry this energy forward. We’re going to need your continued support to rebuild, re-energize, and prepare for what comes next.

[_**Will you chip in $5 or more before our end-of-year fundraising deadline to help us keep this momentum clean_body: | = Team, As we look back on this year, I want to take a moment to say thank you. Thank you for showing up, for standing up, and for believing in the power of grassroots organizing. We faced hard battles and, at times, heartbreaking losses. But through it all, one thing gave me hope: you. Your grassroots support – every single dollar, every volunteer shift, every conversation with a neighbor – was a reminder that we are not alone in this fight. It’s not always easy, but progress takes persistence. And as we look ahead to 2025, we need to carry this energy forward. We’re going to need your continued support to rebuild, re-energize, and prepare for what comes next. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = Thank you for being part of this team – in the hard times and the hopeful ones. name: Sarah McBride
subject: I didn't run for Congress to talk about which bathroom I use
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
I ran to advocate for the people who are facing life's biggest challenges and those who love them.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99418371/519850561/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2024.12.28_McBride_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmQ4OGRmNy01MWM1LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bTcVQdVDAQyhxgKlOr9Rlqob6P0uz4ZaRZ4izCsp8-o=&emci=24e3970a-47be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=cbd88df7-51c5-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=23483442) | Hi Peter, it’s Sarah McBride. **I didn’t run for Congress to talk about which bathroom I use.** I ran to advocate for the people who are facing life’s biggest challenges and those who love them. **People like my husband, Andy.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99418372/519850562/1807184357?amount=10&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2024.12.28_McBride_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmQ4OGRmNy01MWM1LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bTcVQdVDAQyhxgKlOr9Rlqob6P0uz4ZaRZ4izCsp8-o=) When Andy was diagnosed with cancer just one year into our relationship, I became his primary caregiver — with him through the ups and the downs, making sure that he had everything he needed and, in the end, holding his hand as he passed away. I know how difficult it is to balance a full-time job with taking care of someone I love because I lived it. Being a caregiver is the most important role I’ve ever had. In many ways, we were lucky. Paid leave allowed him to focus on the full-time job of getting care. And my employer’s flexibility allowed me to be there by his side to care for him. Through our struggle, and sharing with others, I came across so many other families who simply didn’t have that same benefit. Patients who were forced to choose between their job and their health care. Parents going back to work days after giving birth. Family members who had to choose between their paycheck and their loved one’s needs. My experience with Andy anchored so much of my work as a state senator in Delaware — from getting paid leave passed to expanding healthcare in rural communities. But there is so much more our government must do to support people when hard times hit and to do something about the very real pain so many feel across our country. That’s why I ran for Congress, and that’s what you can count on me to fight for in Washington — and I won’t get distracted by the people who are trying to divide our country with their agenda of hate. clean_body: I ran to advocate for the people who are facing life's biggest challenges and those who love them. | Hi Peter, it’s Sarah McBride. I didn’t run for Congress to talk about which bathroom I use. I ran to advocate for the people who are facing life’s biggest challenges and those who love them. People like my husband, Andy. = When Andy was diagnosed with cancer just one year into our relationship, I became his primary caregiver — with him through the ups and the downs, making sure that he had everything he needed and, in the end, holding his hand as he passed away. I know how difficult it is to balance a full-time job with taking care of someone I love because I lived it. Being a caregiver is the most important role I’ve ever had. In many ways, we were lucky. Paid leave allowed him to focus on the full-time job of getting care. And my employer’s flexibility allowed me to be there by his side to care for him. Through our struggle, and sharing with others, I came across so many other families who simply didn’t have that same benefit. Patients who were forced to choose between their job and their health care. Parents going back to work days after giving birth. Family members who had to choose between their paycheck and their loved one’s needs. My experience with Andy anchored so much of my work as a state senator in Delaware — from getting paid leave passed to expanding healthcare in rural communities. But there is so much more our government must do to support people when hard times hit and to do something about the very real pain so many feel across our country. That’s why I ran for Congress, and that’s what you can count on me to fight for in Washington — and I won’t get distracted by the people who are trying to divide our country with their agenda of hate. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Sarah McBride and Emily Randall: = = = = = Thank you, Sarah McBride Delaware’s Congresswoman-elect = | | Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress Emily Randall for Congress P.O. Peter, we hope you had a restful holiday with your loved ones. Unfortunately, here at Georgia HQ, we’re cutting our holiday celebration short. **_Why?_** Because we need to start preparing NOW for a Republican trifecta with Donald Trump at the helm to take over in just a few short weeks. But while this year’s election result is a setback, let’s be clear: **It is not a complete defeat.** We entered the 2024 cycle as a new presidential battleground state, and we cemented our status as one for cycles to come. I’ve been fighting for public education for 40 years >>

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99418701/519851325/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWQyZmY4My01M2M1LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ETwtaNraChluHv7vTswomZUm0HLvHXeL0oZ0SpIzaz0=)

Hey Peter, it’s Mark.

I recently sent over a petition asking engaged Democrats to add their name to stand with the Department of Education against attempts to abolish it — and I’m still waiting on your response.

[**We have limited time to act before Trump takes office and his media circus completely distracts from any public action — but we need massive support: If you could take 1 minute to add your signature, I would be deeply appreciative »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99418702/519851326/892807758?refcode=MTFC_20241228_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_NS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWQyZmY4My01M2M1LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ETwtaNraChluHv7vTswomZUm0HLvHXeL0oZ0SpIzaz0=&emci=1fd1e1be-a6c0-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=e9d2ff83-53c5-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=18839602) | [ADD YOUR NAME TO STAND WITH THE DEPARTMENT OF EDUCATION »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99418703/519851327/892807758?refcode=MTFC_20241228_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_NS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWQyZmY4My01M2M1LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ETwtaNraChluHv7vTswomZUm0HLvHXeL0oZ0SpIzaz0=&emci=1fd1e1be-a6c0-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=e9d2ff83-53c5-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=18839602)
---
Thank you so much,

Mark

**P.S. You can read my original message below.**
**Before running for Congress I was an English teacher for 20 years.** Here I am in the classroom back in 1994. Simpler times.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99418704/519851328/892807758?refcode=MTFC_20241228_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_NS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWQyZmY4My01M2M1LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ETwtaNraChluHv7vTswomZUm0HLvHXeL0oZ0SpIzaz0=&emci=1fd1e1be-a6c0-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=e9d2ff83-53c5-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=18839602)
Working with students and their parents has still been the most rewarding part of my decades in public service.

**Looking back, it would be unconscionable to think that just 30 years after that picture was taken, the very foundation of public education in this country – the Department of Education – would be under attack.**

**_Let me be as abundantly clear_ : abolishing the Department of Education would be a disaster– for our students, for our teachers, for parents, for our economy, and for our future.**

Donald Trump and his MAGA cronies want to dismantle public education in this country. Top to bottom, inside and out, they want to gut education and force working families to pay more taxes for less.

I know this seems like a losing fight, Peter. But that’s exactly what Donald Trump wants you to feel. He wants you to feel defeated. He wants you to give up and acquiesce to his extreme agenda. **We cannot let him win.**

We have to fight back, Peter. For students, for parents, for teachers, and for our future. This is one of the most important fights we’ll take on in the New Year.

[**If you’re willing to stand with me, can you add your name to the growing list of Democrats defending the Department of Education from MAGA Republicans? I am hoping to see at least 150 new signatures from PA tonight. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99418705/519851329/892807758?refcode=MTFC_20241228_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_NS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWQyZmY4My01M2M1LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ETwtaNraChluHv7vTswomZUm0HLvHXeL0oZ0SpIzaz0=&emci=1fd1e1be-a6c0-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=e9d2ff83-53c5-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=18839602)
[ADD YOUR NAME TO STAND WITH THE DEPARTMENT OF EDUCATION »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99418706/519851330/892807758?refcode=MTFC_20241228_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_NS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWQyZmY4My01M2M1LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ETwtaNraChluHv7vTswomZUm0HLvHXeL0oZ0SpIzaz0=&emci=1fd1e1be-a6c0-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=e9d2ff83-53c5-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=18839602)

Mark Takano

What a final week of 2024!
An invitation to The Candidate virtual screening on Jan 16, The Qasim Rashid Show Episode 151, House publishes Gaetz ethics report accusing him of statutory rape, Trump threatens to invade foreign nations, Let's Address This surpasses 11 million reads, judicial ethics and terror charges, and affirmative action repeal means historic revival of white supremacy. * **Sunday:**[The Candidate -- A Special Virtual Screening](https://substack.com/redirect/8ee59afc-63dd-4384-b515-80db63f9a760?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Join us from your couch on Jan 16 for a virtual screening of a documentary on my runs for US Congress
* **Monday:**
* [The Qasim Rashid Show Episode 151](https://substack.com/redirect/afb7e683-ff39-4765-b4dc-28c0b9ee3960?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Lawyer****[Elizabeth Booker Houston](https://open.substack.com/pub/bookersquared) joins to discuss the state of our democracy, how we can slow (stop?) fascism
* [US House Publishes Gaetz Ethics Report](https://substack.com/redirect/9cbc71cb-41ee-4d64-aef0-aee9f40f0e77?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Statutory rape, drug abuse, and the five most damning findings from the MAGA led House ethics committee

* **Wednesday:** [Let's Address This Surpasses 11 MILLION Reads](https://substack.com/redirect/db6a5bb1-dcd1-493a-a7cf-dab69a330600?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): A key update as we prep for a 2025 onslaught of Trumpian disinfo and attacks on our civil rights
* **Thursday:[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/fdd4a37e-f6fb-4e31-9c12-562dabf30cad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[Judges, Terror Charges, & Health Insurance Corporations](https://substack.com/redirect/f19f5684-259a-4ffa-833f-9fce380b1e65?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): The hidden truth about the Judges overseeing cases against citizens charged with terrorism
* **Friday:**[Affirmative Action Repeal & Rising White Supremacy](https://substack.com/redirect/05e1d731-ed9a-4018-9b4a-2895ad523a4e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): New Harvard data reminds us that racist policies are not only systemic--they're getting worse

name: Jason Miyares
subject: I’ll admit it — I’m proud of this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
This took years. But it made history...| | | Friend, This was a victory years in the making. I’m incredibly proud of my top-of-the-line Medicaid Fraud Control Unit, whose years of hard work helped secure a **[**$650 million resolution**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=d5dbc1ac0eee4fc3ac48b1b0230e565a&_e=Mxf7F3zU2BSfiWRhFds-1zdheVBD2AXhsdnAYikov14IW9nI0n9BlLDoXx5kX-HRjRXsWlmAAeMmCFlgG_RFliyvV3lQ9boyUI3pqgP3Fcp7YEWIkfmDyC0oCATYHfSxOkl-jgsd-JrAX5_6_Jt9Cb-RL4vItu09PlwjQBIWl55nrktW0HEWaXtUlHTZaaHqyb_nlWdoXsZi2VIn7IXf-rrtoIsV6eFlC9kAL8RsFpsa1V3vPHjph6onWjVpvecFq8cfyUfwGYwemmr0wyh-tN7Mq2Ckq6wWXIRrCG-qM7aP-5sHdEQ0rJzr5vRx8GB-a-L2UqK6liV_7-5qZrilkk07KvMRqIBblGCYIcG6NWf9ScCVBORKhCN6AWL5jpE6)** holding McKinsey accountable for its role in enabling Purdue Pharma’s reckless promotion of OxyContin, which has devastated communities across Virginia and the nation. _They treated innocent lives as mere chemistry experiments. _ **[This historic $650 million resolution sends a clear message: no one, not even the world’s largest consulting firm, is above the law.](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=d5dbc1ac0eee4fc3ac48b1b0230e565a&_e=Mxf7F3zU2BSfiWRhFds-1zdheVBD2AXhsdnAYikov14IW9nI0n9BlLDoXx5kX-HRjRXsWlmAAeMmCFlgG_RFliyvV3lQ9boyUI3pqgP3Fcp7YEWIkfmDyC0oCATYHfSxOkl-jgsd-JrAX5_6_Jt9Cb-RL4vItu09PlwjQBIWl55nrktW0HEWaXtUlHTZaaHqyb_nlWdoXsZi2VIn7IXf-mDBlcyezirZbnv-E2QHLqKNKQgdQTVo23a3ymxmr5iIDR5djyRrkx5gcgCsPVD4VMvIlYq7aA5y1pmmEqEfvqusqrm9ZzXnxc5KVKuMe-aMoRl3thlOeF8fYPMSXADbQHXQbjH9xUPnFTzKYV3mmYiOVIVjOZ2guHj2pMXuJzDi)** Whether you’re a fancy consultant or a petty shoplifter, you face the consequences if you break the law. That’s exactly why I became Attorney General. I believe in the rule of law.
Holding criminals accountable is my job. **And that’s what I intend to keep doing in 2025 when I am re-elected. Will you help me keep going?**
---
[**HELP JASON KEEP FIGHTING**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=d5dbc1ac0eee4fc3ac48b1b0230e565a&_e=Mxf7F3zU2BSfiWRhFds-1zdheVBD2AXhsdnAYikov14IW9nI0n9BlLDoXx5kX-HRjRXsWlmAAeMmCFlgG_RFliyvV3lQ9boyUI3pqgP3Fcp7YEWIkfmDyC0oCATYHfSxOkl-jgsd-JrAX5_6_Jt9Cb-RL4vItu09PlwjQBIWl55nrktW0HEWaXtUlHTZaaHqyb_nlWdoXsZi2VIn7IXf-q9WJz-AR-_41dB0WS1u7LwNGn_ZeADiCiaK3XRa7PGUJ7XDkWGvadeKv1FMv_mVkKhs9T51VaLh9BxXdmuOd-SEeS4E8_-yzrH3w7fhYE9Q7Zxc7vdAoXbqhI6RPvqvyD4NkohhAYG5sMRfeDaHPfFT2a8SVK8406N8XJPG8RaY)
---
Thank you,Jason MiyaresVirginia Attorney General

body:
Protecting choice state by state |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99418842/519851575/-1512887892?refcode=WTEFEX51_20241228_Bans_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1055515&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODJiMzA0OS01NGM1LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ohrQzaiybnLUfQuTB49MAWnkqF5T8zMD-4T8CXeF7_w=) Peter, this is the state of abortion bans heading into 2025: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99418843/519851583/-1512887892?refcode=WTEFEX51_20241228_Bans_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1055515&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODJiMzA0OS01NGM1LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ohrQzaiybnLUfQuTB49MAWnkqF5T8zMD-4T8CXeF7_w=) Thanks to Arizona voters, abortion rights are now enshrined in the state constitution — one of seven states that voted to protect abortion rights this November. And in North Dakota, a judge struck down the state's abortion ban — an important victory in a historically red state.

But, despite these big steps forward, Peter, there's clearly still a lot of work to be done.

We know extremist Republicans are going to do everything in their power to ban abortion nationwide — especially with Trump in the White House.

**The best way to fight anti-choice extremism is by electing Democratic pro-choice women to _every level_ of elected office.**

That's why we're hitting the ground running on _day one_ of 2025. We're already endorsing women up and down the ballot who will stand against GOP extremism and protect our fundamental freedoms. [**Will you donate now toward our End-of-Year goal to double your impact for Democratic pro-choice women? clean_body: Protecting choice state by state | = Peter, this is the state of abortion bans heading into 2025: = Thanks to Arizona voters, abortion rights are now enshrined in the state constitution — one of seven states that voted to protect abortion rights this November. And in North Dakota, a judge struck down the state's abortion ban — an important victory in a historically red state. But, despite these big steps forward, Peter, there's clearly still a lot of work to be done. We know extremist Republicans are going to do everything in their power to ban abortion nationwide — especially with Trump in the White House. The best way to fight anti-choice extremism is by electing Democratic pro-choice women to every level of elected office. That's why we're hitting the ground running on day one of 2025. We're already endorsing women up and down the ballot who will stand against GOP extremism and protect our fundamental freedoms. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, the EMILYs List team = Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Schiff HQ
subject: With 3 days until our final FEC deadline of the year, we’re humbly asking for $3
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8243%2E5257348%2E0uXoqi)
Derek —
**[With just 3 days left until Adam’s final FEC deadline of the year, we’re humbly asking you to pitch in $3 to his campaign.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=dec2024_abs_em.DvQf_W&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20241228_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8243%2E5257348%2E0uXoqi)**
[DONATE $3](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=dec2024_abs_em.DvQf_W&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20241228_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=8243%2E5257348%2E0uXoqi)
---
Here are 3 reasons why we think this is a worthwhile cause:
1. Now that Adam has been sworn in as a U.S. Senator, he’s taking up the fights he mentioned on the campaign trail for so long: making the economy work for us all, increasing the supply of affordable housing, fighting climate change, protecting our democracy, and more.
2. We also need Adam to continue speaking out against Donald Trump’s most extreme Cabinet nominations. For years, no one has been more effective than Adam at holding Trump and his cronies accountable, and that work continues in the Senate.
3. In 3 days, Adam’s campaign has its final FEC deadline of the year. While he might not be up for election soon, the GOP will be scrutinizing Adam’s fundraising report to see how much grassroots momentum he has in his work standing up to Trump and the MAGA movement.

Derek, we could list dozens of other reasons why to support Adam — including that Donald Trump and Elon Musk continue to attack him and call for his imprisonment (_including just this month_).
**[Ahead of our final FEC deadline of the year, will you chip in to help Adam fight for progress in the Senate while standing up to the MAGA movement coming after him?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=dec2024_abs_em.L2yLSN&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20241228_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=8243%2E5257348%2E0uXoqi)**

name: VoteVets
subject: It makes a difference. Really.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
$5. That’s the donation we’re asking you to make to VoteVets today, as we kick off our final fundraising drive of the year.
#
Peter,
In just a moment, we are going to ask you to make a contribution to VoteVets as we continue our final, year-end fundraising drive. Please give us a chance to explain why this request is so important.
Here is the truth:
Ever since the campaign ended, our online fundraising has slowed to a drip.
We get it. We asked a lot during the election.
But we need your help to turn it around.
In just a few days, Republicans will have complete control of the federal government.
The MAGA Right is going to come for everything we hold dear — and the benefits and health care that Veterans fought for decades to earn is at the top of their list.
We’ve got a lot to do, and we need your help.
So please:
[**Can you make a donation of $5, $10, or anything you can afford to VoteVets today? We’ll put it to work fighting for Veterans and Military Families in 2025.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec24.0YbT0m&refcode=em241228-1-90&t=1&akid=34043%2E3013755%2EcQXbB1)**

name: NRSC Polling Department
subject: Grade President Trump’s Cabinet nominees
disclaimer_text: Paid for by NRSC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee

subject: Stand bravely with me and Riley
body:
protect and train more young people
| Peter, They failed me.
Leftist college administrators impose more and more unconstitutional restrictions on students like me: what we can say, do, and -- in my case -- write.
Last year, I received a failing grade at the University of Cincinnati for **using the term “biological women.”** The university sided with my professor, refusing to recognize my right -- the right of every American -- to free speech. That’s why I joined the Riley Gaines Center here at your Leadership Institute -- to protect and train more young people to stand up against leftist persecution and speak out for their constitutional liberties, on campus and beyond. Here I am with Riley and our colleague Kaitlynn Wheeler:

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=0340ce1eb56545c2a49a68921b518ba3&_e=JpeoZTeSd-2w2MgbarBN3PTgcz3qAq_QZh3gxByWBYHfIXI6zk8JMn_HnRNEy-YH4p2LoA1WyDG6e44yomcjbxrzSDIf9inNINNKEZjDhVikGlYhfsCyM0S0KYN5ed7j8_rjyirMPFLwGrofaR5qTfi05OGb2Ie-g5iB9T6qhDm-FAXopk_NBZ5BP-uLSxETWgDug6PqcDkSdbfFM-EfkYWf6TS_JP7YVCqbUc-Fd4-Nb399kGshPE8sc9C_6aWIDtSYzM15avTJVUFCjgyYjTpKCuR-xcvpnbuHJTr0_5JZkgjLhcLUNr2oN5nZUYOWqy9MpO_6f_fVvIdHZVHNDOEG9uhpbdKCO4SGthZmuMKHHV4XvhyqTR48H8cs5SsfhdhXiyktb6N4x8xLzuv3yA%3D%3D)
18 million Americans are on college campuses across the country. Peter, if students aren’t free to write the truth in college classrooms, what freedoms can they count on? [Today I ask you to help conservative students fight for their rights this fall. ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=0340ce1eb56545c2a49a68921b518ba3&_e=JpeoZTeSd-2w2MgbarBN3PTgcz3qAq_QZh3gxByWBYHfIXI6zk8JMn_HnRNEy-YH4p2LoA1WyDG6e44yomcjbxrzSDIf9inNINNKEZjDhVikGlYhfsCyM0S0KYN5ed7j8_rjyirMPFLwGrofaR5qTfi05OGb2Ie-g5iB9T6qhDm-FAXopk_NBZ5BP-uLSxETWgDug6PqcDkSdbfFM-EfkYWf6TS_JP7YVCqbUc-Fd4-Nb399kGshPE8sc9C_6aWIS59QrWJ8uSd5dy1xHZ7KVTMjF8v_HdIwEE8MubNRjlTaedUD0XGT8JJQ8bWAaDgAHbwuFQ0Kklg5V2ubfyA7Fdp77dZVKxUnB9CCfb0n-JfrGu5RIwD_Ws52zkZMpgFPRCqKf6SZ0q8Tf1Z6FjSx3A%3D%3D) With a new administration taking office, young conservatives’ preparedness to lead the battle for constitutional rights is more important than ever. Your Leadership Institute and its Riley Gaines Center train thousands of rising leaders coast-to-coast to lead that battle. [Will you stand bravely with me and Riley? ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=0340ce1eb56545c2a49a68921b518ba3&_e=JpeoZTeSd-2w2MgbarBN3PTgcz3qAq_QZh3gxByWBYHfIXI6zk8JMn_HnRNEy-YH4p2LoA1WyDG6e44yomcjbxrzSDIf9inNINNKEZjDhVikGlYhfsCyM0S0KYN5ed7j8_rjyirMPFLwGrofaR5qTfi05OGb2Ie-g5iB9T6qhDm-FAXopk_NBZ5BP-uLSxETWgDug6PqcDkSdbfFM-EfkYWf6TS_JP7YVCqbUc-Fd4-Nb399kGshPE8sc9C_6aWIMMoY-sDQ8kd0RC8d_SjSKh6PSceKfzsN1ZfovKlA4ULO0ipvYQxm74Nsbj5oV_dJLB2yAZtX8d-sBNsbuaTCvKpZjfYtXH2HTxb-6qETNdmwMYNLI0hSmkmeraU5NtrZRmqY1DW1pGcexGC2ElPxUg%3D%3D) Your special gift will help more conservative students defend our liberties. Please let me count on you now. Thank you. Fight on, Olivia Krolczyk Ambassador Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
| [ **Stand with Riley Today ** ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=0340ce1eb56545c2a49a68921b518ba3&_e=JpeoZTeSd-2w2MgbarBN3PTgcz3qAq_QZh3gxByWBYHfIXI6zk8JMn_HnRNEy-YH4p2LoA1WyDG6e44yomcjbxrzSDIf9inNINNKEZjDhVikGlYhfsCyM0S0KYN5ed7j8_rjyirMPFLwGrofaR5qTfi05OGb2Ie-g5iB9T6qhDm-FAXopk_NBZ5BP-uLSxETWgDug6PqcDkSdbfFM-EfkYWf6TS_JP7YVCqbUc-Fd4-Nb399kGshPE8sc9C_6aWIIa6P6iqvWroUZ-sVWyfmgKG2lq_vjIyXtHTIN2SGj0CQIEzRTy4d-UoGkt5VTs3-xEtfJ1_l3eCsRvitKoSfT7NoCx7ktf-z7LcVyH9IQ-RwA5H3rAlA-T0wYa27M1PTvvlo5Hmje11S_We04QBOqQ%3D%3D)

But we’re the first line of defense — and I take that responsibility seriously. National Republicans are determined to push their extreme agenda, but I’m determined to stand in their way. I’ll keep standing for working families, not corporate interests, while fighting to lower costs, protect our democracy, and create a fairer economy for every Oregonian. [_**But I can’t do it alone. If you believe in these values, I need your support. name: Jasmine Crockett
subject: I’ve had it with this fake Republican meltdown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
|
---
Folks, I’ve never been afraid to speak my mind. That’s why I was unapologetic about supporting President Biden’s decision to pardon his son, Hunter. As someone who practiced criminal defense for years before coming to Congress, take it from me: **That was a partisan, political prosecution.** I’ve never seen anything like it all my years as an attorney, and any prosecutor acting in good faith would not have pursued the charges. **But ever since President Biden announced his decisions, disingenuous and hypocritical Republicans have been having a meltdown** — even though Donald Trump is a convicted criminal who abused the pardon power to give his friends and cronies a get-out-of-jail free card when he was last President. **I’m sick to death of the double standards and fake outrage. That’s why I’m taking a stand — and I’m asking you to join me:** [**Before midnight, will you rush in $5, $10, or whatever you can spare -- split with Serve America -- to help us show President Biden that we have his back and call out this Republican hypocrisy for what it is? We can’t sit by silently while Republicans and the media gaslight us just as a convicted felon prepares to take back power in the White House. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99420558/519856117/-2068302509?refcode=241228_Serve_Crockett_Meltdown&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDA2NzYzNi01YWM1LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VCQgw6d33mEbymO7Bxzx-NNUJvIosnLgyhsLIBNcfBY=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99420559/519856118/-2068302509?refcode=241228_Serve_Crockett_Meltdown&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDA2NzYzNi01YWM1LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VCQgw6d33mEbymO7Bxzx-NNUJvIosnLgyhsLIBNcfBY=) Thank you,

Peter,

As we approach the end of this year, I know our future seems scary and uncertain. But looking back, we have a lot to be proud of from 2024.

This election cycle, we were able to mobilize voters in down-ballot races across PA, retaining control of the state house. We saw record breaking numbers of volunteers – with 114,000 grassroots supporters knocking a total of 7.2 million doors in key districts.

If we stand together and keep up this momentum, I know we have the resources and energy to fight back against whatever the Trump administration throws our way. **[If you’re with us, can you chip in today to help us meet our end of year goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99421092/519857024/2119800170?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20241228_FR_EOY_0_3MO_SharifStreet_NA_NA_1.3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTNkYjhmOC01Y2M1LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5DIObPe1OimJU78QdO7mEtYgPZaoDdwmRV_oBV1pVN0=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

USO Supporter,
The new year is an exciting time to make resolutions, celebrate new beginnings and look forward to the year ahead. **[But we hope you'll also take a moment to remember our military and all they'll face in the year ahead.](https://links.e.uso.)**
Right now, service members stationed in the Middle East are defending themselves from more rocket attacks like those that killed three service members earlier this year. Conflicts are also continuing to escalate in the Pacific.
**With the threat of armed conflict increasing around the world, we must be ready to support our brave heroes no matter what they face next. Our generous friends at Leonardo DRS are MATCHING gifts to help us reach our year-end goal and prepare for growing needs in the new year.**
**[Will you make a tax-deductible donation of $29 or more that will be MATCHED to support our brave heroes no matter where they're called to serve in 2025?](https://links.e.uso.)**
[MATCH MY GIFT FOR SERVICE MEMBERS NOW](https://links.e.uso.)
---
The USO's mission is to strengthen the well-being of the people serving in America's military and their families - wherever their service may take them.
But as a nonprofit organization, we need your urgent support to be mission ready. Please take advantage of this matching gift offer before it expires tomorrow. Together, we can keep our vital military support programs going and ensure we're prepared at a moment's notice in 2025.
**But we need your urgent help to take advantage of this match before it expires tomorrow to keep our vital military support programs going and help ensure we 're prepared to send resources at a moment's notice in 2025.**
**[Will you please make a tax-deductible donation of $29 or more now? Your gift today will be DOUBLED in value to help provide crucial support to those who will do whatever it takes to serve our country in 2025.](https://links.e.uso.)**
[Rush $29 (becomes $58!)](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[Rush $58 (becomes $116!)](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/2dpGh-000~)
---
[Rush $116 (becomes $232!)](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[Rush another MATCHED amount](https://links.e.uso.)
---
Thank you so much for your generosity. Your support truly makes a difference to service members here at home and around the world.
Team USO
*Leonardo DRS is matching all gifts to the USO through a mail, text and email campaign, dollar for dollar, up to a total of $35,000, through December 31, 2024.

My pep talk for you!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99421994/519859273/-793144256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzFkOWY2MC01ZmM1LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gaVfNUlgX2z9QgH4EyVRh82iMM0wpV8EoGgh79RwFmA=&emci=b83179ff-3cbe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=c71d9f60-5fc5-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=15759664)
---
Hi Derek, The New Year may be just around the corner, but the DPVA team and I are working around the clock to ensure we hit our end-of-year giving goal. We know 2025 will be a critical year for Virginia and America. As Democrats, we will be fighting the radical and harsh Republican agenda on all fronts. It’s going to take everything we have. _That’s why I’m reaching out now, Derek. We urgently need your help to end 2024 on a high note._ [_**So far, we’ve raised $3,258 from our online fundraising efforts. It’s a decent start, but we need to hit a minimum of $10,675 from digital sources before we close the books for 2024. Coming up short is not an option — we have so much riding on hitting our end-of-year numbers!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99421998/519859274/-807643367?&refcode=E11831-20241228-EOY4-SL-DeadlineEOM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzFkOWY2MC01ZmM1LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gaVfNUlgX2z9QgH4EyVRh82iMM0wpV8EoGgh79RwFmA=) | **************[COUNT ME IN!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99421999/519859275/-807643367?&refcode=E11831-20241228-EOY4-SB-DeadlineEOM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzFkOWY2MC01ZmM1LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gaVfNUlgX2z9QgH4EyVRh82iMM0wpV8EoGgh79RwFmA=)**************
---
With elections to win up and down the Virginia ballot next year, everyone will be looking at DPVA and our performance.
Virginia Democrats have an extraordinary opportunity to show Democrats around the nation how to win (and win big!) even in the face of strong headwinds.
[_**It’s going to take everything we have to give, Derek — but we can chart the course and build the momentum that will, in turn, help Democrats everywhere win in 2026 and 2028.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99422000/519859276/-807643367?&refcode=E11831-20241228-EOY4-SL-DeadlineEOM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzFkOWY2MC01ZmM1LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gaVfNUlgX2z9QgH4EyVRh82iMM0wpV8EoGgh79RwFmA=)

Finance Director, Democratic Party of Virginia

Our Official 2025 DLCC Membership cards are personalized just for you to serve as a constant reminder that your membership helps fuel our work to:
* Elect Democratic leaders in state legislatures across the country who will fight for reproductive rights, safe communities, and education.
* Build long-term investments in target states so we can expand our power seat by seat, year after year.
* Compete against Republicans in special elections across states like Virginia and beyond.

subject: Can you help?
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus DFL House Caucus
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec24?refcode=122824 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec24?refcode=122824]
Hi friend,
I’m proud to be serving as Deputy Floor Leader for the House DFL in the 2025-26 legislature, but it’s not going to be easy. House Republicans are going to be doing their best to stop progress, push tax breaks for large corporations, and undo the work of our House DFL team. With Donald Trump serving as our next president, we need to start working hard today if we want to be victorious in 2026. The stakes are too high for us to wait.
Friend, we really need your support to finish the year strong so we can get ready to make the Minnesota House blue. Will you make a donation of $10, $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec24?refcode=122824]

_Record your response to be one of the 5,000 people we need to complete the survey before 11:59 p.m._
