Peter, as we head into 2025, Republicans are preparing to escalate their attacks on our most fundamental freedoms.
**From banning abortion nationwide to censoring books in schools, rolling back voting rights, and targeting vulnerable communities, right-wing extremists have made their intentions clear.** They're not backing down – they're doubling down on their efforts to undo the progress we’ve worked so hard to protect.
But as New York's attorney general, Letitia James has shown time and again that she won’t back down either. She's made it her mission to hold the powerful accountable, no matter how tough the fight, and she's more determined than ever to continue that fight.
In the year ahead, AG James is ready to protect those who are most vulnerable from these relentless attacks. But to succeed, she needs to know what’s most important to YOU. That’s why she's asking for your input.

AG James needs to rally 5,000 dedicated supporters to share their top priorities as we gear up for the battles ahead in 2025 and beyond – and she needs to hear from you, Peter. **[Please take a moment to complete this brief survey and help ensure that our fight is focused on the issues that matter most to you. Your voice is critical in shaping the path forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99422621/519860852/342068996?code=jtk1775-su-nd&refcode=jtk1775-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzBlZDE0OC02NGM1LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9WIpyU77dkePKmOz0fOIteqOMEf0j4t-p8alfuzW_MM=&emci=da854ef8-27c1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=470ed148-64c5-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=25369504)**
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99422622/519860853/342068996?code=jtk1775-su-nd&refcode=jtk1775-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzBlZDE0OC02NGM1LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9WIpyU77dkePKmOz0fOIteqOMEf0j4t-p8alfuzW_MM=&emci=da854ef8-27c1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=470ed148-64c5-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=25369504)

We've already made incredible strides in the face of fierce opposition, but with so much on the line, our work is far from finished.

Team James

name: MAHA Action
subject: MAHA News: Join us for the Inaugural MAHA Ball and More
body:
Welcome to our newsletter where you can stay informed on all things MAHA.
| | | | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JG7KJ2HDZ9WPD87B9PZPAM45_0)
---
| Welcome to MAHA’s Well Sourced, our newsletter where you can stay informed on all things MAHA, including the latest on the issues, MAHA events and updates, and more. We have an incredibly exciting opportunity before us to transform public health and Make America Healthy Again, and we could not be happier you’re here. Thank you, and we’re wishing you and your family the most beautiful holiday season and New Year!
---
|
---
| WATCH: First, a tribute. We would not be here without the courageous leader who inspired the massive grassroots effort that is MAHA. [This is Robert F. Kennedy Jr. – a lifelong advocate for health, the environment, and the American people.](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JG7KJ2HDZ9WPD87B9PZPAM45_1)
---
| | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JG7KJ2HDZ9WPD87B9PZPAM45_2)
---
|
---
| ACT: President-elect Donald J. Trump’s appointment of RFK Jr. as Health and Human Services Secretary is truly historic. With a lifetime of experience fighting for public health, scientific transparency, and environmental safety, Kennedy is poised to reverse the chronic disease epidemic and secure a healthier future for America as Secretary of Health and Human Services.
Take action in support of Robert F. Kennedy’s appointment and help us propel the MAHA movement forward by sending an email or calling your Senator to ensure his confirmation. You’ll find everything you need to help play your part in making history at the link [here](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JG7KJ2HDZ9WPD87B9PZPAM45_3).
---
|
---
| ATTEND: The MAHA Inaugural Gala. This black-tie gala, set in a distinguished venue just steps from the National Mall, will pay tribute to the tireless efforts and unwavering commitment of Robert F. Kennedy Jr. and the MAHA heroes who helped shape this movement. This is not just an event—it’s a moment to connect with the champions of the MAHA vision, reflect on decades of hard work, and witness the culmination of a movement that will continue to shape America’s future. Email [events@mahaaction.com](mailto:events@mahaaction.com) for more information – we can’t wait to see you there.
---
| | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JG7KJ2HDZ9WPD87B9PZPAM45_4)
---
|
---
| READ: 800 medical professionals endorsed Robert F. Kennedy Jr. to lead HHS in a letter this week, demonstrating broad support from the medical community for Kennedy’s nomination. The letter represents the voices of health leaders across the US, including [Dr. Mehmet Oz](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JG7KJ2HDZ9WPD87B9PZPAM45_5), [Dr. Mark Hyman](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JG7KJ2HDZ9WPD87B9PZPAM45_6), [Dr. John Abramson,](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JG7KJ2HDZ9WPD87B9PZPAM45_7) and many, many more.
“Americans' healthy life expectancy ranks 67th in the world, while Americans pay almost twice as much for healthcare per person as the citizens in other wealthy nations," points out Dr. Abramson, a signatory on the letter who's served as a family physician for 22 years and has taught primary care and currently teaches health care policy at Harvard Medical School. "Epidemiologic imbalance of our health research (96% directed at new drugs and devices) and non-transparency of clinical trial data in the peer review process play a large role in sustaining our outlier status of poor health and high costs. This dysfunction can and must be corrected."
Amen. If you’re a doctor or medical professional who would like to sign on and express your support you can do so [here](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JG7KJ2HDZ9WPD87B9PZPAM45_8), and check out the full press release at the [link](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JG7KJ2HDZ9WPD87B9PZPAM45_9).
---
|
---
| LISTEN: One of our favorites – but not just ours, as it was the most listened to podcast of 2024. [Check out the brilliant duo, Casey and Calley Means, as they dive deep with Tucker Carlson.](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JG7KJ2HDZ9WPD87B9PZPAM45_10)

FOLLOW US: Our Instagram is live at [MAHA Action](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JG7KJ2HDZ9WPD87B9PZPAM45_11). Give us a follow to stay in touch!
QUOTE OF THE WEEK: “[Now we’re on the verge, with President Trump’s leadership, with Bobby Kennedy, with real warriors like Jay Bhattacharya...of a golden age of health,” Calley Means.](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JG7KJ2HDZ9WPD87B9PZPAM45_12)
We can’t wait.
Thank you for being here – let’s MAHA!

clean_body: Welcome to our newsletter where you can stay informed on all things MAHA. | | | | | | Welcome to MAHA’s Well Sourced, our newsletter where you can stay informed on all things MAHA, including the latest on the issues, MAHA events and updates, and more. We have an incredibly exciting opportunity before us to transform public health and Make America Healthy Again, and we could not be happier you’re here. Thank you, and we’re wishing you and your family the most beautiful holiday season and New Year! | | WATCH: First, a tribute. We would not be here without the courageous leader who inspired the massive grassroots effort that is MAHA. | | | | | ACT: President-elect Donald J. Trump’s appointment of RFK Jr. as Health and Human Services Secretary is truly historic. With a lifetime of experience fighting for public health, scientific transparency, and environmental safety, Kennedy is poised to reverse the chronic disease epidemic and secure a healthier future for America as Secretary of Health and Human Services. Take action in support of Robert F. Kennedy’s appointment and help us propel the MAHA movement forward by sending an email or calling your Senator to ensure his confirmation. You’ll find everything you need to help play your part in making history at the link . | | ATTEND: The MAHA Inaugural Gala. This black-tie gala, set in a distinguished venue just steps from the National Mall, will pay tribute to the tireless efforts and unwavering commitment of Robert F. Kennedy Jr. and the MAHA heroes who helped shape this movement. This is not just an event—it’s a moment to connect with the champions of the MAHA vision, reflect on decades of hard work, and witness the culmination of a movement that will continue to shape America’s future. Email mailto:events@mahaaction.com for more information – we can’t wait to see you there. | | | | | READ: 800 medical professionals endorsed Robert F. Kennedy Jr. to lead HHS in a letter this week, demonstrating broad support from the medical community for Kennedy’s nomination. The letter represents the voices of health leaders across the US, including , , and many, many more. “Americans' healthy life expectancy ranks 67th in the world, while Americans pay almost twice as much for healthcare per person as the citizens in other wealthy nations," points out Dr. Abramson, a signatory on the letter who's served as a family physician for 22 years and has taught primary care and currently teaches health care policy at Harvard Medical School. "Epidemiologic imbalance of our health research (96% directed at new drugs and devices) and non-transparency of clinical trial data in the peer review process play a large role in sustaining our outlier status of poor health and high costs. This dysfunction can and must be corrected." Amen. If you’re a doctor or medical professional who would like to sign on and express your support you can do so , and check out the full press release at the . | | LISTEN: One of our favorites – but not just ours, as it was the most listened to podcast of 2024. name: Hillsdale College via Red Conservatives
subject: 2025 is a critical year
body:
Our nation is at a crossroads. Patriotic Americans have an opportunity in 2025 to take fundamental steps...

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=5f85dbf3a3f945e1be0819ee1fbafad5&_t=dfZae0QvihO4_xPjzHtg49pn_SGZae7Qip6GwExX9pnrff6AUIzd4BwS2uCwMWkw41Vuyhvl8KULDdoEmUm4NuvqfvSfOPj-qprPMIBgtxkfmY1p6CWmqgdanz_Y-KBD)_
---
[](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=5f85dbf3a3f945e1be0819ee1fbafad5&_e=rG8jTSBwHFgMkxG5j1Tx7IJh-1c_8M429yx5MWy5xKfS4zrqwh8TdC3iJOqPvXUoyXtlb59raLgzHo8H-OZXyxfFmIZ4_xX6VdoN-eiaswmfpaWYNeChymnn4qrr8wW3w9dN_2BkmCO-AToqpMlfmKdIayJDDHUJ7bgn7ehqe7RcNwFK-vksCIAk4eNun3q31hdlNrTH5SQ5GDEV2sTDoxlcyDW6mQcrJhmsgFsmNrVO6iy6Jrf55xvEowFhZ5Cf6a-3mnrd4TMWDvY4srYk56wm4b8TAzXotaFiQMjpLtnPqB1qZbawdD8G7DDRHz5e2mUuMWo5GS7HoSBmPbe8BS3QrJTpfv-oMPR4blZsv-0_CW3hrSh2N89TOU06n2rj)
| |
Dear Friend,

Our nation is at a crossroads. Patriotic Americans have an opportunity in 2025 to take fundamental steps in the direction of reviving and preserving liberty and free government.

It is imperative to make the most of this opportunity in order to pass on the blessings of the American way of life to future generations.

As you may know, Hillsdale College is the only educational institution in the country that is in a strong position to reach and teach millions of Americans about America's founding principles and its great heritage of liberty. And we are expanding our efforts to do just that.

To press forward with our educational mission on behalf of liberty during a critical time for America, we have set an ambitious goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education** in 2025.

[Will you partner with us in defending the cause of liberty and free government nationwide through education with your year-end support and make a generous gift to Hillsdale College today?](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=5f85dbf3a3f945e1be0819ee1fbafad5&_e=rG8jTSBwHFgMkxG5j1Tx7IJh-1c_8M429yx5MWy5xKfS4zrqwh8TdC3iJOqPvXUoyXtlb59raLgzHo8H-OZXyxfFmIZ4_xX6VdoN-eiaswmfpaWYNeChymnn4qrr8wW3w9dN_2BkmCO-AToqpMlfmKdIayJDDHUJ7bgn7ehqe7RcNwFK-vksCIAk4eNun3q31hdlNrTH5SQ5GDEV2sTDoxlcyDW6mQcrJhmsgFsmNrUN1pbpcvAJM29tbnu0NJkhI23Slc1tnAznJdoP8SI6kyr6xwzuz_aUTOxbKZBSOGXwfxOdb4_0xBw8KbmTpGojjY7Us7pIqdBpFnmv9W3PDS_orXHmQo_gxGhRiCLB6Y5t3HGId4p6CfNIvSE54uCp)

What all of us do today will have significant consequences for the survival of the American way of life. We have the opportunity to make 2025 a year that future American patriots will look back on with gratitude.

Make no mistake. Powerful forces who seek to undermine our way of life--not only socialist politicians but also the legacy media, the entertainment industry, and Big Tech--will be working tirelessly to undermine liberty and free government, including in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.

Indeed, successfully engaging the Left on the battleground of American education is of fundamental importance if we are to revive and preserve liberty for future generations.

But success will require the faithful and generous support of patriotic Americans like you--citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty in a free republic. [That's why we're asking for your year-end support to continue and expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=5f85dbf3a3f945e1be0819ee1fbafad5&_e=rG8jTSBwHFgMkxG5j1Tx7IJh-1c_8M429yx5MWy5xKfS4zrqwh8TdC3iJOqPvXUoyXtlb59raLgzHo8H-OZXyxfFmIZ4_xX6VdoN-eiaswmfpaWYNeChymnn4qrr8wW3w9dN_2BkmCO-AToqpMlfmKdIayJDDHUJ7bgn7ehqe7RcNwFK-vksCIAk4eNun3q31hdlNrTH5SQ5GDEV2sTDoxlcyDW6mQcrJhmsgFsmNrXYsUpTWlhsykjFwUZpUfefkkLh9D9Aa1p1hwKrQjNnxoSr8O0DbIH_nNmQ4TY7ZgtOzgICj51WJNIsoA2-9mf3PZHVn7GPElEuzEttYPlMJqrYFlPsXPkwdefr8jB0yl58AxndSnO3X_25d4DEC4Hr)

**We must do all that we possibly can.**

With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's educational mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this critical time for our nation.

You will help us to ...

* **Reach an additional 600,000 American households and businesses with _Imprimis_ , our monthly digest of liberty.** With your support, we plan to increase the circulation of _Imprimis_ to more than 7 million households and businesses in 2025.
* **Teach citizens nationwide, especially younger Americans, through our FREE online courses.** Your donation will help us to create new online courses and add 900,000 new students in 2025.
* **Restore excellence to American K-12 education.** Your faithful generosity will help us to launch and guide increasing numbers of classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Reading and watching the news reminds us every day that our work is far from finished. America remains deeply divided. The gains we've made on behalf of liberty in recent years are fragile.

**With your help, we will succeed --because we must succeed for our country!**

Hillsdale College **conducts its educational outreach efforts** --as it does all its work--while refusing to accept **one penny** of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

To meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we will need thousands of gifts between **$25** and **$100**. Most of our supporters' contributions are in this range.

We will also need a significant number of **$500** to **$1,000** donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated.

Since we have less than a month remaining to fund this project for 2025, we urgently need your help.

**You can safely and securely renew your support using this link:[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=5f85dbf3a3f945e1be0819ee1fbafad5&_e=rG8jTSBwHFgMkxG5j1Tx7IJh-1c_8M429yx5MWy5xKfS4zrqwh8TdC3iJOqPvXUoyXtlb59raLgzHo8H-OZXyxfFmIZ4_xX6VdoN-eiaswmfpaWYNeChymnn4qrr8wW3w9dN_2BkmCO-AToqpMlfmKdIayJDDHUJ7bgn7ehqe7RcNwFK-vksCIAk4eNun3q31hdlNrTH5SQ5GDEV2sTDoxlcyDW6mQcrJhmsgFsmNrVCKE1C3IPUrg0UZfoN9BKJXQFBCFfUy460rMQR_VA0wgMCPabfJMxVVp2Oq3xO93ZAiGBF2nyKHIg6rkbIIxEvXtyZ03srgwrqV8O9UwPPKfvUvZWVEnrqdJ-j5K1k2t4WMzLtT6wEncqPoQEd39u8)**

It is not an exaggeration to say that the future of American liberty and the American way of life depends on the efforts of patriotic Americans over the next few years.

That's why I hope you'll make your most generous year-end gift to Hillsdale College before the **December 31** deadline.

Every dollar you give will get us closer to our **$6,000,000** online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.

Please partner with Hillsdale College to make 2025 a significant turning point in the revival and preservation of the American way of life.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 [Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=5f85dbf3a3f945e1be0819ee1fbafad5&_t=dfZae0QvihO4_xPjzHtg49pn_SGZae7Qip6GwExX9pnrff6AUIzd4BwS2uCwMWkw41Vuyhvl8KULDdoEmUm4NsLW67qMJTfA8Z1QVQ48VxKQDSH8XMp4dlgHiBjH6RBYa-Xwso3IGySfBfX2aicTnYPk2yuaA9ZMqNzYWaNVSQ8%3D)

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=5f85dbf3a3f945e1be0819ee1fbafad5&_t=dfZae0QvihO4_xPjzHtg49pn_SGZae7Qip6GwExX9pnrff6AUIzd4BwS2uCwMWkw41Vuyhvl8KULDdoEmUm4NuvqfvSfOPj-qprPMIBgtxkfmY1p6CWmqgdanz_Y-KBD).
---

name: Jake Mellen, Forward Party
subject: Looking Back, Moving Forward - Candidate Team Reflections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
What we learned and where we're going in 2025.

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_candidates&n=1)
---
Saturday, December 28, 2024 | Peter -- Hello there! My name is Jake Mellen and I am the Political Associate on staff for the Forward Party. I joined the Forward movement in 2023 as a volunteer in Colorado. Within a few weeks, I understood just how important our work was and knew I had to do everything I could to help it. It has been a privilege to meet with people who stepped up in 2024 to run for office and provide better leadership. Candidates are the backbone of our movement, and I am looking further to diving into more conversations in 2025! **What Went Well** The 2024 election was a monumental step for the Forward Party. We had organic interest from over 1,000 candidates who signed up to run as a Forward candidate or affiliate. We endorsed 125 candidates in the general election and were able to publish some incredible cross-party slates to promote our affiliates. **Lessons Learned** Despite our success, there is a lot more work to be done. We learned that we need to streamline our candidate recruitment pipeline and strengthen our support system. [These are our thoughts from 2024, but we want to hear from you! Please head to this link and fill out your thoughts on lessons learned, the direction the party should head in, and projects we should tackle! We will read them all, and we will highlight our top 10, along with the people who submitted them, in early January as our New Years Resolutions.](https://home.forwardparty.com/2024_end_of_year_feedback?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_candidates&n=2) **2025 Projects** In 2025, we will be updating & revising our candidates' process from intake to first conversation through our initial communications outreach. We will also work to increase & improve upon our phone and text banking initiative, where we made over 200,000 contacts in the month of October. If you're still feeling the season of giving, consider donating to Forward this season! | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate_2024_eoy?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_candidates&n=3 "Chip In $25 Today!") [Chip In $25 Today!](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate_2024_eoy?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_candidates&n=3)
---
Happy Holidays,
Jake Mellen
[https://home.forwardparty.com/](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_candidates&n=4)

clean_body: What we learned and where we're going in 2025. | | Saturday, December 28, 2024 | Peter -- Hello there! My name is Jake Mellen and I am the Political Associate on staff for the Forward Party. I joined the Forward movement in 2023 as a volunteer in Colorado. Within a few weeks, I understood just how important our work was and knew I had to do everything I could to help it. It has been a privilege to meet with people who stepped up in 2024 to run for office and provide better leadership. Candidates are the backbone of our movement, and I am looking further to diving into more conversations in 2025! What Went Well The 2024 election was a monumental step for the Forward Party. We had organic interest from over 1,000 candidates who signed up to run as a Forward candidate or affiliate. We endorsed 125 candidates in the general election and were able to publish some incredible cross-party slates to promote our affiliates. Lessons Learned Despite our success, there is a lot more work to be done. We learned that we need to streamline our candidate recruitment pipeline and strengthen our support system. 2025 Projects In 2025, we will be updating & revising our candidates' process from intake to first conversation through our initial communications outreach. We will also work to increase & improve upon our phone and text banking initiative, where we made over 200,000 contacts in the month of October. If you're still feeling the season of giving, consider donating to Forward this season! | "Chip In $25 Today!" Happy Holidays, Jake Mellen Copyright © 2024 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. name: Marina, All On The Line
subject: ⚖️ The fair maps movement is headed back to court
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Help power our work to create a stronger, fairer democracy.
|
---

**Peter, the fair maps movement is headed back to court in 2025.[I hope you’ll take a moment to read more about these cases and then make a $15 donation to All On The Line to power our work to create a stronger, fairer democracy.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99423087/519862557/-375470917?refcode=don_aotl_redite_email_LAandAL_email_20241228-AOTL-RedLite-LAandAL-MJ_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241228-AOTL-RedLite-LAandAL-MJ_&utm_campaign=LAandAL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQzNzZiZDEyLTY3YzUtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GS6sp3NuuPYC8-N2jFeVE8_nVeylvmOxLoi4954E4RQ=)**
In 2021, our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation (NRF), filed the first legal challenge against the state of Alabama’s gerrymandered map, which ultimately made its way before the U.S. Supreme Court.
The U.S. Supreme Court’s landmark decision in _Allen v. Milligan_ led the courts to force the State of Alabama to enact a new congressional map, which created a second Black opportunity district for voters there.
**In February, there will be a federal trial to protect this fair map.**
While Black Alabamians prepare to go to trial, a group of tenacious Louisiana voters are headed to the U.S. Supreme Court.
In 2022, the NRF initiated a successful challenge against the state’s gerrymandered congressional map in a case known as _Robinson v. Ardoin_. Once _Milligan_ was decided, Louisiana finally enacted a VRA-compliant map. But immediately after, a lawsuit was filed against the map.
One of the most ideologically-driven, conservative federal courts in the country struck down Louisiana’s new, more representative map in _Callais v. Landry_ — ignoring Supreme Court precedent that had upheld and enforced Section 2 of the VRA less than a year before in _Allen v. Milligan_.
**That case, now called _Louisiana v. Callais_ , is now on appeal before the U.S. Supreme Court, and oral arguments will likely be held in early 2025. The NRF submitted an amicus brief to SCOTUS this month, asking the Court to protect Louisiana’s Voting Rights Act-compliant map.**
These cases will be critical to our fight ahead — and while that diligent work is happening in the courts, our movement won’t stop working with the people to restore fairness to our democracy. Can we count on you to support the All On The Line campaign by making a contribution today?
[DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99423088/519862558/-375470917?refcode=don_aotl_redite_email_LAandAL_email_20241228-AOTL-RedLite-LAandAL-MJ_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241228-AOTL-RedLite-LAandAL-MJ_&utm_campaign=LAandAL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQzNzZiZDEyLTY3YzUtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GS6sp3NuuPYC8-N2jFeVE8_nVeylvmOxLoi4954E4RQ=)
---
Thank you,
Marina Jenkins
Executive Director, All On The Line

name: Electoral College Watch [VAP]
subject: This "bizarre" system
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122824_2&amount=25]
Straight from the mouth of NBC's Chuck Todd, folks:
“Is anyone really happy with this bizarre Electoral College system we use today to decide our president?”
The answer is no. It’s the biggest tool the opponents of voting rights have to swing national elections and suppress the will of the people. We have to take away this dangerous mechanism that enabled the January 6th insurrection before it happens again. And there is a way to do it!
The National Popular Vote Interstate Compact is an agreement among a group of U.S. states and the District of Columbia to award all their electoral votes to whichever presidential candidate wins the overall popular vote in the 50 states and the District of Columbia. 16 states plus DC have already joined, accounting for 206 electoral votes of the 270 needed to win.
Vote suppressors have proven there’s no length they won’t go to in order to win. RUSH $25 or more to help us end the Electoral College once and for all >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=122824_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=122824_2&amount=15]
GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=122824_2&amount=25]

GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=122824_2&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=122824_2&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=122824_2&amount=35]
What's the key? Making the National Popular Vote Interstate Compact a reality. We've got the momentum on our side, as Maine's state House of Representatives just voted to join, sending the bill to the Maine Senate.
When Minnesota joined last year, it gave NPVIC 16 states plus DC, which is 76% of the Electoral College votes needed to essentially make the popular vote the law of the land. Maine would push that farther.
We need your help to make it happen, Team. Support our efforts to end the Electoral College forever with $25 or more today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=122824_2&amount=25]
Thank you,
Voter Action Project's Electoral College Team
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122824_2&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122824_2&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://twitter.com/ [https://twitter.com/] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122824_2&amount=25]

We’re slowly getting a broad picture of our efforts over the 2024 cycle and I wanted to share this with you: on average, this team was supported by a grassroots contribution of _**just $19.75,**_ a testament to the everyday folks who are pitching in what they can, when they can for a better and bluer Arizona. And on top of that? **_Almost a quarter of grassroots supporters this cycle pitched in for the very first time._** This is incredible, and it shows the power of our community! **Here’s the less good news:** As we run the numbers before the year is over, we still have a couple of gaps to fill. Understandably, our fundraising energy has slowed down since the election, but we have to get back on track. **[We need your support to keep the momentum going. clean_body: | = = Hi there, I’ll start with the good news. We’re slowly getting a broad picture of our efforts over the 2024 cycle and I wanted to share this with you: on average, this team was supported by a grassroots contribution of just $19.75, a testament to the everyday folks who are pitching in what they can, when they can for a better and bluer Arizona. And on top of that? Almost a quarter of grassroots supporters this cycle pitched in for the very first time. This is incredible, and it shows the power of our community! Here’s the less good news: As we run the numbers before the year is over, we still have a couple of gaps to fill. Understandably, our fundraising energy has slowed down since the election, but we have to get back on track. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = There are no off-years for state parties, and we have to shore up our resources to prepare for our next fights. We need your support to keep our momentum going and ensure we have the resources needed to win long-term and build a blue Arizona. This team is more than capable of doing it if a few folks pitch in right now. = = Thank you for your continued support and dedication to our cause. | | Dear Friend, Today I need your help to defend myself against the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy my family.All I ask is that you **[Rush a “FIRST AMENDMENT FUND” Emergency contribution before midnight tonight.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fa38ff5c988d46c389d2ec7f766865b3&_e=25s5dpVA7VAeVT8enp3xu9wxXjUfCtBxhrnP1iV71yFPlYRqTLCPD4pJjnv5XmdAu29O-nhu9Em8EmHDISMoBcHhPn5VzQq7dqD2QiXIbgK4gGs--4OruZ2GaKF_mL1laj7zNHnMOm7oFF_ptQjUnmk6DG_C-QIohBqHhN_DSTO4c0gVJvvSe5821X2XOsCL0CX3eb87lOPz2nltNVvadrIJ8UPuBnsjJoPMfrUCukQiGPnB3VFpGiBsLf4hH81-azsZATJ3V-o6F8n3Xv0nAE1IuMvBBxSEqSd22bbmYVMh7T_-W6GbTB9bsFkD8tULeklJi706Io2sg8ouM0xTtvfN-3klW5DMnZSsgWn024JpyBQNNKXr4OaaT79_TyobOXx4yvH5klCx-rIJn-COP40SxheuCjPWiJiz91XMBDs%3D)** When an Arizona Election Official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case – and I'm afraid this battle is only getting started. Think about it. The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections.That’s what happened to me. Each day that the weight of this lawfare feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what’s happening to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him -- his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. **And he fights on.** So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, **then they know _nothing_ about me.**And they know nothing about _you_ , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new**“First Amendment Fund”** to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. [**My friend, could you rush back a generous, tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or more to help me cover the court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsels, and so much more?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fa38ff5c988d46c389d2ec7f766865b3&_e=25s5dpVA7VAeVT8enp3xu9wxXjUfCtBxhrnP1iV71yFPlYRqTLCPD4pJjnv5XmdAu29O-nhu9Em8EmHDISMoBcHhPn5VzQq7dqD2QiXIbgK4gGs--4OruZ2GaKF_mL1laj7zNHnMOm7oFF_ptQjUnmk6DG_C-QIohBqHhN_DSTO4c0gVJvvSe5821X2XOsCL0CX3eb87lOPz2nltNVvadrIJ8UPuBnsjJoPMfrUCukQiGPnB3VFpGiBsLf4hH81-aFq5U630RuWA0APYB8nsskP7o8qOQ1OXji1qaKvYZLX5t3lfd5Fo7yw4wcxHywwzbW23gknUxprTUwKGLEwAodf0bXlfyelDxP08MtwQHynYXluIQFmGWOb0PTbU9vTHdx81rkO5PwNTy2IacwKR-6oZmaz3vPxd2CUWZlX0qVw%3D) The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.

clean_body: Please know that I’m still fighting because I want you to live in a free and prosperous America. | | | | | | | From the Desk of | | | Dear Friend, Today I need your help to defend myself against the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy my family.All I ask is that you When an Arizona Election Official went on the record promising to “Make life hell” for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case – and I'm afraid this battle is only getting started. Think about it. The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections.That’s what happened to me. Each day that the weight of this lawfare feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what’s happening to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him -- his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. And he fights on. So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, then they know nothing about me.And they know nothing about you , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new“First Amendment Fund” to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy. Every dollar given to this “First Amendment Fund” will help me finish this fight – without financially destroying my family.Together, we can win this battle in court. And we can send the message that the Left’s lawfare will not crush us.Thank you for always being there for me. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want you to live in a free and prosperous America.Yours Truly, | | Kari Lake | | | Kari Lake | | P.S. It all started when Alvin Bragg indicted President Trump in New York. Then they bankrupted Rudy Giuliani. Threw Peter Navarro in jail. Arrested Pro-Life protestors. And sued me for defamation. Now, I’m facing hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal fees all for speaking the truth and calling out election fraud.The Left’s goal? Financially destroy me and my family.Today I’m asking you to join me and build the “First Amendment Fund” that will help me win my case. With enough grassroots firepower, we will end this lawfare and take back our country. | | Paid for by American Media Council American Media Council PO Box 96602 Washington D.C. 20090-6602

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: No More Blue’s Clues Pride Parades
body:
Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. | | | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---
| |
---
| | Patriot, Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Take it from me, Patriot, as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, **_you are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children_**. Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=6b6417e895ff447ab455276afbd8ef29&_e=09aLmVXUdnFT0IWqCI8ZgRNJLO19hNnd7xNFQJ0YeWT03S5xlRarzM95oS-8NOqQerC5yqF3OeSvoUKhVEAj03f8Fo1_6oKcTNIpKiUjJJVWlyRRsUgXRR-WVCJkVvQe5s-ENoetLdqPEy3NHnO40mRujeFax_xzIB7sHhOqw5aP8UiKNDbtDOEnJANiXEcc1ONM5GrLiPW1aBgCKiy5S21tpqPsqfdIJQxBHA-6poj1f_6LPwxQtcx4ThPjqZvQcrBhdrO6QDjsIB1dSQcKdYGKtuj9UVBLfcR7KPduyNRyD_0lhh0L5HqMU-_UN4TxMe1HG-FyurBcClAnZfus3qPjRclmfPs4KhyiuYvOXp1uvHw2AIRqKdCaYMA4H13Z)

| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth.**That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=6b6417e895ff447ab455276afbd8ef29&_e=09aLmVXUdnFT0IWqCI8ZgRNJLO19hNnd7xNFQJ0YeWT03S5xlRarzM95oS-8NOqQerC5yqF3OeSvoUKhVEAj03f8Fo1_6oKcTNIpKiUjJJVWlyRRsUgXRR-WVCJkVvQe5s-ENoetLdqPEy3NHnO40mRujeFax_xzIB7sHhOqw5aP8UiKNDbtDOEnJANiXEcc1ONM5GrLiPW1aBgCKiy5S21tpqPsqfdIJQxBHA-6poh8U31YSgfLi6w_lmkDB5KDGiYCZQRSURO_1yS6tSEZb90lqXwZb6sw-_TK-C6f0fT_6ia84BIozTbiXUxUtwTKnLSpAvhGftAtkCoUjbw6367LYCdIyr0r3r4AN2mkss0kO5eFeQr8gC6ozu8YTTyP)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=6b6417e895ff447ab455276afbd8ef29&_e=09aLmVXUdnFT0IWqCI8ZgRNJLO19hNnd7xNFQJ0YeWT03S5xlRarzM95oS-8NOqQerC5yqF3OeSvoUKhVEAj03f8Fo1_6oKcTNIpKiUjJJVWlyRRsUgXRR-WVCJkVvQe5s-ENoetLdqPEy3NHnO40mRujeFax_xzIB7sHhOqw5aP8UiKNDbtDOEnJANiXEcc1ONM5GrLiPW1aBgCKiy5S21tpqPsqfdIJQxBHA-6poiqd5hPOQXd6b0I60sXT8Xi-0Uc5qvznYBmb5HVMR_A_iqsoev_GaRx7vuCrCWBf7T2Z34KMHPwlZxr_w1u-Jo3k8iuxhH1xXIpSEa6dyxklnKkL7FAZyyR6PAybVBbABe6_dtYBK4TorB7ih9nNtp-)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=6b6417e895ff447ab455276afbd8ef29&_e=09aLmVXUdnFT0IWqCI8ZgRNJLO19hNnd7xNFQJ0YeWT03S5xlRarzM95oS-8NOqQerC5yqF3OeSvoUKhVEAj03f8Fo1_6oKcTNIpKiUjJJVWlyRRsUgXRR-WVCJkVvQe5s-ENoetLdqPEy3NHnO40mRujeFax_xzIB7sHhOqw5aP8UiKNDbtDOEnJANiXEcc1ONM5GrLiPW1aBgCKiy5S21tpqPsqfdIJQxBHA-6poi1ZOg3qttbj-YD2soYTHP916DBAiXOkfQQpcPjC2KDKaJ7jfULzGV4bn44Ho0lUdhIQhKCRF144a0Q_w4gdXQewQylhEuodCw7ZXmmky6msbXbbX0na5MZ8mhIApk9PFCNUuhayyOt7WeKjN19_M_9) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **

Peter,

I emailed you __**specifically**__ because I was hoping I had earned your support. I don't take this lightly, so let me tell you why I believe I've earned your respect & support.
● I served as a Navy SEAL for over 2 decades
● My favorite title I've ever held is "Grandpa"
● I fight tirelessly for our dairy and family farms
● I want to make sure every veteran has access to quality care when they get home
● I always speak my mind, and my opinion and my vote are not for sale
---

This is your opportunity to share your thoughts on the issues that matter most to you, your family, and our community. | Fellow American - Your feedback is invaluable as we reflect on the challenges and accomplishments of the past year and set priorities for the future. Please take a few moments to complete our End-of-Year Survey. This is your opportunity to share your thoughts on the issues that matter most to you, your family, and our community. Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

Every day, our brave service members make countless unseen sacrifices. Many of them have spent the holidays far from their loved ones and holiday traditions, serving our country with dignity and honor while we celebrate the season back home.
There's no way we can fully repay our heroes in uniform for their service -- and our freedom -- but today, there's a special chance to have your gift provide even more for these brave men and women. **[Will you make a MATCHED gift of $29 or more right now?](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/a9zxSP3LZ-)**
[RUSH $29 (BECOMES $58!)](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[RUSH $58 (BECOMES $116!)](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/-)
---
[RUSH $116 (BECOMES $232!)](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/WYqRCrgpb~)
---
[RUSH ANOTHER _MATCHED_ AMOUNT](https://links.e.uso.)
---
We are behind on our goal of raising $100,000 today. Please, anything you can give will be doubled by Leonardo DRS, up to a total of $35,000, and your contribution will directly support our brave service members who need us now more than ever.
[MATCH YOUR GIFT](https://links.e.uso.)
---
Thank you for your urgent help. Your support can mean the world to those who serve.
--Team USO

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: LOOK AT THIS: Democracy under attack by DeSantis and Trump - we're fighting back!
body:
HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=5]

name: Jenna Burns
subject: Life in prison for saving a cop’s life
body:
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward.
Dear Fellow Patriot,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=351805cb69874a0b8ba66d500e1232c7&_e=37Cl0rgwMxkWQP8zBwzoefHLbnd2_7Rxp1oZwhUxhpEz301rDNNN14hFg7J9VVVu65YIyI7Z01BwhMHfzVsd8Xjlb5_jUeOeSFey-5ui2fYwKbykpRkK9aOski1BM1yE-TNtZvgy2IWJy_nLFPfi9BKQ9WVKmHNV7-rGuBnzkiMXEWoQdv9lgK-7BuHcEzIyQqozGqb7lK6DzJVsfYAxwxRHeuj_hQpKi-4OUqeOYhUEIYTFeUAU9iaoWmnHHCC31ixEW82BCguzh6sW32-r0B6Q2zSA-cgQwL0GQc0F6dgrxAdF1HrOhsc9C0Lp1rq5tm35uU3w8mcJXm8r_ceioizK4vlSzNRdU5AItru8f-F-eYrweWtFw_0c8O9k9EqFyIEur8aaExczTYL7vbo3qA%3D%3D)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=351805cb69874a0b8ba66d500e1232c7&_e=37Cl0rgwMxkWQP8zBwzoefHLbnd2_7Rxp1oZwhUxhpEz301rDNNN14hFg7J9VVVu65YIyI7Z01BwhMHfzVsd8Xjlb5_jUeOeSFey-5ui2fYwKbykpRkK9aOski1BM1yE-TNtZvgy2IWJy_nLFPfi9BKQ9WVKmHNV7-rGuBnzkiMXEWoQdv9lgK-7BuHcEzIyQqozGqb7lK6DzJVsfYAxwxRHeuj_hQpKi-4OUqeOYhUmiIgP-QNXX4F2BaBEteBzG4lXp4uXsGqRwkDMV3DhfOpkZmNNQi8JJY0teKBC9XOjnzTAn0z90sx-ohETRCIaJ9g8tkDj6sYVd6E7vCMeWGDnl_-6oJACFYP2gjwlZXPTHzdl8_m8bDnjYQN97STRy8ZqYLI3wNI1tTKciQT0iQ%3D%3D)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=351805cb69874a0b8ba66d500e1232c7&_e=37Cl0rgwMxkWQP8zBwzoefHLbnd2_7Rxp1oZwhUxhpEz301rDNNN14hFg7J9VVVu65YIyI7Z01BwhMHfzVsd8Xjlb5_jUeOeSFey-5ui2fYwKbykpRkK9aOski1BM1yE-TNtZvgy2IWJy_nLFPfi9BKQ9WVKmHNV7-rGuBnzkiMXEWoQdv9lgK-7BuHcEzIyQqozGqb7lK6DzJVsfYAxwxRHeuj_hQpKi-4OUqeOYhV83FZ_DS6z9KOHFy8VeJYh4D7OKAfJxanCtbpiOfOZI-tuDQTeSnLkBtdT0X2yBOcKi0rDwaZwS81hC8Jfh4UMPGRz_p_6o9Yql2BQmFhdeRuPAQzP7LqNGmIBDwPfwkYA8uRCRES0mxpu64ONGZWcSSRVkAmIN7VL1J1sq9zcOQ%3D%3D)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=351805cb69874a0b8ba66d500e1232c7&_e=37Cl0rgwMxkWQP8zBwzoefHLbnd2_7Rxp1oZwhUxhpEz301rDNNN14hFg7J9VVVu65YIyI7Z01BwhMHfzVsd8Xjlb5_jUeOeSFey-5ui2fYwKbykpRkK9aOski1BM1yE-TNtZvgy2IWJy_nLFPfi9BKQ9WVKmHNV7-rGuBnzkiMXEWoQdv9lgK-7BuHcEzIyQqozGqb7lK6DzJVsfYAxwxRHeuj_hQpKi-4OUqeOYhUeoW1thtCayXdH36bqWRh3EzHJLIYM82aXXa7eaMGtcyiZGz6OtyGPbzv2MmDMuhGt4fIY23SgWxma0OOQcvHGe2oOe5DabHlymA1iZZPfyDi6CzJeKYkpvXtQSf3t2lLEbtavITRYQbQwEoxOrGJhy-bI0i5rwzjo--IkVq8-rA%3D%3D)**

James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=351805cb69874a0b8ba66d500e1232c7&_e=37Cl0rgwMxkWQP8zBwzoefHLbnd2_7Rxp1oZwhUxhpEz301rDNNN14hFg7J9VVVu65YIyI7Z01BwhMHfzVsd8Xjlb5_jUeOeSFey-5ui2fYwKbykpRkK9aOski1BM1yE-TNtZvgy2IWJy_nLFPfi9BKQ9WVKmHNV7-rGuBnzkiMXEWoQdv9lgK-7BuHcEzIyQqozGqb7lK6DzJVsfYAxwxRHeuj_hQpKi-4OUqeOYhWEq8lpNkwvu9kgsx_OxdujCUnTgmwEKi6B4wQPZk7-ROz0gAuLMfr7A0JMNAmC-7LTV1NrknMCbS4d48-dAihCFlYUPlFrDMIEN1Ux0rCpRbyfS62E6PB31pQnAIpLxvTIlo0sAhKDnfkdoFrhRXcWVBh66P4clJEoy7unU9mWcw%3D%3D)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

And it's your **[$35 gift](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=351805cb69874a0b8ba66d500e1232c7&_e=37Cl0rgwMxkWQP8zBwzoefHLbnd2_7Rxp1oZwhUxhpEz301rDNNN14hFg7J9VVVu65YIyI7Z01BwhMHfzVsd8Xjlb5_jUeOeSFey-5ui2fYwKbykpRkK9aOski1BM1yE-TNtZvgy2IWJy_nLFPfi9BKQ9WVKmHNV7-rGuBnzkiMXEWoQdv9lgK-7BuHcEzIyQqozGqb7lK6DzJVsfYAxwxRHeuj_hQpKi-4OUqeOYhWcj8XeuMCEXhz4tiwBnN-Eeq3FGru7ZBDOwPT3Pr8i4V8JmQTCvvTjJYrcs60vQVJ_TN3amWUxTr5RURwBJgpY41S670XRFeyEf8EnOHlMCHU5fIo5bn7pK1w2ll5gR2TMn_iGtZ649qB3JnEPDDWcWnjhixzbqehd7GDgjx4x8A%3D%3D)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ in prison.

I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.

Sincerely,
Jenna Burns

P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! **[Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=351805cb69874a0b8ba66d500e1232c7&_e=37Cl0rgwMxkWQP8zBwzoefHLbnd2_7Rxp1oZwhUxhpEz301rDNNN14hFg7J9VVVu65YIyI7Z01BwhMHfzVsd8Xjlb5_jUeOeSFey-5ui2fYwKbykpRkK9aOski1BM1yE-TNtZvgy2IWJy_nLFPfi9BKQ9WVKmHNV7-rGuBnzkiMXEWoQdv9lgK-7BuHcEzIyQqozGqb7lK6DzJVsfYAxwxRHeuj_hQpKi-4OUqeOYhVZiJFqyrfHKLfOna6JdB5oHOP7oASHJGf5yrP8iCB34byMr-dhqnS7QGoE8eCO6FfVhFvgNywVsuTfK4Co94W-9Yi8Ffh6gixmBsADCPEQOodGu-L8T5MuvrahP-TaSx-0BTcXF3y_w_YCynGloZY4M_e3QG5z7wpwgpHlaEvP0Q%3D%3D)** Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=351805cb69874a0b8ba66d500e1232c7&_e=37Cl0rgwMxkWQP8zBwzoeQ3mTGdIb-Yg2NqOQPCcKXfLElMsQDL_b6Fpn2TwewnyYc--bG96owoqX9K4ISqHIKaEqmpHOKCl4jny7YVDzxE_8HNN8xUoHNMFcb6W9ZPjeFH_PmcdzV0FnsfHblMV4x52Yaki7_4_rpp7TMP5rg5TuDc9-18SKQ7JOqGpbs61xip6wOOzDKfQ4PyTs8uYEg%3D%3D)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

And it's your that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James. Sincerely, Jenna Burns P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 Click to unsubscribe

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: My team and I just officially launched Heartland Patriots
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots
body:
I'm so excited to share this with you
#
Hey Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce with an exciting announcement.
**My team and I just officially launched Heartland Patriots** — an organization that will build on the infrastructure of the movement we created together, and that is committed to supporting grassroots candidates who want to serve real working people instead of the corrupt special interests tearing our country apart.
**I’ll explain more about how exactly we plan to make an impact in a moment, but first I have to ask:[Will you become one of the very first Founding Donors to Heartland Patriots by making a contribution of any amount today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84666?refcode=em20241228-8698&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8698%2E614464%2EII-sUb)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84667?refcode=em20241228-8698&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=8698%2E614464%2EII-sUb) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84667?refcode=em20241228-8698&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=8698%2E614464%2EII-sUb) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84666?refcode=em20241228-8698&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=8698%2E614464%2EII-sUb)
---
When I first decided to run for office, I was told that it would be impossible for a normal person like me to run a modern campaign without help from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or Big Oil and Big Pharma executives.
But together, with support from hundreds of thousands of people like you chipping in just $5 or $35 at a time, our campaign raised millions of dollars. While billionaires and DC insiders pooled their resources to outspend us, we were still able to break grassroots fundraising records. Now, we have an opportunity to leverage the power of this grassroots movement to help even more everyday people running for office — and to help them compete against Big Money and corporate elites.
**[That’s why, today, I’m asking you to become one of the very first Founding Donors to Heartland Patriots: Will you chip in $10 or whatever you can today? We won’t ever take a cent from corporate PACs or shady insiders, so your contribution — no matter the amount — really will make a big impact.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84666?refcode=em20241228-8698&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=8698%2E614464%2EII-sUb)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84667?refcode=em20241228-8698&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=6&akid=8698%2E614464%2EII-sUb) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84667?refcode=em20241228-8698&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=7&akid=8698%2E614464%2EII-sUb) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84667?refcode=em20241228-8698&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=8&akid=8698%2E614464%2EII-sUb) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84667?refcode=em20241228-8698&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=9&akid=8698%2E614464%2EII-sUb) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84667?refcode=em20241228-8698&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=10&akid=8698%2E614464%2EII-sUb) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84667?refcode=em20241228-8698&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=11&akid=8698%2E614464%2EII-sUb) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84666?refcode=em20241228-8698&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=8698%2E614464%2EII-sUb)
---
You will hear more from my team and me about the importance of this work and how we can impact important races in the days ahead. If we’re going to elect leaders who will put working families and our country first, it’s going to take all of us standing together to make it happen!
I’m excited for this new chapter — and I hope you’ll continue to be part of it.
Now let’s get back to work,
— Lucas
